To optimize our budget and make strategic investments, we’ve divided our target states into three categories: 🚨 **Battlegrounds:** Our most competitive chambers where majorities are determined by the _slimmest_ of margins, including five chambers where majorities are decided by a single seat. 💪 **Power Building Chambers:** Our best opportunities to gain seats on our path to new majorities or defend the veto pens of Democratic governors. 👀 **Watch List:** Our team is tracking opportunities to maximize state legislative power and block the GOP’s agenda when possible. **We’re ready to hit the ground running – but this strategy is only as strong as the grassroots movement behind it.** [So, on behalf of my entire team and state Democrats nationwide, I’m asking: Will you invest in our State Dems are working daily to lower costs, address real concerns, and improve the everyday lives of folks like you in places like your state. Together,
Heather

To meet our goals and fund the mission-critical investments this work depends on, we'll need the full strength of this grassroots team. | | | | | ---|--- Our team has identified the cycle’s best and most consequential opportunities to build durable Democratic power in state legislatures, and I’m so excited to share our new target map with you: This map is ambitious, strategic, and forward-focused. To meet our goals and fund the mission-critical investments this work depends on, we'll need the full strength of this grassroots team. To optimize our budget and make strategic investments, we’ve divided our target states into three categories: 🚨 Battlegrounds: Our most competitive chambers where majorities are determined by the slimmest of margins, including five chambers where majorities are decided by a single seat. 💪 Power Building Chambers: Our best opportunities to gain seats on our path to new majorities or defend the veto pens of Democratic governors. 👀 Watch List: Our team is tracking opportunities to maximize state legislative power and block the GOP’s agenda when possible. We’re ready to hit the ground running – but this strategy is only as strong as the grassroots movement behind it. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | State Dems are working daily to lower costs, address real concerns, and improve the everyday lives of folks like you in places like your state. That’s why it’s vital that we fund our strategy to defend our majorities, elect strong Democratic leaders, and invest in ultra-competitive races nationwide. Thank you for being part of this movement. | Peter,

State legislatures across the country are taking bold action to protect their constituents from the dangerous executive orders and policy initiatives coming out of the White House.

**In Virginia, 35% of women in the state legislature are Emerge alums!** Despite obstruction at every step of the way, Democrats in the state legislature used their majority to fight back and pass three constitutional amendments that would: **🚺 ****Enshire abortion rights**
**🏳️🌈 ****Secure marriage equality for all**
**🗳️ ****Restore voting rights for felons** This is the power of electing Emerge women! Our work has never been more important, and we need to build up an even _stronger_ firewall to defend our most fundamental rights.

The more women we identify and invest in early, the better positioned we’ll be to take on anything that comes our way. name: Rebecca Weber
subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
body:
| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7c1c0ea91ae94c9db5f7ff7a5f0e6ae9&_e=F6JbXXhpRMr0XTbZ0YaMAwel_FG958ct3Ak6bksPfxoujatl20mssPh8p_K2ny8qeSk9P1E6dHZrAjMyPjTaaVn5IjKjN09QCzOcCBBe1Q1ZAcxHB6RTQGa4rtez4aTBKnVcV2TXWZQc6g-CebOuagUsNypEUfEmTIIAkQbrYM7vX_c315DzfnTef2pIu2ISIj1mRDyjyoaqLcgBXpMqBgM1A70J3DvwxSdsJeUpABTVnpN4_wsBVcTyyC7RLkBcgLjO2u1Z0owhY0dH2x5wmH-SAcME5sMi53UIjfobpEldC_awWMIXoWB2QKp2g3rqtlzGDchoMjZGtYjOAgEj6y7c9qR3CAsIt65PNGSNuSo%3D)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7c1c0ea91ae94c9db5f7ff7a5f0e6ae9&_e=F6JbXXhpRMr0XTbZ0YaMAwel_FG958ct3Ak6bksPfxoujatl20mssPh8p_K2ny8qeSk9P1E6dHZrAjMyPjTaaVn5IjKjN09QCzOcCBBe1Q1ZAcxHB6RTQGa4rtez4aTBKnVcV2TXWZQc6g-CebOuagUsNypEUfEmTIIAkQbrYM7vX_c315DzfnTef2pIu2ISIj1mRDyjyoaqLcgBXpMqBp1z-pK_fIXuecTHBOUf1ut_8O1A5wLFNNOU-iPZ5NNaNUX49-yl3CKWxOxwzBWRw6jMyKUerPNro26BNNfJbFsAknDbVc2r2Hhy_rdrtgnUVRP1Q4noMUvKto-k0nynVWITc1WwwIs5bxeVmT3DMek%3D)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7c1c0ea91ae94c9db5f7ff7a5f0e6ae9&_e=F6JbXXhpRMr0XTbZ0YaMAwel_FG958ct3Ak6bksPfxoujatl20mssPh8p_K2ny8qeSk9P1E6dHZrAjMyPjTaaVn5IjKjN09QCzOcCBBe1Q1ZAcxHB6RTQGa4rtez4aTBKnVcV2TXWZQc6g-CebOuagUsNypEUfEmTIIAkQbrYM7vX_c315DzfnTef2pIu2ISIj1mRDyjyoaqLcgBXpMqBt5cudOttFmFFb18S8e3H0CQeMeOAXg-DOyAZR5ChiuvP8U_g0XWMDm9HAGeO6udgs9vcecrrGJeAdX4330KIHKuBvBpQweEVcitoLRhzhWpJQbVhvJ4R8xOH1hIaDHZ2FuAdab5GF5PkXITGu5NBqw%3D)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7c1c0ea91ae94c9db5f7ff7a5f0e6ae9&_e=F6JbXXhpRMr0XTbZ0YaMAwel_FG958ct3Ak6bksPfxqrJ4FcFNTfW1xgokL1NjV5Pl9AzHmxcxuDgpC1zeCzH5lTL0HLEcxhgVx9jXgjVHTxB9QtIz3m0fd526wWYV_BzbILjJm4a4oYHD8IwcReMjApwI5CRXg3MqhuC7QG-cDjSygcCaqWLEvE5fMh81FcefP4nF127PvAow4X0sFLnuuW_7N2CGEpkhW_VtgP6lU%3D)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7c1c0ea91ae94c9db5f7ff7a5f0e6ae9&_e=F6JbXXhpRMr0XTbZ0YaMAwel_FG958ct3Ak6bksPfxoujatl20mssPh8p_K2ny8qeSk9P1E6dHZrAjMyPjTaaVn5IjKjN09QCzOcCBBe1Q1ZAcxHB6RTQGa4rtez4aTBKnVcV2TXWZQc6g-CebOuagUsNypEUfEmTIIAkQbrYM7vX_c315DzfnTef2pIu2ISIj1mRDyjyoaqLcgBXpMqBrPoxahp56Ccf51PNhNMqedvfvjbDpszvjxiAFLTaRQ8XYJ1PM2RzMAsVKl8NcrcS77FtLQNt2J7mz8VwCEnR6-nzyGd9cMIcFtpQGBPvn_ny7r0mO1DyfJMAY912Y3jI54Yy8hCqVw7q08MY7SizME%3D)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7c1c0ea91ae94c9db5f7ff7a5f0e6ae9&_e=F6JbXXhpRMr0XTbZ0YaMAwel_FG958ct3Ak6bksPfxoujatl20mssPh8p_K2ny8qeSk9P1E6dHZrAjMyPjTaaVn5IjKjN09QCzOcCBBe1Q1ZAcxHB6RTQGa4rtez4aTBKnVcV2TXWZQc6g-CebOuagUsNypEUfEmTIIAkQbrYM7vX_c315DzfnTef2pIu2ISIj1mRDyjyoaqLcgBXpMqBv9wnK_sk738aBNPXytwTiv6BUS6p3Bugxu6l7yJWtYs1v94i8Xaq9l5DA09hMt9YeAc8C8WjxQvsKVZ-mXAWTlo-PFwMzfhC_H_T8wVmxxzQOqfL1J1t-43o8DUQWaiCh_XY34-YekKL4rHWqC2djw%3D)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7c1c0ea91ae94c9db5f7ff7a5f0e6ae9&_e=F6JbXXhpRMr0XTbZ0YaMAwel_FG958ct3Ak6bksPfxoujatl20mssPh8p_K2ny8qeSk9P1E6dHZrAjMyPjTaaVn5IjKjN09QCzOcCBBe1Q1ZAcxHB6RTQGa4rtez4aTBKnVcV2TXWZQc6g-CebOuagUsNypEUfEmTIIAkQbrYM7vX_c315DzfnTef2pIu2ISIj1mRDyjyoaqLcgBXpMqBtoltvuqxi7ggtqtNG65TVP8ol72WzJB8QM56uMrkyByAsziL_gETmrBrVEFkGaudPZYKDDsf2Wy0qTnj4XKa9hzorgtVNyLA5v0ILAG1UA8HOhR2q6iQOymo9FMSwDtc6-36koNafLFjazrmgZ5AN4%3D), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. Friend,
Donald Trump handed Elon Musk the keys to our government — no oversight, no accountability, and no regard for the Constitution. Within days, Musk illegally declared USAID null and void, with a plan to wipe out critical global aid programs that leaves both our workforce and the people who rely on lifesaving programs in the lurch.
Make no mistake: USAID is just the beginning. He has made it quite clear that the Department of Education is next . Trump and Musk are gutting our government agency by agency, silencing civil servants, and replacing them with billionaires and yes-men.
Lateefah, for one, isn’t just standing by— she’s fighting back. As a member of the House Oversight Committee, she has already joined her colleagues in launching an official investigation into Trump’s purge of civil servants and Musk’s illegal access to classified information.

Friends and Neighbors,
We’re in the final stretch of today’s fundraising push, and we’re so close to hitting our goal. Every dollar raised tonight will help us organize, connect with voters, and share our vision for a stronger Prince George’s County.
If you’ve been waiting for the right time to step up, this is it. A contribution of any size—$5, $25, or even $50—will make a real difference in the fight for a county government that works for everyone.
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
Thank you for believing in this campaign. With your support, we’ll wake up tomorrow one step closer to victory.
Let's do this together,
Rushern L. Baker III
Candidate for County Executive
P.S. Your support today will help us reach more voters and build the momentum we need to win. Please consider donating whatever you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Turn America back to Godly values
body:
You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac55b32e5c804fc7b10f0c5e1c65ddee&_e=FAmpsBFHyChVpRXR_5vJmY_ILHACuowVCFNdfLllRjlziPZ3uvgt6zm5gYJohFNgaH_XrjHh2r39GoKQqO-7fb2vYpPsS1ZHbJ8W8ZKn3iHD5LbZ8uwxge0ssZ4kVVuR65EjDuiGTt-Yzq3n-IrUHv9JESLxlqbJu8XZGgAF8teYRLrKcTZo95LF555jV158n37sVqxldK_Px9OwEhbLVXMevD6sAb8Zp43WT_KPu8pnxA5n1-3cMZ0JfUZZOfRu7wFBSrcJ2nHP5cGMQz0-dLn0Y_o0itdVHZ1-CTC2Oq2J6aQcXzaD5EZZjI_nndxz2XsnRwpnaNZtRFmGfISq0iAA5xZXhZheGbU-vH0glxYLg8Fti9AudAlA29PR2bOG)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac55b32e5c804fc7b10f0c5e1c65ddee&_e=FAmpsBFHyChVpRXR_5vJmY_ILHACuowVCFNdfLllRjlziPZ3uvgt6zm5gYJohFNgaH_XrjHh2r39GoKQqO-7fb2vYpPsS1ZHbJ8W8ZKn3iHD5LbZ8uwxge0ssZ4kVVuR65EjDuiGTt-Yzq3n-IrUHv9JESLxlqbJu8XZGgAF8teYRLrKcTZo95LF555jV158n37sVqxldK_Px9OwEhbLVXMevD6sAb8Zp43WT_KPu8qb42X5bP_pjEIfZeV0OZIGxJh9HFGQeJsMPV7HEVXCSUanAiWKmEwCk-VIr3GUuNcrSXVjolz2Evc8gIDsJmaXWwMlPSRw5HdvCiRpeox4TkzPb7Jpb_O7hodtc6TXK7ghP6hdTNR6sNjogsiMsCwU)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac55b32e5c804fc7b10f0c5e1c65ddee&_e=FAmpsBFHyChVpRXR_5vJmY_ILHACuowVCFNdfLllRjlziPZ3uvgt6zm5gYJohFNgaH_XrjHh2r39GoKQqO-7fb2vYpPsS1ZHbJ8W8ZKn3iHD5LbZ8uwxge0ssZ4kVVuR65EjDuiGTt-Yzq3n-IrUHv9JESLxlqbJu8XZGgAF8teYRLrKcTZo95LF555jV158n37sVqxldK_Px9OwEhbLVXMevD6sAb8Zp43WT_KPu8qAxOmPZBHb6uAWZYnqDqBxmHKARZqJUfsPwkusbCXltFflWXSvcQLiTnDNSmpN8ICzUcWMMStQOHcx_AIZvGtvm9bkOOCnDwh9tOmYyNK9YvjCY8oxZo2XFORiHZ-lh5IJcob-pbgL075L3okB6XM-) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac55b32e5c804fc7b10f0c5e1c65ddee&_e=FAmpsBFHyChVpRXR_5vJmY_ILHACuowVCFNdfLllRjlziPZ3uvgt6zm5gYJohFNgaH_XrjHh2r39GoKQqO-7fb2vYpPsS1ZHbJ8W8ZKn3iHD5LbZ8uwxge0ssZ4kVVuR65EjDuiGTt-Yzq3n-IrUHv9JESLxlqbJu8XZGgAF8teYRLrKcTZo95LF555jV158n37sVqxldK_Px9OwEhbLVXMevD6sAb8Zp43WT_KPu8pN0euj3o2wNgTQCT2Qd4SU6T4PH96ZD7GV3Sx9xNhOWLc6U2YEKbkjnSGrF7kzgJc1UQjd_edMTNmbAc8HMFDg69jQ_xVUkAk8_pvDHfutgKuMgVvF0qdFbRgcLnAJ6bohIzOagz1OV2UGUGG1-YUA)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac55b32e5c804fc7b10f0c5e1c65ddee&_e=FAmpsBFHyChVpRXR_5vJmY_ILHACuowVCFNdfLllRjlziPZ3uvgt6zm5gYJohFNgaH_XrjHh2r39GoKQqO-7fb2vYpPsS1ZHbJ8W8ZKn3iHD5LbZ8uwxge0ssZ4kVVuR65EjDuiGTt-Yzq3n-IrUHv9JESLxlqbJu8XZGgAF8teYRLrKcTZo95LF555jV158n37sVqxldK_Px9OwEhbLVXMevD6sAb8Zp43WT_KPu8oYk76N2ezQz_B85XXp7tTkC1Q99vJw5ffzIHcLO_ZWyWgMAGOLFmMuehS9KNxsgHFeTcMvHt5Nms2kKYHfkiERs4y8QPgp_Nj6dJKpvQ5RKp2GfVZmnB9Q5k5pNTzNeZ0AwbHkKpu4aIbWiYZhUABB)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

name: Royce White
subject: Why I’m running for Senate

body:

Peter,

**I will be running for Minnesota U.S. Senate in 2026. This picture is why I won the primary against the entire establishment.** The people know me, and they know I'm genuine. Anybody taking a genuine shot at this permanent political class (like Klobuchar) must plan on a multiple-election strategy. Even Trump needed two because they cheated him once.

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d97db1ab6a52477ea48a0cc405911955&_e=uDm0SzIlox9axZKAEh3-dFCPMo5eimBQhUz7catOhsl9YqsBNV4VRPDUnC7NAqgccyl0jkqzRQy3CrVM4x9yEOe9TJrxb2i5T5DuLhvIGFJcOoNjPDSw19qsPC_xJG_vh-uVR1PqaVLIn3IBivsI1uPe9dsI5fptCvsemRHvJ3Lx4ljPi-J2BmXfcp-I384Jpd4puzIIHxA7Q11NTG92XZKzu-VrD0wU88i71Hl1fs4Hn60KfqLw0lQAZYklU8WxnK1ibTBZ-ehSwVp0tqak2KY3C9I_kQyj1n08bmTskMRFiVltVhba_4OmLdZtwPqas3SqhDkC1-s_LuFVGmEJyw%3D%3D)
**Getting closer than any other opponent Klobuchar has faced isn't why I'm running again. I'm running again because I'm 33 years old and learned so much from the first campaign.** It goes to waste if we let establishment shills convince us this isn't a "We The People" movement. The prospect of getting to square off against Tim Walz, Peggy Flanagan, Keith Ellison, Ilhan Omar, Dean Philips, Angie Craig, etc., just makes it that much sweeter.

Bring them all on, honestly. Maybe Amy Klobuchar will help them debate prep!

[**Can you rush just $15 to my American 1st movement before midnight so I can crush my Radical 2026 opponent?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d97db1ab6a52477ea48a0cc405911955&_e=uDm0SzIlox9axZKAEh3-dFCPMo5eimBQhUz7catOhsl9YqsBNV4VRPDUnC7NAqgccyl0jkqzRQy3CrVM4x9yEOe9TJrxb2i5T5DuLhvIGFJcOoNjPDSw19qsPC_xJG_vh-uVR1PqaVLIn3IBivsI1uPe9dsI5fptCvsemRHvJ3Lx4ljPi-J2BmXfcp-I384JJjb_D15wNTP46OLU37cze17DmTJ17ZFrkAkb-nv74pfAHW28oqE6O551PzwBLx6_F_ieC3PDzbV54TCWlAz3CUdopkf9BoZ4eNh_5f5Fl8qYcYa98Q9fB2M3golB7PXbVJqgCrCRgca7YkP-VQGsTA%3D%3D)

The 1st thing we're going to address is the problem in our Minnesota Republican Party. A microcosm of deeply controlled opposition, serving the deep state agenda. They wear MAGA hats but secretly dislike Donald Trump and the American 1st movement. They dislike me, and similar to Donald Trump, they come up with a million reasons why, but the truth is they just don't like the truth.

| [ **SUPPORT MY MAGA MOVEMENT** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d97db1ab6a52477ea48a0cc405911955&_e=uDm0SzIlox9axZKAEh3-dFCPMo5eimBQhUz7catOhsl9YqsBNV4VRPDUnC7NAqgccyl0jkqzRQy3CrVM4x9yEOe9TJrxb2i5T5DuLhvIGFJcOoNjPDSw19qsPC_xJG_vh-uVR1PqaVLIn3IBivsI1uPe9dsI5fptCvsemRHvJ3Lx4ljPi-J2BmXfcp-I384J6FEy-VoAl98UHvkERQ31YshMbr9SaBmPcl9ot5OPcnLvLML7S0zzrAbJCQuRpcbY54Sn8Pqc5ngGMW3t0Z3zdePNMWn0jaiXNriJ7nGRV4C8kWjjY7Hhy4cjuxy-u5AmLano2-xdJah2Xkd3cW8BFw%3D%3D)
---

Well, screw 'em! I mean that, honestly. We're going to tell the truth anyway. If they don't like it, they can do their worst. Strap in, this is going to be a fun ride. MAGA IS RISING! No more neocons whatsoever. Go caucus with the Democrats. No more Ukraine funding!

Royce White for U.S. Senate 2026

Minnesota LET'S GO!

The People Are Coming!
Godspeed

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d97db1ab6a52477ea48a0cc405911955&_e=uDm0SzIlox9axZKAEh3-dFCPMo5eimBQhUz7catOhsl9YqsBNV4VRPDUnC7NAqgccyl0jkqzRQy3CrVM4x9yEOe9TJrxb2i5T5DuLhvIGFJcOoNjPDSw19qsPC_xJG_vh-uVR1PqaVLIn3IBivsI1uPe9dsI5fptCvsemRHvJ3Lx4ljPi-J2BmXfcp-I384JSSlT6MO1kfkyiIccprMUVaSSC5y3MVFk9bWJSZAfl_VPDFhjEt43a8AR3vkzYCIonVeVH_gCpD4o2MJTN4qs_Ch_kvgWsrWFc-qUTPv_V4hK3wCkGcgKczEzUmM0cIKBb6wjhMt8EIaNdSundHCQbw%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d97db1ab6a52477ea48a0cc405911955&_e=uDm0SzIlox9axZKAEh3-dFCPMo5eimBQhUz7catOhsl9YqsBNV4VRPDUnC7NAqgccyl0jkqzRQy3CrVM4x9yEOe9TJrxb2i5T5DuLhvIGFJcOoNjPDSw19qsPC_xJG_vh-uVR1PqaVLIn3IBivsI1uPe9dsI5fptCvsemRHvJ3Lx4ljPi-J2BmXfcp-I384JF8oi5bLKASRT8Galj5SFVH_pkZMQPqey-7_B-QmClZBTSla5Ok5jUU3IB5Tsr2FPbqbhFkljLnjLpa95M-1X958i8We7U_BrGNNmvWg4SfydvNBQ2_JdkZhEhiRZpWCXLslSYEsbejdrCcMzQAXN3Q%3D%3D)

subject: Folks, Elon Musk is going after your Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
this is just flat out DESPICABLE
| | **We’re absolutely appalled–** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20250218_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18957%2E878179%2EX5dFaI) | [**35,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SIGN OUR URGENT PETITION NOW TO DEMAND CONGRESS PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20250218_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18957%2E878179%2EX5dFaI)
---
Millions of Americans rely on Social Security. It is NOT an entitlement like Republicans seem to think!!

**Out-of-touch billionaires like Elon Musk were never going to protect average Americans.**

Musk and his MAGA cronies have already DESTROYED funding for Medicaid, the CDC, and so many more critical federal agencies.

_That’s why we have to step up to save Social Security today._

[**We can stop this shameful scheme, but only with a SURGE of IMMEDIATE help from Democrats like you – please, sign our urgent petition now to SAVE Social Security! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20250218_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18957%2E878179%2EX5dFaI)
[**35,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SIGN OUR URGENT PETITION NOW TO DEMAND CONGRESS PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20250218_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=18957%2E878179%2EX5dFaI)
---
Thank you for stepping up,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Kerry McQuisten (Newsletter)
subject: Vance Day Joins Trump Administration!
body:
| | | | |
# Oregon's Vance Day Joins the Trump Administration!
---
| |
---
| I considered making the subject of this email, "President Trump Steals our Advisory Board Member!" ;) I didn't. But the news definitely deserves a special newsletter today.
Those of us at the Oregon Conservative Caucus are a little sad and yet extremely excited to announce the resignation of Judge Vance Day from the OCC-13, our advisory board. Our loss has led to a greater gain for Oregon and our country.
Vance has begun his work inside the Trump Administration after accepting an appointment to Senior Counsel - Office of the Deputy Attorney General of the United States.
An early target of political lawfare, Vance has been a staunch 1A rights advocate and a wise source of counsel for us in many areas. Clearly, others agree and recognize what an asset he'll be in Washington D.C. I can't wait see how his policy work will help shape Trump's DOJ. I've watched Vance hit setbacks but keep moving forward in all his endeavors over the years until this amazing opportunity hit, which to me feels a bit like vindication. God's timing isn't always as fast as we'd like, but when He moves, boy does He ever!
---
| |
---
---
**Registering New Republican Voters Feels Good!**
---
| For three days last week and then through the weekend, our volunteers manned the booth at the Pacific Northwest Sportsmen's Show in Portland. We spread the word about the Oregon Conservative Caucus. We registered new Republican voters. And we talked to a lot of good people. THANK YOU to everyone who helped make this event happen for us.
Help us flip Oregon red. We have the structure, the knowledge and the ability but we need YOU. Consider donating to us - we're all volunteer and your dollars don't go into our pockets. Even better... _**consider becoming a member and donating your time!**_
**Link: **[**Oregon Conservative Caucus | Nonprofit**](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/T0lQcF7Dl-Lt5ItaHJsXGQ~~/AAAHURA~/uxABtsXHq2z08cw_qVO0_B1pGCZnTSRgBv_JT6d9UweDP6Yc6MGkFf2Oj7U4yEEhj78YhXc-M8ZJptyf9L0r7Xgvg2nrZKfQ9W-BlgqedSmk2kerNHgFAKuoOwL96RVaHzy4_F0ohEtn3F3tCnn_AK9Qnz6S0PKEQaOJQRfSCoF0PEck_Qc1frm6Vn3kucoe)

|

clean_body: | | | | | Oregon's Vance Day Joins the Trump Administration! | | | I considered making the subject of this email, "President Trump Steals our Advisory Board Member!" ;) I didn't. But the news definitely deserves a special newsletter today. Those of us at the Oregon Conservative Caucus are a little sad and yet extremely excited to announce the resignation of Judge Vance Day from the OCC-13, our advisory board. Our loss has led to a greater gain for Oregon and our country. Vance has begun his work inside the Trump Administration after accepting an appointment to Senior Counsel - Office of the Deputy Attorney General of the United States. An early target of political lawfare, Vance has been a staunch 1A rights advocate and a wise source of counsel for us in many areas. Clearly, others agree and recognize what an asset he'll be in Washington D.C. I can't wait see how his policy work will help shape Trump's DOJ. I've watched Vance hit setbacks but keep moving forward in all his endeavors over the years until this amazing opportunity hit, which to me feels a bit like vindication. God's timing isn't always as fast as we'd like, but when He moves, boy does He ever! | | Registering New Republican Voters Feels Good! | For three days last week and then through the weekend, our volunteers manned the booth at the Pacific Northwest Sportsmen's Show in Portland. We spread the word about the Oregon Conservative Caucus. We registered new Republican voters. And we talked to a lot of good people. THANK YOU to everyone who helped make this event happen for us. Help us flip Oregon red. We have the structure, the knowledge and the ability but we need YOU. Consider donating to us - we're all volunteer and your dollars don't go into our pockets. Even better... consider becoming a member and donating your time! name: Josh Harder
subject: Elon Musk is targeting Social Security
body:
We should all be worried.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102364187/528970342/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE0YWY1MTAtNjdlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MtB6gPq1pmgCHkZrbsvVexjDwb-YavzLV1eaxuEJ4vg=) | Peter, Elon Musk continues on his rampage this week. His new target is social security. Over the weekend, the top official at the Social Security Administration resigned in protest after DOGE attempted to access highly sensitive personal data. If DOGE succeeds, that means Musk would have access to 70 million Americans’ bank information, social security numbers and health histories. We should all be worried about this. Elon Musk does not have the authority or the Constitutional right to access our private information. As a member of the Appropriations Committee, I’m taking immediate action to protect the federal payment systems and limit access to government data. I realize right now it feels like a game of whack-a-mole with crisis after crisis. **I strongly believe that this is a fight we can win.** We must take a stand against this grave overreach by an unelected billionaire who is, as we speak, tearing down our government institutions. This is the United States, and we have a democracy to protect. [_**Will you add your name to my petition to tell Elon Musk we won’t let him interfere with our Social Security?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102364188/528970343/-497099510?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE0YWY1MTAtNjdlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MtB6gPq1pmgCHkZrbsvVexjDwb-YavzLV1eaxuEJ4vg=&emci=ad144fb9-4fee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=aa4af510-67ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=6455652) Will keep you in the loop on next steps,
\- Josh

clean_body: We should all be worried. | = | Peter, Elon Musk continues on his rampage this week. His new target is social security. Over the weekend, the top official at the Social Security Administration resigned in protest after DOGE attempted to access highly sensitive personal data. If DOGE succeeds, that means Musk would have access to 70 million Americans’ bank information, social security numbers and health histories. We should all be worried about this. Elon Musk does not have the authority or the Constitutional right to access our private information. As a member of the Appropriations Committee, I’m taking immediate action to protect the federal payment systems and limit access to government data. I realize right now it feels like a game of whack-a-mole with crisis after crisis. I strongly believe that this is a fight we can win. We must take a stand against this grave overreach by an unelected billionaire who is, as we speak, tearing down our government institutions. This is the United States, and we have a democracy to protect. Will keep you in the loop on next steps, \- Josh *

Add your name now to demand their confirmation! | Peter, The radical Left is at it again - doing everything they can to BLOCK President Trump's nominee to lead the FBI, Kash Patel. They want to keep Trump's and Senate Republicans' America First agenda from succeeding. These Senate Democrats don't care about the will of the people. They want to obstruct, delay, and destroy. I'm SICK of their games. I've had ENOUGH. And I know you have, too. They don't want President Trump to have his team in place because they fear what we'll do-SECURE the border, CRUSH inflation, and PUT AMERICA FIRST. Well, I've got a message for them: We aren't backing down. We aren't rolling over. And we sure as heck aren't letting them sabotage President Trump. name: Matthew Frohlich, WAGOP Executive Director
subject: Fighting for Election Integrity
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# Support our Election Integrity Lawsuits
---
|
---
| Dear Peter,
WAGOP is fighting in court for fair elections. We’re challenging the Democrats’ corrupt control over Washington voting. We’re not just reacting, we’re using lawfare for true justice...and we need your help.
Will you join us?
[Click here](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b523e8025f&e=6a281f566d) to learn more about our cases, what we’re doing, and how you can help restore fair elections in Washington.
WAGOP has filed several election integrity lawsuits. The most recent is in Clark County, where people who’d moved out of district voted in the last state senate race, potentially changing the outcome. We’ve gathered affidavits which prove this. Now the Democrats and liberal election workers are delaying the case and trying to axe evidence.
Fighting in court is expensive. WAGOP needs your support. [Click here](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=237d3acd48&e=6a281f566d) to contribute.
WAGOP is determined to fix broken elections in Washington. The Clark County lawsuit is just the beginning. In 2025 and 2026, we will be filing lawsuits all around the state, shining a light on shady practices and forcing good reform for honest voting.

Sincerely,Matthew FrohlichWAGOP Executive Director

---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [View in browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/fighting-for-election-integrity?e=6a281f566d)

Washington State Republican Party
11811 NE 1st St Suite A306 Bellevue WA, 98005

subject: Three House Races in early 2025. One Single Mission for us...
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

name: Sydney Kamlager
subject: Squabble Up!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sydney Kamlager-Dove for Congress**
body:
We are the opposition | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a5f23ee02322/congressmember-ro-khanna-is-all-in-13472355-asktlzi9fq-14053923?e=e6ba7d1bc4)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Peter:
Last week, I hosted a tele-town hall and over 14,000 constituents joined the call. Most folks had the same questions on their minds.

1\. What are Democrats doing?
2\. What can you do?
3\. What more can you do?

**What Democrats are Doing**

I and my colleagues went to the Treasury Department, demanding entry in order to conduct some on-site oversight (of which Congress is obligated to do). Of course, we were denied entry. Of course, I raised some hell **(click[here](https://kamlagerforassembly.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=37cfa88eaa&e=e6ba7d1bc4) for the video). **
---
|
---
|
As a result, I authored legislation that would prohibit any unelected vulture (like Elon Musky) from gaining access to sensitive, personal data.

I have joined the Litigation and Rapid Response Task Force to help our Democratic caucus be more informative, proactive and preemptive as we navigate this all-out assault on our freedoms, liberties and security.

I have stated that I will vote NO on any Republican budget bills that eviscerate basic safety net services. I will not bail out Republicans as they slash and burn government spending in order to pay for tax cuts that will only sink more Americans into poverty.

I am supporting the over 70 lawsuits (and counting) that have been filed to pause some of the illegal and unconstitutional actions of Musky and Trumpy.

---
| **What You Can Do**

Whatever your thoughts are about government waste, spending and the economy, the current approach of eviscerating the working class is neither effective nor sustainable. Destroying the careers of thousands of working families in the middle class to benefit a handful of insatiable billionaires does not make financial sense.

It is also unconstitutional.

Our three branches of government - executive, legislative and judiciary - provide us needed checks and balances and make us a democracy. Anything less is tyranny.

Republicans are in the majority, but they are gaslighting the public into believing that Democrats are trying to shut down the government.

What have you heard Republicans say about defunding Social Security and Medicare? What have you heard them say about defunding research programs at universities? What have you heard them say in response to cutting subsidies to farmers, and eliminating food stamps and school lunches? Crickets!

Instead, they are giving the codes, the accounts and the power to Elon Musk. So, they need to **FEEL THE HEAT!**

** There are eight Republicans in Toss Up seats. ****Call them! ** AZ-01 [Schweikert](https://kamlagerforassembly.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=9c20d447ba&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
AZ-06 [Ciscomani](https://kamlagerforassembly.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=ee67622c20&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
CO-08 [Evans](https://kamlagerforassembly.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=6c36cbdf11&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
IA-01 [Miller-Meeks](https://kamlagerforassembly.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=e6311b5aab&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
MI-07 [Barrett](https://kamlagerforassembly.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=2e48af5baa&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
NE-02 [Bacon](https://kamlagerforassembly.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=f5851c4e99&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
PA-07 [Mackenzie](https://kamlagerforassembly.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=7b004b1d72&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
PA-10 [Perry](https://kamlagerforassembly.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=391caca97a&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
Enlighten them to the reality that you are the resistance and the opposition. Tell them to do their job. Remind them to put their constituents and this country FIRST, because you will be working to kick them out of office!

**What More You Can Do**

Leave no space un-protested.

Launch a counter-offensive with an economic boycott of companies that support the radical right.

Swarm the lies they propagate on social media with a flurry of hard, provable truths.

Show up at protests against the ruthless dismantling of federal agencies that have accomplished so much across the globe helping vulnerable (and strategically important) countries abroad.

Make your voices heard at every town hall, every school board meeting, and to every member of congress who is cow-towing to the two Musketeers.

The middle who swayed right need to reclaim middle-left. We need to mobilize our army of people who care about not only themselves, but also their neighbors, their communities and this country.

**In the words of Kendrick Lamar, it’s time to squabble up!**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TO THE FIGHT](https://kamlagerforassembly.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=5665934da7&e=e6ba7d1bc4 "CONTRIBUTE TO THE FIGHT")

This is the latest attempt by far-left judicial activists to placate their out-of-state donors and destroy election integrity in Wisconsin. They will ignore the rule of law to benefit their Democrat allies. This is yet another example of what liberals will do to our elections if they retain the majority on the court. Without Judge Brad Schimel, the Wisconsin Supreme Court will continue to threaten election integrity in our state. Every dollar you donate will stay in Wisconsin to help protect our election. Together, we can stand up for Election Integrity in Wisconsin. -WISGOP | PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. www.WisGOP.org Republican Party of Wisconsin | 148 E. name: Nunn HQ
subject: Your Opinion on Trump as President
body:
Take the Approval Poll

---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document | | Friend,

Time is running out, and we have one question to ask you...
**[Do you approve of Donald Trump as President?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztsg1tt5pjcqm25r79kafpq7h7c53bs3746sd5kg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjhmcpr6c5h2bs)** | [**Yes**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z27chkh0gej570gg5hqkh85g669q840hhbthor3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjhmcpr6c5h2bs)
---
[**NO**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z159dgmmrh35uudjbbo89b4pm60iqb9c8k7pp6n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjhmcpr6c5h2bs)
---
[**GO ON RECORD >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt2ri8gmruph23eeer93v4sp37lb1dmjb2096540_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjhmcpr6c5h2bs)
---

Donald Trump has just begun his second term, and it's time for a review. We need to know if you approve of him as YOUR President, friend.

_This is your chance to make a real impact --let top GOP strategists know where you stand._

**[Please confirm your answer HERE before midnight to ensure your response is included.>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh41184d54223vcs9gsaatrp73mr92q0cbpurho0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjhmcpr6c5h2bs)**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmj0t3t6r580ho0bgj4oesr3r9r0uflp0bckgq98_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjhmcpr6c5h2bs)
Thank you,

Team Nunn

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

# **[Senate Advances Kash Patel's Nomination as FBI Director to Final Vote](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The Senate on Tuesday night voted to end debate on President Donald Trump’s FBI director nominee Kash Patel, advancing in nomination to a final vote expected on Thursday. The Senate voted to invoke cloture on Patel’s nomination in a 48-45 vote along party lines. The vote comes after a Senate panel voted 12-10 along party [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-d5WV7TcqA)

# **[Judge Blocking Trump's DOGE Agenda Has Ties to USAID: Report](http://trk.libertyledger._JFVzQMSkIaw)**
---
Calls are mounting for a federal judge to withdraw his ruling after it was revealed that his spouse had personally benefited from programs President Donald Trump is attempting to eliminate. The controversy surfaced last week after U.S. District Judge John Bates blocked Trump’s efforts to remove government-run websites promoting gender ideology—part of the administration’s broader [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._JFVzQMSkIaw)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[$30 Million Fund Launched To Help Win Abortion Battle](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
A coalition of pro-life advocates launched a new $30 million venture fund on Tuesday with the goal of shaping public policy and building a culture that values “the sanctity of every human life.” Pro-life advocates and philanthropists announced the creation of two new national efforts, the Life Leadership Conference and the Pro-Life Venture Fund, to [...]...Click to read more
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Vatican doctrine chief warns against 'claim to omnipotence' of gender ideology](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Cardinal Víctor Manuel Fernández, prefect of the Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith, presides over a press conference on Friday, May 17, 2024, on the Vatican’s new document on Marian apparitions. / Credit: Rudolf Gehrig/EWTN News CNA Newsroom, Feb 18, 2025 / 09:50 am (CNA). The Vatican’s doctrine chief delivered a pointed critique of gender ideology at a theological conference in Germany on Monday.Cardinal Victor Manuel Fernández, prefect of the Vatican’s Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith, addressed scholars at the Cologne School of Catholic Theology (KHKT) about gender ideology’s “claim to omnipotence.”Speaking via video link in German, the cardinal rejected the notion that gender and bodily identity could be subject to radical change based on individual wishes and claims to freedom.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)

**Hearing Protection** **Is A Must While Shooting**

[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20359/6374453/c8f5651d434b92a7cf96d75f4a71294809b0e501/162925d956451e2d2631ee2d6ba42166120fe5c0)

A gunshot is an impulse high decibel noise, which can be harmful to the human ear, so much so that even a single shot can cause permanent damage without the right [hearing protection.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20359/6374453/75f710ec0ce7af834d60f7b0b53f839350527822/162925d956451e2d2631ee2d6ba42166120fe5c0) **Depending on the caliber of the firearm, every gunshot registers above the[safe hearing DB levels](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20359/6374453/75f710ec0ce7af834d60f7b0b53f839350527822/162925d956451e2d2631ee2d6ba42166120fe5c0), at which hearing damage can occur quickly.** EarArmor.com's Earmuffs Rated with a [Noise Reduction Rating (NRR) of 21](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20359/6374453/75f710ec0ce7af834d60f7b0b53f839350527822/162925d956451e2d2631ee2d6ba42166120fe5c0), EarArmor offers best-in-class hearing protection from noise levels across all firearm calibers.

**Thank You.**

[ SIGN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDg4MjgxNTEsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMjg5OS1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDUwLWI4ZGFjOTEzNTAyZjRjOTViNjY4N2YxZWFmOWY1NjYzIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdHJveS1kb3duaW5nLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9sYXdzdWl0cy8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIxOV9LUi1TUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDU4OTMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMTlfS1ItU1IuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjA1ODkzLTI4OTkifQ/tagrQ81qrIQWPA7PYmHnTw)

| | | | Dear friend, Donald Trump built his entire campaign on a lie. He promised to be the anti-war candidate—yet he’s already saber-rattling with dangerous foreign policy stunts. He vowed to bring prices down—but inflation is climbing, and working families are paying the price. He swore he’d fight for the working class—but his only priority seems to be billionaires like Elon Musk, who is now running roughshod over our government. Instead of fixing the real issues Americans sent him to the White House to address, Trump has been busy with delusional vanity projects—renaming the Gulf of Mexico, reviving his imperialist dream of taking over Greenland, and scheming to control the Panama Canal. These aren’t the actions of a leader fighting for the people. **_And the country is waking up._** A new Reuters/Ipsos poll shows Trump’s approval has dropped to **44%** , down from **47%** when he first returned to office. Meanwhile, disapproval has jumped to **51%** , up **10 points** from when he took office. Even his supposed stronghold—the economy—is slipping, with approval of his economic stewardship dropping to **39%** from **43%** just weeks ago. And his failure to address inflation is hitting hard—only **32%** of Americans approve of his performance on the issue. Instead of tackling the real issues Americans sent him to the White House to fix, Trump is obsessed with nonsense—renaming the Gulf of Mexico, scheming to seize Greenland, and letting Elon Musk dismantle our institutions. Meanwhile, everyday Americans are paying the price. A U.S. Labor Department report shows consumer prices just rose by the most in nearly **1.5 years** , and expectations for inflation are climbing after Trump’s reckless tariffs on imports from China, Mexico, and Canada. And here’s the kicker—**53%** of Americans now say the economy is on the wrong track, up from **43%** just weeks ago. Public confidence in Trump’s ability to deliver is collapsing, and **54%** of Americans oppose his trade war tariffs. [**_If we act now, we can capitalize on this moment, make massive gains in the 2026 midterms, and finally kick MAGA out of the White House for good in 2028. No Dem Left Behind is on the frontlines exposing Trump’s failures, but we need you in this fight. Chip in now to fuel the movement and ensure his lies don’t go unchecked._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2whtr0-v2tndo-kyd76rh1/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team

name: Scott Presler
subject: No time for rest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC](https://go
body:
The Democrats aren’t taking a day off

| | | | |
---
Friend,
I started Early Vote Action with one mission: register as many Republican voters as possible and deliver a resounding victory in Pennsylvania for President Trump.
**We were successful... but that doesn’t mean it’s time to rest.**
_Just because we won the 2024 Election doesn’t mean our work is over._
In fact, it means we need to double our efforts and build on our momentum.

[SUPPORT EVA](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a2q1/?__vbtrk=Mjc2MjA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2MjA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
That’s exactly what Early Vote Action is doing.
We are continuing to focus on Pennsylvania and expanding our work with a new initiative to flip New Jersey from blue to **RED**.
**With more organizers on the ground – and more Republicans to register to vote – our budget is growing, and that means our fundraising efforts must grow as well.**
**__[I hope I can count on your support, our entire operation relies on grassroots support from patriots across the country](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a2q1/?__vbtrk=Mjc2MjA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2MjA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
It’s an honor to fight alongside you as we save our country.

_Your Friend,_

**Scott Presler** Founder, Early Vote Action

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a2q1/?__vbtrk=Mjc2MjA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2MjA5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T016c8b3c-3caa-4a33-b2c8-cbf7f8d96288/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b80c455-a21c-4a8e-a23e-3be779121a4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi Peter, it’s Blake Gendebien. I’m honored to be the presumptive Democratic nominee in the upcoming special election in NY-21. [When Elise Stefanik resigns, a special election will be called, and we’ll have less than 90 days to campaign. Will you split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action to become a Founding Donor of my campaign and help us prepare?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e4a6432-ef2d-4e0a-b807-c2c932906f65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [DONATE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6841c5a3-c891-4813-a217-9d61510d42b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | NY-21 is one of the most competitive races in the country right now. The GOP’s majority is incredibly small, and this special election will be one of our first chances to fight back. All eyes are on us to see if we have what it takes to win this race. As a dairy farmer, I’m used to rolling up my sleeves and working hard to get the job done. But flipping this seat won’t be easy, so I’m counting on your support to hit the ground running and connect with voters across the North Country. [Peter, will you split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action today to become a Founding Donor and help us prepare for the special election?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9561cd4c-bc1a-4a4d-8eca-8287804bafbc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4ecb5dd-5f7d-4b5a-b9f9-e6924a1b2cce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

**_You see, the State of New York unlocks matching funds at a rate of 6-to-1 – once a candidate has raised $100,000 from 1,000 unique small-dollar donors in the state._**

That means that once we hit our $100,000 goal to FIRE Tish James, your donation could literally go **__SIX_ _TIMES_ _AS_ _FAR__**!

It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/20365/6374453/5629e5dddc865da87beb43e270f1ef3ee50d83ca/e94a26f95512a66a6fd222f339253755b67708cd). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/20365/6374453/5629e5dddc865da87beb43e270f1ef3ee50d83ca/e94a26f95512a66a6fd222f339253755b67708cd).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/20365/6374453/5629e5dddc865da87beb43e270f1ef3ee50d83ca/e94a26f95512a66a6fd222f339253755b67708cd)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A moment I won’t forget
body:
It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon’s report on my father.

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father.
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zptlr1670tfu1t41jhlmrs8s13rll02o4phakmvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjgecpb4cdh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perseverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8q5dpril9uka53lt376h4l96a6a0it4e25dnn58_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjgecpb4cdh2bs)
---
To get your copy of _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , you can give a gift of any amount here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-generous-gift-1](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgu5hgi0rlqtm2ptcg75dm4c9co4atcjak3t2j9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjgecpb4cdh2bs)

I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer!

Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. Request the bundle here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-large-gift-kit-1](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0q03f128vn1spv0ovq72vifa68kgi0f6o8uojuo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjgecpb4cdh2bs)
---

---

name: History Facts
subject: The Greek scholar afraid of beans
body:
Pythagoras, the namesake of the Pythagorean theorem, was a highly influential early Greek philosopher, and a major inspiration for the likes of Aristotle and Plato.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68doklu29fkwbh4j9y6lxmihlrql3ykggckztd5l5sbqfm5ffy0b50zgi8s9i1fwtwp3xvjb676upvzxdakiy2ew0qks74tzrza9c4q8m3y2oghcifgnoyf864v6uly3aog6m2szi7ok5uxbj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srxivq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
