| P ythagoras, the namesake of the Pythagorean theorem, was a highly influential early Greek philosopher, and a major inspiration for the likes of Aristotle and Plato. He was also a [notorious hater of beans](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srxivq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) — specifically fava beans, also known as broad beans — and he strictly forbade his followers, the Pythagoreans, from coming into contact with them. Legend has it that a group of Pythagoreans (or in some versions, Pythagoras himself) was running from an enemy when they came upon a blooming fava field. Rather than step foot into the stalks, they turned to face their attackers. Most of them were killed.
---
Pythagoras didn’t leave any known, verifiable writing behind, and his followers were famously tight-lipped, so it can be difficult to know exactly why he hated these legumes. But according to works published after his death by Aristotle and others, there were several possible reasons. One was the bean’s supposed similarity to genitalia; according to his biographers, the philosopher associated beans closely with reproduction and the human soul. The fourth-century BCE philosopher Heraclides Ponticus quoted Pythagoras as saying, “Eating beans and eating the head of one’s parents are the same thing.” And Aristotle quoted him as saying that fava plants “are like the gates of Hades,” possibly related to the belief that souls literally emerged from the underworld through bean blossoms. The philosopher reportedly found the flatulence they caused distracting, too.
To be fair to Pythagoras, there may have been a very good reason to eschew beans. Eating raw fava beans or coming close to a blooming fava plant can cause severe illness and even death in a small number of people with a specific genetic disorder called favism. Scientists traced a type of this condition to the Mediterranean, which would include ancient Greece and other societies that approached the fava bean with caution, including Rome and Egypt.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srxivq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srxivq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Fava beans are one of the oldest cultivated crops in the world.
Despite their sketchy reputation in the ancient Mediterranean, fava beans have been a staple crop for thousands of years. In what’s now northern Israel, researchers found some well-preserved (but slightly charred) domesticated fava beans and carbon-dated them to [more than 10,000 years ago](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srxivq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). That means that Neolithic people in the area may have farmed beans even before grains such as wheat and barley.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A moment I won’t forget
body:
It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon’s report on my father.

| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zsq2c4uvjld4e2184doeifcmevmg99lfmk6cnjmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjgeapj0clh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perserverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zq9clk22jtg300lb3k5fkf9lhle7gsqf0j6ul2po_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjgeapj0clh2bs)
---
To get your copy of _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , you can give a gift of any amount here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-generous-gift-1](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zegg1e87v053gfpka63n12p0juuh5fh1gd2p50co_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjgeapj0clh2bs)

I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer!

Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. Request the bundle here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-large-gift-kit-1](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zrttsrkufgejog60jd0dp52agj2g3poolpi97tjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjgeapj0clh2bs)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 2/19/2025
body:
‘Let there be a run on guns’: Senate Democrats advance semiauto gun ban to Colorado House
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
I'm excited to share that after quite a hiatus, a new episode of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl will be coming out this week! Stay tuned -- I will announce it here. Can't wait!
Also, if you haven't heard of the Leadership Program of the Rockies retreat... it's one of the best gatherings of freedom-fighters in Colorado. And it's happening THIS WEEKEND. We will have a table set up and would love for you to stop by and say hi if you're attending!
Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** Senate Bill 3, one of the strictest firearm bans in the nation, [advanced in the Colorado Senate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Senate Bill 5, which overhauls Colorado’s 81-year-old Labor Peace Act, passed the Senate and is headed to the House. Republicans warn it forces workers into unions against their will, shifting labor policy from [choice to coercion](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). The Colorado Senate also recognized the [contributions of nurses and EMS responders](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) yesterday.
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** State Senator Sonya Jaquez Lewis [resigned amid an ethics probe](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) over fabricated support letters. Grand Junction residents [demand transparency](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) on a planned resource center, while Danielle Jurinsky []()[seeks re-election](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to Aurora City Council, prioritizing public safety and business growth.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** Trump signed an executive order to [expand IVF access](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and lower costs, while EPA Chief Lee Zeldin uncovered a hidden [$20 billion climate fund](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from the Biden era, sparking a transparency investigation.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, February 19, 2025.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[‘Let there be a run on guns’: Senate Democrats advance semiauto gun ban to Colorado House](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
A debate Tuesday on the proper role of government and at what point constitutional liberty has been infringed, led by Senate Republicans, fell upon deaf ears.
Senate Bill 25-003, what some deem to be the most overreaching gun-control proposal in the country, was passed by a 19-15 vote of the Democrat-dominated Senate and now heads to the Colorado House. If it were to clear the House, the bill would land on Gov. Jared Polis’ desk.
The bill, if it were to be signed into law, would allow for future purchase, sell or transfer of only certain semiauto firearms on a Democrat-submitted list and would create a de-facto gun owner registry through other requirements, such as mandatory hunter’s and firearms education classes prior to purchase.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[SB 5, the undoing of the 81-year-old Labor Peace Act, is headed to Colorado House](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The bill, which eliminates Colorado’s unique two-election process for forming unions, passed the Senate along party lines and now heads to the House for debate.
* GOP lawmakers argue the bill prioritizes union interests over workers' rights, predicting increased labor costs, job losses, and harm to small businesses, especially in agriculture and hospitality.
* Bill sponsors contend that requiring two elections is an outdated, union-busting tactic, and eliminating it ensures a fairer path to collective bargaining.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[In Grand Junction, officials and community alike want to know more on future resource center site](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* City officials are negotiating to move the center to North Avenue, but business owners and residents feel left in the dark about the decision.
* While $2 million has been set aside for housing, concerns remain over additional renovation costs, grant availability, and the tight timeline before the current center closes in April.
* Despite prior promises to limit business impact, officials have yet to formally discuss the relocation in a public session, raising questions about the decision-making process.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Danielle Jurinsky will seek second, four-year term on Aurora City Council](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Aurora City Councilmember Danielle Jurinsky announced her bid for a second term, emphasizing public safety and support for small businesses.
* Jurinsky gained prominence for exposing gang activity in Aurora and has been a strong advocate for law enforcement, earning support from the Aurora Police Association.
* If re-elected, she plans to focus on reducing crime, cutting government overreach, and improving business conditions in Aurora.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Amid ethics investigation and alleged fabricated letter of support, Colorado Sen. Lewis resigns](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Colorado senator stepped down following an ethics investigation into allegations she fabricated letters of support in response to workplace misconduct complaints.
* Five former aides accused Jaquez Lewis of mistreating staff, leading to an inquiry that revealed at least one falsified letter and raised concerns about additional documents.
* Her resignation was effective immediately, and a vacancy committee will appoint her successor to serve the remainder of her term.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Hunter: I’ve got the ‘bug’ only the Denver Fly Fishing Show can cure](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | FEBRUARY 17** _The screaming and whirling of the drag as I set the hook into what I hoped would be a whopper rainbow was unforgettable. The trout surfaced and then nearly pulled me in the river, waders and all, and that was enough._ __
**[Local ranchers get wolf training from Delta County Livestock Association](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY LINDY BROWNING****| LOCAL | FEBRUARY 17** _There have been no reported wolf depredation of cattle or sheep in Delta County, so far, but Robbie LeValley, on behalf of the Delta Livestock Association, gave a Feb. 13 presentation to more than 130 ranchers in Hotchkiss, Colo., emphasizing how critical precise record keeping will be — should and must likely when the quiet ranching community is impacted by wolf depredation_ __

**[Wolf 2307-OR died as a result of another wolf, not a gunshot wound as some theorized](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY LINDY BROWNING****| STATE | FEBRUARY 17** _Despite allegations and innuendos from animal rights activists, wolf 2307-OR died as a result of a fight with another wolf, not a gunshot wound last September._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** Sacagawea, famous for guiding and interpreting for the Lewis and Clark expedition, embarked on the journey just two months after giving birth. She carried her **newborn son** throughout the dangerous trek, while her husband, also part of the expedition, was compensated with $500.33 and 320 acres of land.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “Let others lead small lives, but not you. Let others argue over small things, but not you. Let others cry over small hurts, but not you. Let others leave their future in someone else’s hands, but not you.” – Jim Rohn
|

Did a friend forward you this email?
[SUBSCRIBE FOR FREE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)

body:

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf402hk81i7qckeiormodvt8vj1f6j01u8g8pjs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjgeep30cth2bs)

|
---
Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvg3men85s1akjh4lq5ra069ebuoa2vo02ki0kug_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjgeep30cth2bs)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.
It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only _INCREASED_ since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand.
Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight.

Byron Donalds _****_

# Wednesday, February 19, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1946, nuclear laboratory technician and labor union [activist Karen Silkwood](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FurDAQQNGvsbtF9tgLuHDxGpqnTZMiJRrwAKMYjIy1LH8fbfr0V0e6X4_-gRx5mz9wJV9eU-pBwf2m4KZdH5Dj1VsZ_KCC05K8boxztXNWy8WHQZlGtzRaYw05GhtNikxNpCGEAJL9G1OgnYZ7e28qmnSLWE8KazDaOmEVBS4pV2WhQi88pnilJ-VqTKuMfillP4T5J6AT0J3nWQ2ZC24bj_hOBHQDpznjvlwCuv-Yabt9cvw-Uwoy-7CfHCMfdSOsmlfk-AuXP0-fHn4CAAD__3tBVr4) was born in Longview. Known for reporting concerns about the health and safety practices at the Kerr-McGee Cimarron Fuel Fabrication Site in Crescent, Oklahoma, Silkwood died under suspicious circumstances in 1974. In 1983, Meryl Streep portrayed her in an Academy Award-nominated film about her life. Southwest Airlines is laying off workers for the first time in company history. Check out [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGuozAQheGnMZ2RPRiICxfb0GXbLdGAx8Erg5E9Ccnbr7L9rY_06ej_c5_vGFM8Hr9xJ8fvkGdQ0EsFUtvZY0yf2TTeLcpb3ZDTY2ftYK3RzeaUvZnFKPRq8AGBOgzB2H7suoG6ZVBNdF9MgbYa-ls_thT0DXEICgfotLHCKPKRc2l5I6Y31pA--UWlXfPeJLcxn1V0vwRMAqbrutr1WNbvKGD62gImBQImPQqYan7ydlFlibGkeFCVnOX6ZKn7k8pKB8sc5JrLmQsyyb95qTIecs2VZcVXPB7yfNat3XhPTXH-vGJKsQ6jMOqxY0z_f_GPoV4O_gUAAP__jw1rSA) in today's _Roundup_ section. ## Southwest Cutting 15% of Corporate Jobs
Dallas-based Southwest Airlines announced plans to [lay off 15% of its corporate workforce](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOrCAYBeCnwQ4Dv4pSUExuYje3u3dLg_IzkkWYAI7jPv3G7bf-Tk5Ozsd9umvnXXj81Ruq8rZxAgYdZUC5nIx2_pzayqiZGckrVLxvpBRStrxa1bwMYkDkRiwMhLDczFZKM8zQLbIBrJy6yhhwyaEbur5GywethWVaQMNbSVqGxpWY6rJiwbfO1p_xhale4lZ5tZbyzKS5ERgJjMdx1FsOlxEYMdA9Exi3GPAkMK77pgNNmOOeFrwkx72sB-ZCtUveBczU69OFB43WUk77jtElpmdMuiA9YvrElKkLdIm50KxfVxStjakQGHWitxv_wn9__ldJmefhvHdZ9KRlj007_zO5_PrhS8F3AAAA__9R6Hai), about 1,750 employees, amid rising labor costs and pressure from investors to improve efficiency. CEO Bob Jordan characterized the company’s [first-ever layoffs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OhCAQx58GOwyMH0hBcY3dXnulGWVYSXDdONyyvv3F7a_9fya_n9t0w5ji4_6NG7n8DvsECjqpQGo7eYzpnNrKu1l5qyty2jTW9ta2ulpd55eho6XXs7YGB9MsAYLpldJgwNNQRXeNKdBWQzd0pqagB8Q-KOyh0a0VrSIf837UeaVMb-SQzv1FR73sW5XcmvOTRfMlYBQwllLqZeYHFb58AeOnImC8JAGjx5SQ5YxMXvL-m9dCnCXGI8UHsdyQWSY89xCueHU4_ywxpci9Ea26bxjT5zn_i-Ll4C8AAP__UYBiSQ) as “a very difficult and monumental shift.” It follows recent announcements that the carrier will begin assigning seats and adding redeye flights for some routes, changes that are part of what Jordan called “the largest and most comprehensive” transformation in company history. Employees affected by the layoffs will [continue receiving salary and benefits](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGuozAQheGnMZ2RPRiICxfb0GXbLdGAx8Erg5E9Ccnbr7L9rY_06ej_c5_vGFM8Hr9xJ8fvkGdQ0EsFUtvZY0yf2TTeLcpb3ZDTY2ftYK3RzeaUvZnFKPRq8AGBOgzB2H7suoG6ZVBNdF9MgbYa-ls_thT0DXEICgfotLHCKPKRc2l5I6Y31pA--UWlXfPeJLcxn1V0vwRMAqbrutr1WNbvKGD62gImBQImPQqYan7ydlFlibGkeFCVnOX6ZKn7k8pKB8sc5JrLmQsyyb95qTIecs2VZcVXPB7yfNat3XhPTXH-vGJKsQ6jMOqxY0z_f_GPoV4O_gUAAP__jw1rSA) until their official separation in April, though they won’t be expected to work.
## Abbott Orders Probe Over 'Transitioning' Claim
Gov. Greg Abbott ordered the Texas Education Agency to [investigate a claim](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0ULGO2zAU-xp7e4GlyMlp0JAl23Vt0SV4lp7shz5LgfUuufTrC_fm20gQJEH-fL-9IwuX-QeuFPQz15sd7AiDBeNvCVleN9enMA3Jm56COR-9P3nvTL8EH-OY0HvrMmE-ujwQGWdiTHY8Wz_1HPawwRpv7Pg2ng-UzRviKQ94skfjfOcGSqx1O-hCSp_Ysrzqg7ZDrGsvYVG9t-546ey1s9fn83lYW9m1zl6pwEfr7PVehZXjDufdWlYq-kUAp6mqArY_DZQQtAKXBzXlGZVgIhHkjWDheYEWl1oFct0ARWimJC9oNTKKvEA3LI2Va-EyQ9OP9FWDG1wu5q__3X71W0j3J4twO507N8wrsvxfot9e-wj2XwAAAP__d7OAxw) that teachers at a Houston high school have been “secretively transitioning” a student by referring to her by a name other than her legal one without parental consent. During last week’s Houston ISD board meeting, Moms for Liberty activist Denise Bell spoke on behalf of an unnamed mother who said teachers and administrators at Bellaire High School [refused to accommodate](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DHvpCAQBfBPo91sABWloLjG7n_tlWaUYSVBZgO47n77i9df__LLe-_Pz_KDIYb0_I0H2frxvCihBhAKpFkchvhd-tbZVTgjW7Jy7IzRxvSy3S2OI63otUctaSSNk9Zeaq98r2nr1zbYGxNKGqmGaRgf5OWEqL1ArTrZm6YX5ELl_Kg7Vfpg8fHLb8qPjY822r3WV2m6X42aGzVf1_UouJ05U6p3olFzoqs0an7yG3BduVbg7CgXqITwyrwSsIedz1I5Qdl25gieM2wY792AUOrpKFVYv7DtXChBwoMAk7uBxGcq0OlxGgbRtdm61xViDEWPTS-eB4b4r2z973tvq_4GAAD__2ledXE) her requests to use her daughter’s legal name. “This goes against our Christian faith, the advice of her therapist, and quite frankly, common sense,” Bell said. Abbott [shared a video](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z79u6yAUgPGngS0R5_D3DAxZfKfcqVK7WRDARsJ1ZNPUefsq3bt-w0_63q_jNdRWP6f_Ycm-H2UdUaA-CTwBjSnU9hwVTz6KRMCzByuJDJECPvuobXBKSpLCpIzGIsRCRUcDcCul8OpfmEAgQO20PecCLgRTRDAoQRFTIqfa1-3c59zzEfbSnusjb-fbuvDm597vO5MXhgPD4XhVhsO_LU-XGNfex7cPhsPeQ__aGQ7gSJB2Dq1WSM6QVnzz6f5dW6u7sUyJaQm1_er9z92Hx58AAAD__9SJVDE) of Bell’s testimony on social media, saying the incident highlighted the need for school choice legislation. “No school should be involved in ‘transitioning’ a child,” he said. “If this is not already illegal, it will be after this session.”
## Love Field Buys 'Turbine-in-a-Box' Pods
Dallas Love Field is the first airport in the world to purchase JetWind Power’s “turbine-in-a-box” pods to [harness jet exhaust](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtu8zAMhZ_G3hRIsmyHg4Z_yZZ_7WgwFhWzYOxAInJ5-8JF0a3bAc4FB9_HeTojC6_X_3ijqK-8Td763lhvHEwJWd5TaFO82ASupejGDmAACK5dIhDlfoZ5tJi740gB4WJ7CIPz865bjvuY9Q6c74_9eKDsjohDtjj4zgVogqXEupWDLqT0wprlvT2oHObt1kpcVO-16f41_tT4U0IRrPS6F6p1TzT-NLO-fy0j24NMZpJkFiwr1UrVfJKaJ6_J6GautFJBJUNCsxb-qbclpvuTRbgOYxPs9YYs3x_0TyiP6L8CAAD__-RPZro) and convert it into renewable energy. During an 18-month pilot program, the pods have charged 10,000 personal devices. The approximately 6-foot-tall pods are the [brainchild of Dr. T.O. Souryal](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1ug0AQhJ8GukP3x8EWV6Rx57Qp0ZlbzEZrzoIVmLePnNSpZorR6NP3dR2uiZiW-2d6YJTXVAarbau0VQaGnIjPwdc53nQGU2M0nQMIAN7Ucxyz6RECOudbuAVsberbDkJwWQfoXE3xfaatAWPbvu0anEyfUph0CtYZD5XXmEnK2siMgq-0TXyWHddmLI-a4yzy3Cr3UdlLZS_HcTRTefkFj-09qOzlXf9CCY7zUrjcT5UTc9oUlx3VRMhZjWXZcZVNfaOog5askHGUlUaSs15jfh7ETFvoKq_vj0T8SyD_Ktmj_QkAAP__UOFllg), an orthopedic surgeon who was the Dallas Mavericks team physician for 22 years. He says he got the idea during a flight 25 years ago when he observed how much debris his plane kicked up when it was taxiing. The current design can withstand the 50-60 mph winds generated by planes on the tarmac, but improvements are being made to position the pods at the end of runways to capture the jet blasts created during takeoffs. Airports worldwide—including DFW International Airport—have [expressed interest in purchasing the pods](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQhJ_GdIvsBUxcuEhDl-tOV6IlXoIjYyLj4OSe_lfS_-XMSKNP37_LeCEffLz9oZVtfs3biBI7kAjKjI58eI9t5ewknVEVW9U3xmhjWlUtVnKPpGenpNGKWlbNjFpqpK65ate0lbefM4nKKOxOXV_zrE5EepaksVGtEa1k5_OW6rxw5hftc3hvB6f6uq1VsEvOj100Z4GDwKGUUq97_GwCB47w3AUOOdHBQeAQuXzzwpCfafKRwUcgmLYX5IXyp407OAqBdgjbwTB7Dg7unKH46MDHvEHiyIWmwMCR0-0tcKAE57P6v9zl3ypZ9yg-BL_rXrTytpIPX9r8q77D4k8AAAD__8xKc70). The company also sees potential applications for its products in harnessing the wind generated by high-speed rail, helipads, and military bases.
| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00b2K4zAUBeCnkTsb_Vm2ChULJrBFlu22NDfWtS3QT1ZWMsnbDwqZbqY-R0d83H_n-QzOu7j9gYCmPNY0c8r7lvKW6dmC889ZNtZcqNWsQcMGobXSWrJmNxetes0F5T3V4yCZZVQzqXBhepCjpo0zdYxyphnvx37ocGUjgFopKC6Y1ERStK6k3JUdCz7gWP0z3TF3SwqNN3sp14OIX4SfCD-5eMejdCFZDOniPNZWjcTpVsJ8pFtekIjJhpxxgz0FJFzVKKB1t0DE9BdyiZi5qsIX8t1YIFzBbbE-R-sWKGgxgPPz70monn7VUiwYCxET4apECHh8u9qWHd-Uyud9ABfbCIeF_3MFNNnY64fz3h1qIJJu9a-Xuvx4hrvhnwEAAP__XGuIrw) **Recent Tech Boom Could Send "EarnPhone" Soaring** While the media obsesses over Trump's return, smart money is quietly positioning for what could be one of the biggest tech booms in history. On this day in 1946, nuclear laboratory technician and labor union was born in Longview. Known for reporting concerns about the health and safety practices at the Kerr-McGee Cimarron Fuel Fabrication Site in Crescent, Oklahoma, Silkwood died under suspicious circumstances in 1974. In 1983, Meryl Streep portrayed her in an Academy Award-nominated film about her life. Southwest Airlines is laying off workers for the first time in company history. Abilene 🌤️ 27/6° | Amarillo 🌥️ 23/-2° | Austin ⛅ 40/23° | Brownsville ☁️ 72/47° | Corpus Christi 🌧️ 63/38° | DFW ⛅ 31/16° | El Paso ⛅ 69/37° | Houston ⛅ 56/36° | Laredo ☁️ 61/39° | Lubbock 🌤️ 29/7° | Midland ☀️ 33/10° | San Antonio ⛅ 45/26° | Tyler ❄️ 36/22° | Waco ⛅ 35/20° | Southwest Cutting 15% of Corporate Jobs Dallas-based Southwest Airlines announced plans to , about 1,750 employees, amid rising labor costs and pressure from investors to improve efficiency. CEO Bob Jordan characterized the company’s as “a very difficult and monumental shift.” It follows recent announcements that the carrier will begin assigning seats and adding redeye flights for some routes, changes that are part of what Jordan called “the largest and most comprehensive” transformation in company history. Employees affected by the layoffs will until their official separation in April, though they won’t be expected to work. Abbott Orders Probe Over 'Transitioning' Claim Gov. Greg Abbott ordered the Texas Education Agency to that teachers at a Houston high school have been “secretively transitioning” a student by referring to her by a name other than her legal one without parental consent. During last week’s Houston ISD board meeting, Moms for Liberty activist Denise Bell spoke on behalf of an unnamed mother who said teachers and administrators at Bellaire High School her requests to use her daughter’s legal name. “This goes against our Christian faith, the advice of her therapist, and quite frankly, common sense,” Bell said. Abbott of Bell’s testimony on social media, saying the incident highlighted the need for school choice legislation. “No school should be involved in ‘transitioning’ a child,” he said. “If this is not already illegal, it will be after this session.” Love Field Buys 'Turbine-in-a-Box' Pods Dallas Love Field is the first airport in the world to purchase JetWind Power’s “turbine-in-a-box” pods to and convert it into renewable energy. During an 18-month pilot program, the pods have charged 10,000 personal devices. The approximately 6-foot-tall pods are the , an orthopedic surgeon who was the Dallas Mavericks team physician for 22 years. He says he got the idea during a flight 25 years ago when he observed how much debris his plane kicked up when it was taxiing. The current design can withstand the 50-60 mph winds generated by planes on the tarmac, but improvements are being made to position the pods at the end of runways to capture the jet blasts created during takeoffs. Airports worldwide—including DFW International Airport—have . The company also sees potential applications for its products in harnessing the wind generated by high-speed rail, helipads, and military bases. | Flying together with our sponsor Recent Tech Boom Could Send "EarnPhone" Soaring While the media obsesses over Trump's return, smart money is quietly positioning for what could be one of the biggest tech booms in history. name: Byron Donalds
subject: I went on Bill Maher’s show again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
I’m not afraid to fight for President Trump

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4rn9183o7bmo6sf7blsnc9b8qmeripuptngvp5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjge1o36cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdm4pects5kga1l49klvp3p68nk14fjgfun8r08g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjge1o36cph2bs)
|
---
Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1rtplrbeovb4s9bk8c5nufjfrhrk13tkq137qfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjge1o36cph2bs)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.
It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only _INCREASED_ since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand.
Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight.

|
---
[SUPPORT MY EFFORTS](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbmmg3il9oht9cn000mc38sjcpbc0ir543l1odbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjge1o36cph2bs)
|
---
Thank you and god bless,
Byron Donalds _****_

name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Calls Out Gov. Maura Healey for Mismanaging Massachusetts’ Escalating Energy Cost Crisis
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZBH-8CFI5cuVPRcnMtb2zo_m-8bD8BLdqBxZyWSrPhNmf9sRDZfkwpbEKxwJUcn7449acppEukApf0ccJWueaJMuINWmY832P83cCTKgJUlahg_QRqPIOj_Wa9RqHm4I8J-X3aDqMEztccdGe7-OQQ==&c=8ALZ3CPTpjtbj7CHcH6BSfK_iqPAF2PZdq1-YGKmmDOzRsxWpVw_Mg==&ch=_Wndf4woOO4T3L4IUUh5vEE2L-UlRHN4QbzPy5I9bNYA6LOjlhqnwQ==)
---
| MassGOP Calls Out Gov. Maura Healey for Mismanaging Massachusetts' Escalating Energy Cost Crisis
---
---
| Boston, MA - The MassGOP responded to news that Governor Maura Healey [sent a letter](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZBH-8CFI5cuVPRcnMtb2zo_m-8bD8BLdqBxZyWSrPhNmf9sRDZfkwpUIfSwaPraNxYwHcWhhNhPJbhfvUXfszc0miHtH8OB2NcpsbKYD95hfvccYPOps3EyYaqrH7G86Hkn1C9sJxeo785ze1pe3FmxLJrJ4ST_94SwnabJLjeV8Ib6fteuGm43DuQpBpvW-kv5CU855xu4W3T6uilN7pXJwDsArXV9DNdMXrVCXv6fjkGx63lQ7s_Jg_vvUIEpHixFqJVyJ7ThjEVbREyHvLU3NrX4b9phN&c=8ALZ3CPTpjtbj7CHcH6BSfK_iqPAF2PZdq1-YGKmmDOzRsxWpVw_Mg==&ch=_Wndf4woOO4T3L4IUUh5vEE2L-UlRHN4QbzPy5I9bNYA6LOjlhqnwQ==) to the state Department of Public Utilities urging her own commissioner to "act immediately to provide rate relief to customers in this heating season."
Consumers are bearing the burden of skyrocketing energy bills, a result of Gov. Healey's mismanagement of Massachusetts' energy crisis.
Historically, Massachusetts' energy grid was supported by an array of contributory sources, including coal- and gas-fired plants, natural gas pipelines, and nuclear centers. Together, this diverse energy portfolio kept Massachusetts residents warm during our notoriously cold winters for an affordable cost.
Unfortunately, just like every other product in the Commonwealth under Governor Maura Healey's administration, energy bills are soaring to new heights. [According](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZBH-8CFI5cuVPRcnMtb2zo_m-8bD8BLdqBxZyWSrPhNmf9sRDZfkwpUIfSwaPraNtKHSTRBY87UlWnOlfUOnbeCOHP3WCqj8SfFqIw7qiP_mU4d3prF_GnnZIaIykMcgi__Pyx-PUCDdNhnXQx40SH7Eh_h4NnNhdhmF-uLZxBOa-ukw3kFXVznpsmu4oIVpxJ-UR1gYozs=&c=8ALZ3CPTpjtbj7CHcH6BSfK_iqPAF2PZdq1-YGKmmDOzRsxWpVw_Mg==&ch=_Wndf4woOO4T3L4IUUh5vEE2L-UlRHN4QbzPy5I9bNYA6LOjlhqnwQ==) to the Massachusetts Fiscal Alliance, 88% of New England's energy is sourced from nuclear and natural gas. In 2019, the last remaining nuclear plant in Massachusetts [closed down](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZBH-8CFI5cuVPRcnMtb2zo_m-8bD8BLdqBxZyWSrPhNmf9sRDZfkwpUIfSwaPraNhEsRlbaNmBLK8hrxGzaRk23X8EQbJR-wo9gorMUaFkmpFzGoX7U5K5hIY7zHvPGiQvdbqLZ6u0rKjL9cTgo6e7wautcX6niUR1_O-NGTmjs0lTPoqrJLZSeYfHSA7zQ-nxZTsrNUszk5Up8lgv2cq7abxm7DGCZWkMR8pbeiD_giUoB7r3UP8AJwXEWgS1kyFAKjYC10jWzkOSsjF9GvUYbspfLAkRIlHabjVW1dfXobmBab0pe6zGcMXoa3TBSTp-DtziORbzj3aQauD7DTomlj4QtXyq8zWc7-o73B-sTblWFdyxzK0SwxCFlavCwrONCpPUbTgCz8gl4WuUGMBIMsPitWmApP7SjAlCnbxltQHiWjiP8oXzz3DAGwkS5fA3w-CuLN1WurRCHTRZbQu9YFUB9AivjH&c=8ALZ3CPTpjtbj7CHcH6BSfK_iqPAF2PZdq1-YGKmmDOzRsxWpVw_Mg==&ch=_Wndf4woOO4T3L4IUUh5vEE2L-UlRHN4QbzPy5I9bNYA6LOjlhqnwQ==) for good, taking away 14% of the grid's portfolio. Meanwhile, Gov. Healey has celebrated her blocking of new pipelines as attorney general.
If the current administration wants to move towards clean energy at all costs, it will fall on taxpayers to foot the mammoth bill.
Eversource's preparations for the transition to renewable energy have resulted in a 30% increase in gas delivery costs since last year, according to the company. Alternative renewable energy sources like geothermal have been [unprofitable](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZBH-8CFI5cuVPRcnMtb2zo_m-8bD8BLdqBxZyWSrPhNmf9sRDZfkwpUIfSwaPraNJEeSi9XhhE0X__Jm19cTq4TWrhSg5ZFeKh2uCMmPa0EhzxfDldbj163EX3_mlSBdz6qt_Rh27a75VW3Nm8_e_eecyLpaVyeZVSoDwmpnEFjTLY5NDVYYS5GAop6Hg_S3Sn4ZJhZM5PFIlmzrkUdzr36wdEvHPUuCF0DIteifJluhknCXA7a0HQ==&c=8ALZ3CPTpjtbj7CHcH6BSfK_iqPAF2PZdq1-YGKmmDOzRsxWpVw_Mg==&ch=_Wndf4woOO4T3L4IUUh5vEE2L-UlRHN4QbzPy5I9bNYA6LOjlhqnwQ==), as seen in National Grid's decision to end its pilot program in Lowell.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale commented on the rising heating costs this winter:
"Investing in clean energy at the exclusion of traditional energy sources exacerbates the problem of unaffordable energy bills. Governor Healey should instead prioritize the needs of the people rather special interests on Beacon Hill," Carnevale said.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
But we trust YOU with this.

|
---
| | |
Friend,

_**Hillary Clinton has come out swinging against DOGE. Are we surprised? **_

Hillary & her corrupt allies are TERRIFIED of what DOGE means for her family and political cronies. **[They're afraid that with Elon Musk on board, we'll actually start to see some real results... and that's the LAST thing they want!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkhff0shsq8j76ijk8junc8bei269jgm4fq12gf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjge9o76cth2bs "They're afraid that with Elon Musk on board, we'll actually start to see some real results... and that's the LAST thing they want!")**

That's why they've taken to the streets, waving their signs and chanting their slogans. They're trying to intimidate us into backing down. But this simply tells us that we are on the scent.

And that's where you come in.

House Republicans trust YOU, a tried and true patriot, to help us figure out how DOGE can be most impactful. **[Will you take a few minutes to complete our DOGE Survey in the next 24 HOURS?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcrm0ir4k3ueg55r2ueumes22nj1fdj382dtov9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjge9o76cth2bs "Will you take a few minutes to complete our DOGE Survey in the next 24 HOURS?")**

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
Reserve your DVD box set

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3334d6ac05404236ba95b937f4e038a8&_e=_FYsN7EA8qPd-wJU7vpz40FwX8jwEF99eR6YHKLcTS6lo2GMwJ7z8hhYUFmtdUhZ1MD0GSjYMxfqqqXji0OSOGtC4q6uocYrvteXX-4XKMETYnT-yBZ7gNp_ErzlTHNkRqTP7WbT15EFx-LwL3SPSSnExDnNBRBbD1raU0Bh8lSEwG_KyMb6TcE2U1-hDXwgTcWgsohmLYPWL0FD-sMIcB7qz1IZ_LV-RtaROiDUSiGUIKnhKrvpiPAYbdfcQFrPcv5yYzYusFnX5hlcA2a-Qylu971IiNFN7HJP4YbT_bwEz7qqighu4eMIqUN1ShNWU9KYMjtSs_S2Q4VuuIcjxNdSLsAZwQjmiYBEL8p7qsRSeMEscLDE7NF_Zjt_6vpfcx19g81OyGkJq7VWh-e3Yd6nzd2pSYN9a2gyz2LSxk3-_0VTXASeN-uQzUnN3LIs)
---
| | Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3334d6ac05404236ba95b937f4e038a8&_e=_FYsN7EA8qPd-wJU7vpz40FwX8jwEF99eR6YHKLcTS6lo2GMwJ7z8hhYUFmtdUhZ1MD0GSjYMxfqqqXji0OSOGtC4q6uocYrvteXX-4XKMETYnT-yBZ7gNp_ErzlTHNkRqTP7WbT15EFx-LwL3SPSSnExDnNBRBbD1raU0Bh8lSEwG_KyMb6TcE2U1-hDXwgTcWgsohmLYPWL0FD-sMIcB7qz1IZ_LV-RtaROiDUSiGUIKnhKrvpiPAYbdfcQFrPcv5yYzYusFnX5hlcA2a-Q2PHGt1gU8ft_VMWKEQR80i8MwSuQklyqvNsm8EqbENxOSF-_LuNqAbtH7XrKWQ65BAnEC4FI5xywvvMKMELQlmiiKEiKUAeEOPnQ77jNd1gqj_vnB1vsQdrfTs9YQQF9CWuBHviE5JdVxrNG_5s_bag4MtTDZMXGrDefPYdpAts)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3334d6ac05404236ba95b937f4e038a8&_e=_FYsN7EA8qPd-wJU7vpz40FwX8jwEF99eR6YHKLcTS6lo2GMwJ7z8hhYUFmtdUhZ1MD0GSjYMxfqqqXji0OSOGtC4q6uocYrvteXX-4XKMETYnT-yBZ7gNp_ErzlTHNkRqTP7WbT15EFx-LwL3SPSSnExDnNBRBbD1raU0Bh8lSEwG_KyMb6TcE2U1-hDXwgTcWgsohmLYPWL0FD-sMIcB7qz1IZ_LV-RtaROiDUSiGUIKnhKrvpiPAYbdfcQFrPcv5yYzYusFnX5hlcA2a-Q4Oq_RRBy2XU7PwrzJj7l6SHPCWgQ4hXYaHCirV1NE_XNGDcFF2C3oCpYEy5qvCKsoJneVZWWmUpl3mvRiiasAbbJaUT8EfnD7BAeTmIrQRHxC4akNlDSB0qUfMXDoLCYpzkfpS81w9y3Rajm__xmJNy2DEzMs3oDCCQ9wbTbD8B)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3334d6ac05404236ba95b937f4e038a8&_e=_FYsN7EA8qPd-wJU7vpz40FwX8jwEF99eR6YHKLcTS6lo2GMwJ7z8hhYUFmtdUhZ1MD0GSjYMxfqqqXji0OSOGtC4q6uocYrvteXX-4XKMETYnT-yBZ7gNp_ErzlTHNkRqTP7WbT15EFx-LwL3SPSSnExDnNBRBbD1raU0Bh8lSEwG_KyMb6TcE2U1-hDXwgTcWgsohmLYPWL0FD-sMIcB7qz1IZ_LV-RtaROiDUSiGUIKnhKrvpiPAYbdfcQFrPcv5yYzYusFnX5hlcA2a-QxhNpdSO_nuNEvcv-0ZFf41UI1bD0nAzFd-cQ-SEg6hM12_FsAawZb3zZOI7Txq3J88sIbv07v-DnFcIQnbQ5WjncHzLcCzB4OzzFu7HoQQi6rY5LXOxbCM9gQxgRB8g41_hs_PmZjQJXaKQWHXCPeIoyE5RlbicLsUDlrLf_fTo).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: Reserve your DVD box set A message from our sponsor... | | | | | Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | |

In the words of President Donald Trump:**“Speaker Mike Johnson is a good, hard working, religious man... He has my complete and total endorsement. MAGA!!!”** _I agree with President Trump 110%, and I can tell you this with absolute certainty: Speaker Johnson is the man we need in charge of Congress right now, fighting for our conservative agenda._ He’s working with President Trump to create an airtight agenda for Congress to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! The job of House Speaker has to be one of the hardest jobs in the world, but Speaker Johnson has handled this difficult job with grace and skill. _Speaker Johnson is 100% dedicated to being the tip of the spear for President Trump’s agenda in Congress._ **Fellow Republican, I know that we’re still only a few months separated from the last election, but on top of what he’s doing to put America First legislation on President Trump’s desk,****[**Speaker Johnson is already planning and preparing for the upcoming midterm elections!**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=4f06a15922aa4179aa6d2d90e77157ed&_e=hTTI0aoqwhP9_tfeX58XGE1RQ2AyNA0mRDIkHLY6t5LGPqH52uvIuiXvIXhz2oII_IdP8LSzcEPexQuS_zIo_MZobDd4c-C85iD5RAH9h7EO-YWZF2Ultr3EvhM76qv6v6t701UQx71vFL1mqy5qDbw1bJn06i17ONbNcc3eKSkfm14LBpIxMkosEnr23ma1WN2GDICpee7fZ9ID8IyeF90d8AzVEVBWs-6TpziSjqIk10o4xeX9bVPTzGzvqu0-7wC3ON6y8Th1JBjr1RRiR1SFmaziPaUWpZOjZ3Kt2hxEqq7bMhSn6KOS5j0ENGtWrHrX5J_hhvRSv4cqtXsAnORh9S7Y2iVuSzUQ99GXCzZdY404I9BskQGhxZ0s6iyvMJhTGWkOJ008sW1z6yNYRn1kVIQwMcuo92vB7BBAbi1jLsq4T6vtrvrjrH5_tZOY4-8Z7Hfskiqu1jPl8HCwsITk8zFwjaX6FpvoyGVpwAI%3D)** You see, the midterm elections will be one of the biggest political fights of 47’s presidential term. They will decide whether we have only two or four complete years of a GOP trifecta in control of the direction of our country. The Democrats aren’t taking any breaks – that’s why we need to start fundraising to protect and grow our majority **_RIGHT NOW._** **[**Can you spare a few dollars to help Speaker Mike Johnson ensure President Trump and I have an America First majority in Congress for the next 4 years?**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=4f06a15922aa4179aa6d2d90e77157ed&_e=hTTI0aoqwhP9_tfeX58XGE1RQ2AyNA0mRDIkHLY6t5LGPqH52uvIuiXvIXhz2oII_IdP8LSzcEPexQuS_zIo_MZobDd4c-C85iD5RAH9h7EO-YWZF2Ultr3EvhM76qv6v6t701UQx71vFL1mqy5qDbw1bJn06i17ONbNcc3eKSkfm14LBpIxMkosEnr23ma1WN2GDICpee7fZ9ID8IyeF90d8AzVEVBWs-6TpziSjqIk10o4xeX9bVPTzGzvqu0-7wC3ON6y8Th1JBjr1RRiR1SFmaziPaUWpZOjZ3Kt2hxEqq7bMhSn6KOS5j0ENGtWrHrX5J_hhvRSv4cqtXsAnJsh26-u9UubaS7PXhCROc3KgCITI7ptovXD0ukehKaG5d-ziIEU0prSpzTGxI-B_DGfVYLYEFFVaaj9lSQQidf3x9fHvMfXaFOQhH7OIy5dr-A0Y6vGLj1YtUOu100YADtzvQie5EoSL2lgCl0Ytqc%3D)** Fellow Republican, I would never ask you to do something that I wouldn’t do myself. Trump's Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller **[humiliated a CNN reporter during a heated live interview](https://substack.com/redirect/1dfb278e-1df0-4da0-aa81-f131febb86a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** where she challenged Miller on the legitimacy of Elon Musk's leadership of DOGE.
He completely outsmarted her...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/1dfb278e-1df0-4da0-aa81-f131febb86a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1dfb278e-1df0-4da0-aa81-f131febb86a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Who is in charge of DOGE?" CNN host Brianna Keilar asked Miller at the start of the interview.
"The President of the United States," Miller answered simply.
Keilar fired back, asking if Elon Musk "knows he is not in charge of DOGE?" playing a flashback clip of Musk appearing to take ownership as the leader of DOGE's actions.
"Again, the President runs the government , and then he appoints advisors, including Elon, including myself,..." Miller explained patiently. "This is how democracy works."
DOGE **[reports to have cut as much as $110 million in wasted funds](https://substack.com/redirect/120f4202-a6fb-4e8c-8126-abd6a734883f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from the federal government so far, and the department is just getting started.
**[Keilar pressed Miller further on 300 employees who reportedly fired](https://substack.com/redirect/1dfb278e-1df0-4da0-aa81-f131febb86a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from the National Nuclear Security Administration by DOGE, and were later rehired when they were deemed essential to national security.
Miller explained that this maneuver is par for the course when making large scale cuts. "I understand that even a temporary interruption in federal employment is a great crisis, a catastrophe for you and for CNN," Miller said, now visibly laughing.
Watch the tense live interview right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/1dfb278e-1df0-4da0-aa81-f131febb86a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Biz @ NDRC
subject: re: Elon Musk and his minions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Help defend the census from Trump, Musk, and MAGA extremists
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102377906/528990677/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5MGMxNmRkLWM5ZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gvhLU7vLWgy1htdE9Rs-xjAUbZ2Wn78EHjJbnHN6nwc=&emci=8f848318-4dee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=490c16dd-c9ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, You’ve seen the horrifying headlines: with Donald Trump’s blessing, Elon Musk and his minions have gained unprecedented access to our federal government. It’s clearly a disaster for our democracy, with an unelected billionaire seemingly being rewarded with broad authority over our government after spending over $290 million to elect Trump and other Republicans. And it’s also **an emergency for the census** — the foundation for drawing fair electoral maps and ensuring every part of the country gets the resources it needs. You see, in the last two weeks, massive Census Bureau data files _that are normally publicly available_ disappeared from the website. Some of those files have come back online, but this raises concerns about the integrity of this critical data now and going forward. As Trump and Musk try to reshape the federal government to fit their own agenda, we must protect census data from any political manipulation. **Our mapping and analytics team is working hard to compile records of past census data so we can closely watch for any changes, and we’re doing everything we can to defeat attacks on the census and our democracy wherever they arise. ** [**So please, pitch in what you can to the NDRC today to fight for an accurate census, promote fair maps around the country, and help stop the anti-democratic agenda of Trump, Musk, and MAGA extremists.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102377909/528990679/-1665762292?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ElonFRCensus_email_20250219-NDRC-Tier1-ElonFRCensusNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250219-NDRC-Tier1-ElonFRCensusNOR_&utm_campaign=ElonFRCensus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ5MGMxNmRkLWM5ZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gvhLU7vLWgy1htdE9Rs-xjAUbZ2Wn78EHjJbnHN6nwc=) The fair maps movement protected the 2020 Census from Trump in his first term, and we’ll be prepared no matter what his team throws at us this time around. **Together, we can make it clear: our census data and our democracy are not for sale — _not now, not ever._** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Help defend the census from Trump, Musk, and MAGA extremists | Peter, You’ve seen the horrifying headlines: with Donald Trump’s blessing, Elon Musk and his minions have gained unprecedented access to our federal government. It’s clearly a disaster for our democracy, with an unelected billionaire seemingly being rewarded with broad authority over our government after spending over $290 million to elect Trump and other Republicans. And it’s also an emergency for the census — the foundation for drawing fair electoral maps and ensuring every part of the country gets the resources it needs. You see, in the last two weeks, massive Census Bureau data files that are normally publicly available disappeared from the website. Some of those files have come back online, but this raises concerns about the integrity of this critical data now and going forward. As Trump and Musk try to reshape the federal government to fit their own agenda, we must protect census data from any political manipulation. Our mapping and analytics team is working hard to compile records of past census data so we can closely watch for any changes, and we’re doing everything we can to defeat attacks on the census and our democracy wherever they arise. = The fair maps movement protected the 2020 Census from Trump in his first term, and we’ll be prepared no matter what his team throws at us this time around. Together, we can make it clear: our census data and our democracy are not for sale — not now, not ever. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = —Biz John Bisognano President National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

body:
But every word is God's honest truth.

But every word is God's honest truth.
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z35simuljvo19u7dggu88ih3rotje57arhl6vb3o_)
---
Friend,
---
At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that _“our nation has suffered greatly,”_ but _“after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.”_
---
Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time.
---
_But today, sadly, I have to write to you for a far more somber reason._
---
I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth...
---
**While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is __not__ yet finished.**
---
**If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!**
---
And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus _state-level_ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a **“ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,”** **RAIDED** my home, **ARRESTED** me, took a **MUGSHOT** of me, and forced me into **BANKRUPTCY** , the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
**_...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter._**
---
Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m __still__ FIGHTING BACK.
---
When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757** ...
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ssgod5rmk19db98u7psp970rilhdtjek4cgr9o_)
__
---
And today, to show them that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom and justice.

name: Glenn Beck
subject: What could be more important than protecting our kids?
body:
This may be the hardest email I ever had to write to you.

|
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhas29iia2cmhtommnghlsaf2jqscgo9btlq2cug_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

This may be the hardest email I ever had to write to you. The graphic content that is being pushed on little kids is despicable.

Every year, children across our nation are exposed to book fairs laden with materials that compromise educational integrity and childhood innocence. The book fair events put on by Scholastic often feature and promote books containing adult content and inappropriate themes that are often not disclosed to parents or educators.

What you and I remember as a purveyor of innocent childhood fun is now promoting books with harmful and confusing gender-transitioning storylines and graphic sexualized content to kids as young as 5 years old!

I’ll be honest... I sometimes feel overwhelmed by the number of ways in which our kids are under attack.

That’s why I’m excited to partner with **SkyTree Book Fairs, the wholesome and age-appropriate alternative book fair experience**. SkyTree carries a wide range of titles, and they just started sending my book, _Chasing Embers_ , to middle schools across the country!

[SkyTree has received a record number of book fair requests, and they need our help to fulfill them. Will you join me in supporting them today? Donate $35, $50, $100, or more today to help SkyTree put wholesome stories that are rooted in truth into the hands of schoolchildren across America.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj50kgudke1r4trlf21p27f9nk578bmnbposbcn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)
[Donate](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmeg4omnfkm6e7ciq7v4fsq7dpkrukmdakp5vgco_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)
Across the country, parents, grandparents, teachers, and librarians are waking up to the reality that they can no longer trust that a children’s book is free from messaging about gender transitioning, explicit sexual content, or politically divisive themes.

That’s why they’re turning toward SkyTree.

**In 2024, SkyTree Book Fairs...**
* Hosted over 320 book fairs in 48 states
* Reviewed and added 300+ titles to our book fair collection
* Impacted over 86,000 students

Each book offered at a SkyTree fair has been carefully vetted to ensure it aligns with their mission to uphold wholesome values in our kids through literacy that is fun, engaging, and age-appropriate.

_The best part?_ SkyTree is a non-profit organization. They offer their wholesome book fair experience to schools free of charge and work to have the lowest possible book prices. This ensures that more kids can leave with a developmentally appropriate book!

Private _and_ public schools are seeking them out because teachers and librarians know that when they book a fair with SkyTree, they don’t have to worry about screening every book or parents keeping kids home during book fair week out of fear over what they might be exposed to.

[Donate today to help SkyTree Book Fairs nurture childhood innocence through wholesome, age-appropriate book fairs! Your gift will put uplifting stories into the hands of kids across America. Click to make your contribution toward SkyTree’s 2025 fundraising goal! >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z18bk2icvc1bafl08e83dsefd36b2logbckdbh48_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)
[Donate $10 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkknn2bcqumleuhkj3h1ipkoq10t0mab7ait8vjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zme4hsn82grb0lvjji412sdlfviu980v5huhdjpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znlvgmoci0fpjjrsl0j4o5jt6onh7kffrnk17pc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsv5e27n0cmoi5ppd6j5nl9q02tmsdgfo8av3iio_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvd579q5ubdh168u3ajqo9bv8gpmkacosi2srdsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb8h2nfj1be4c4b71uhqrpdj8i10u9s17oacrbf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmvotv2ovi3o8reng39luvf8tqf4a812oql3h45o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z48raf58ohvemku8961o9r3bf0orhiirkl3smvj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)
Thank you in advance for your support,

Glenn Beck

P.S. SkyTree’s fairs aren’t just wholesome. They’re a whole lot of fun! Check out these happy smiles as kids discover a love of reading at a SkyTree book fair.

[Donate Now >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z93mddpbkn8uj8j3ccg48edtrmpdkius2rrr1i68_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)

subject: I went on Bill Maher’s show again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
I’m not afraid to fight for President Trump

| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgvplk0ftljh38o1oqahvcboumpur167u46bhuv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)

|
---
Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdbqqkrrqt66aguvdmno4bhouqm24j0jev0017og_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie8or6cdh2bs)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.
It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only _INCREASED_ since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand.
Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight.

|

body:
National Survey on Ending Government Unions| | | ...the deep-state
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Today, I’m asking you to complete this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9246e317bc72430a99ad74ed68cfe20d&_e=RRUSXm731BQVj9WVUvMqJ6mCNAStx6wzOcBoqOMFh_h5errp6s5-nFoUmKkLM7OzfuxZ1vVBZqASHEAUgzp4HEsSdpzQwo3kZ0ewdiu9ahB9JeXoouLHiLQSfqFns9bH9E5mMc3xGrEsaayE_n3nOupCMxbGpE1fQeluWcUlqrt5sajNAAyTgLVtC07T4w48UJjRoE889uOl0-x_eXvQLRtZJOACPoVXmSZhxFv7-lkfRa-JHS8YJfWVhO8Aaj_Jju1N2jyP7sfrTkjsPSIvFMS2GSXLUMAloxiysNQ14F6aP6YGymR44fuHxZrHGEbrFAXyuI-PcMOM0Rkh_yDVVLpj6OC8f_AQvkfiCkTsVR31O9MomjuOstAzDHfI5D2VOIcvpezNGZlNmwDwr2sRFRWBvQsnBW3Knn9zS9FZugk%3D)**
---
| | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem.
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9246e317bc72430a99ad74ed68cfe20d&_e=RRUSXm731BQVj9WVUvMqJ6mCNAStx6wzOcBoqOMFh_h5errp6s5-nFoUmKkLM7OzfuxZ1vVBZqASHEAUgzp4HEsSdpzQwo3kZ0ewdiu9ahB9JeXoouLHiLQSfqFns9bH9E5mMc3xGrEsaayE_n3nOupCMxbGpE1fQeluWcUlqrt5sajNAAyTgLVtC07T4w48UJjRoE889uOl0-x_eXvQLRtZJOACPoVXmSZhxFv7-lkfRa-JHS8YJfWVhO8Aaj_Jju1N2jyP7sfrTkjsPSIvFP-vgUHWkB5h-7OBfkjZay8TEirsNNZhUX1crAr3Z_otWZKMhW45w9hsT735xGDwQ6M1ZobdcJ3XLpX-1lUX2BZy3YLyX63dcIVFnYuqljHvfmdZOwg6721iWikE2DiElwkJsMlkBZgwFRh5NMUGEzI%3D)
---
| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9246e317bc72430a99ad74ed68cfe20d&_e=RRUSXm731BQVj9WVUvMqJ6mCNAStx6wzOcBoqOMFh_h5errp6s5-nFoUmKkLM7OzfuxZ1vVBZqASHEAUgzp4HEsSdpzQwo3kZ0ewdiu9ahB9JeXoouLHiLQSfqFns9bH9E5mMc3xGrEsaayE_n3nOupCMxbGpE1fQeluWcUlqrt5sajNAAyTgLVtC07T4w48UJjRoE889uOl0-x_eXvQLRtZJOACPoVXmSZhxFv7-lkfRa-JHS8YJfWVhO8Aaj_Jju1N2jyP7sfrTkjsPSIvFGih_RMgd7yB9pLzaNWZncHBkFWOTJfBfGvDlG1SY7yZ2Y3_9ckO8PcNHbOcN0T6Iev9vJtw9Ut1sxbzSxiD1KbCk3w34k2_n5PoaAJQzKdGdrlX1mcsy6yQrZ-gq0ESGoqSZHTFculfhOqkVyn4BEU%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9246e317bc72430a99ad74ed68cfe20d&_e=RRUSXm731BQVj9WVUvMqJ6mCNAStx6wzOcBoqOMFh_h5errp6s5-nFoUmKkLM7OzfuxZ1vVBZqASHEAUgzp4HEsSdpzQwo3kZ0ewdiu9ahB9JeXoouLHiLQSfqFns9bH9E5mMc3xGrEsaayE_n3nOupCMxbGpE1fQeluWcUlqrt5sajNAAyTgLVtC07T4w48UJjRoE889uOl0-x_eXvQLRtZJOACPoVXmSZhxFv7-lkfRa-JHS8YJfWVhO8Aaj_Jju1N2jyP7sfrTkjsPSIvFBufu8Trv_tepSA9urJSJpRVEYWJu6-Djegmup67_pWQa0kHiIRfYrv3mmy2fzsxpyYuJjtmPE7to4B0GK1eMVKgGIlk01m-tcdEQaZWEaxXkn0Ywf15KpUvrZ74exGXVq5Pc4e3hGN-DCXWX459m8U%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. Here’s my diagnosis: The Democrats’ Trump Derangement Syndrome has mutated into something entirely new -- Musk Derangement Syndrome! Democrats spent millions dividing this Country with their vicious attacks against President Trump. When that failed, they found a new target in Elon Musk and his plan to slash government waste in Washington. Democrats have a bottomless bank account to spread their Musk Derangement Syndrome. If Elon Musk so much as sneezes, we have to spend entire hearings in Congress listening to Democrats launch into unhinged tirades. Make no mistake, this syndrome is contagious if we don’t act fast to stop its spread. - Thank you, Dr. Greg Murphy | | Paid for by friends to elect Dr. Greg Murphy to Congress Murphy for Congress P.O. name: Membership Notification

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Reactivate your membership now!

|
---
| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi387i1di4tkhv21r6d3oksgj62ecskcqscnj7b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjiecob4cjh2bs)
---

Friend,

We've tried to reach you multiple times, but we haven't heard back. As a result, your 2025 House GOP membership has officially expired.

Friend's Membership Status: **[EXPIRED.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkq88t9h452h0pjblkdifk357abmokv7hbpao5q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjiecob4cjh2bs "EXPIRED.")**

---
| | | [REACTIVATE MEMBERSHIP](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zigtkeov1tqpglolik20frpdlvt6tuavo07p5pb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjiecob4cjh2bs "Generic Button")
---

This means you'll no longer have access to exclusive insider updates from House Republican leaders and the chance to shape our party's agenda.

But we want you back on our team. **_We're offering you one more chance to renew your membership and continue fighting for our conservative values in 2025._**

---
| | | [REACTIVATE MEMBERSHIP](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zevas1dnlu6qp9fcsm5khd7vq5eq3on3plbok4e8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjiecob4cjh2bs "Generic Button")
