name: Rebecca Weber
subject: It’s not rocket-science
body:
| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eddb4721ac4f40b484f6ff121a079e94&_e=R8fq7pdgjAtMHjtudm404WBjgHAVeNCYYfkYATxNux5e-_nIUM-dYv-37zgRPXea7dyhpEetkhbFIfu-Ts6v0ZMhTYRfjU0BPpGCHCHRo2jzmfYrLJlAzeuLnHVQfZF68CwtK8etJ4B34opS7x3u955px5gUsXSzPjluo4HOdkiJQDEV-cg7v_SL4GVQwLeS_WJY3wUs-NZIuHyXw6ZmdeS6gYqaqVU9ivnEqTlII9R8UhiHARO6PjOOCY4RrVAlOyINuM1QObsIxLLqBLTtzKOxPU-hVBjJkI5K91V9suViKCCEJrHiBu6lCA7IA1pH6fuXfLu1E1f8KJePG0oVd9JSShTZnsy9lW5so74rX7g%3D)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eddb4721ac4f40b484f6ff121a079e94&_e=R8fq7pdgjAtMHjtudm404WBjgHAVeNCYYfkYATxNux5e-_nIUM-dYv-37zgRPXea7dyhpEetkhbFIfu-Ts6v0ZMhTYRfjU0BPpGCHCHRo2jzmfYrLJlAzeuLnHVQfZF68CwtK8etJ4B34opS7x3u955px5gUsXSzPjluo4HOdkiJQDEV-cg7v_SL4GVQwLeS_WJY3wUs-NZIuHyXw6ZmdXWuy7p0swIdyH92wyBV-G7YtMQuIKp9_Nv5cbX8Swsj5beC4edJbBOnjXAScd1UImjF6O2zMRJxT4nYV6Ya4qFpnoFDATNBtZYkXq8lEcuCc25QJrmge7o2j4W_xnkeoCr_E1duB2e8VI-84rfhCDI%3D)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eddb4721ac4f40b484f6ff121a079e94&_e=R8fq7pdgjAtMHjtudm404WBjgHAVeNCYYfkYATxNux5e-_nIUM-dYv-37zgRPXea7dyhpEetkhbFIfu-Ts6v0ZMhTYRfjU0BPpGCHCHRo2jzmfYrLJlAzeuLnHVQfZF68CwtK8etJ4B34opS7x3u955px5gUsXSzPjluo4HOdkiJQDEV-cg7v_SL4GVQwLeS_WJY3wUs-NZIuHyXw6ZmdXLRrKcg_lB_Dt2UOrC0kyFaf9BRtshUXn9fdSE5RFa8EkzNxS6ALWssAb3Q65Y9zG9Zi1c8PXDuG2U2AbbRfBvfhttpXdsx5_TPTob_vxxzzyzIRwPPgTToMf7Knq_sndOGS6B0LflH9lJCCHEELvI%3D)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eddb4721ac4f40b484f6ff121a079e94&_e=R8fq7pdgjAtMHjtudm404WBjgHAVeNCYYfkYATxNux7QSLg1mKJlyH3tBGcjX7KvX1N3ZdvwxyRDHj8rPhe5D89Z8n7IQIM5h3aiumeHb5MlYSR6sHO_dwayDnvkwNjRAOCYhAXCZI9pVMvq_M0GgM621lQcsvBtIkSsBWuaotCvLfXZktL-Ft2u08UyVVlMaoiS3xrcWjDCFsxQInaIT4pcU9H95a8WFQkc1ykGIB0%3D)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eddb4721ac4f40b484f6ff121a079e94&_e=R8fq7pdgjAtMHjtudm404WBjgHAVeNCYYfkYATxNux5e-_nIUM-dYv-37zgRPXea7dyhpEetkhbFIfu-Ts6v0ZMhTYRfjU0BPpGCHCHRo2jzmfYrLJlAzeuLnHVQfZF68CwtK8etJ4B34opS7x3u955px5gUsXSzPjluo4HOdkiJQDEV-cg7v_SL4GVQwLeS_WJY3wUs-NZIuHyXw6ZmdRi0umKl6Rdm-EirBLzmj8e9QbWW_PLAMeKXgoZAjdHxHUfBITKRJBTM_IhuDQLcj0F2-WgZrMclOPma07O5SthSVT7vdWWgwa5RK06yagVQno9fto-HH5GxEvZmO2z2K564YiuJo5eqUb_TI1M8uWw%3D)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eddb4721ac4f40b484f6ff121a079e94&_e=R8fq7pdgjAtMHjtudm404WBjgHAVeNCYYfkYATxNux5e-_nIUM-dYv-37zgRPXea7dyhpEetkhbFIfu-Ts6v0ZMhTYRfjU0BPpGCHCHRo2jzmfYrLJlAzeuLnHVQfZF68CwtK8etJ4B34opS7x3u955px5gUsXSzPjluo4HOdkiJQDEV-cg7v_SL4GVQwLeS_WJY3wUs-NZIuHyXw6Zmdf8LR-JNUKXWx7yTtq9MwBVSpb7EGuVtoa9XAzcicakZO23M4emsim4gI6H8LGNPqIizEHKerJDeLvYgNBB8DBaDXnYAD4aUuuzhVJl5rOUI5qC78kSCNCyvpEFxNnuslcvT2pVTofjw6QxAzMyCNOs%3D)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eddb4721ac4f40b484f6ff121a079e94&_e=R8fq7pdgjAtMHjtudm404WBjgHAVeNCYYfkYATxNux5e-_nIUM-dYv-37zgRPXea7dyhpEetkhbFIfu-Ts6v0ZMhTYRfjU0BPpGCHCHRo2jzmfYrLJlAzeuLnHVQfZF68CwtK8etJ4B34opS7x3u955px5gUsXSzPjluo4HOdkiJQDEV-cg7v_SL4GVQwLeS_WJY3wUs-NZIuHyXw6ZmdYk_dQHFyRtopQ0z-Y3d60Myr6KIwM1iJtKptaTsMqScZoFqhHQqwOLRVp-MP0PYjaMzNdx0tb541nDHNInEL_-LRh3V5c6ag-CfDg0D1jcJcmh4dWhzidVz6zy68Oe6RqcobOuM2y8xdFPjXEnFXGk%3D), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eddb4721ac4f40b484f6ff121a079e94&_e=R8fq7pdgjAtMHjtudm404WBjgHAVeNCYYfkYATxNux5e-_nIUM-dYv-37zgRPXea7dyhpEetkhbFIfu-Ts6v0ZMhTYRfjU0BPpGCHCHRo2jzmfYrLJlAzeuLnHVQfZF68CwtK8etJ4B34opS7x3u955px5gUsXSzPjluo4HOdkiJQDEV-cg7v_SL4GVQwLeS_WJY3wUs-NZIuHyXw6ZmdYxe4oEohuFNJ_96lOzJZMik7DI8YhSrP-VqtKGTXznVDz-elYnj5J1_e8H3lVFJC8Pj4Z5gGdmcd4PgQukJXYyCO_QcCjxXffsqc2M5VltHJt6_SuivhPGAprVQbDMj9vRf8Nq4_YdW7OQtWzooZio%3D)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eddb4721ac4f40b484f6ff121a079e94&_e=R8fq7pdgjAtMHjtudm404WBjgHAVeNCYYfkYATxNux5e-_nIUM-dYv-37zgRPXea7dyhpEetkhbFIfu-Ts6v0ZMhTYRfjU0BPpGCHCHRo2jzmfYrLJlAzeuLnHVQfZF68CwtK8etJ4B34opS7x3u955px5gUsXSzPjluo4HOdkiJQDEV-cg7v_SL4GVQwLeS_WJY3wUs-NZIuHyXw6ZmdcB_7l-wD4Bu7BJXAcExIKM8pSJ27yCnQsVt1BqRMjDM6c6U0IlXyAyKVsQvWlJUO1NgiyFMIolYOghBN9ai59Pnk8jsKZud7u2P8yu9u0wv99zn-d0kAVvaV0gsDkHQNMpwpnU-edZ_JDsBxx1bqLM%3D)

---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eddb4721ac4f40b484f6ff121a079e94&_e=R8fq7pdgjAtMHjtudm404WBjgHAVeNCYYfkYATxNux5e-_nIUM-dYv-37zgRPXea7dyhpEetkhbFIfu-Ts6v0ZMhTYRfjU0BPpGCHCHRo2jzmfYrLJlAzeuLnHVQfZF68CwtK8etJ4B34opS7x3u955px5gUsXSzPjluo4HOdkiJQDEV-cg7v_SL4GVQwLeS_WJY3wUs-NZIuHyXw6ZmdcC9em-Nq-XsEitfO3FFq3MO-cR0Bb9FgacDvnAExrRIJ3ZRYQ8rpKjiwIv8NTib-qUGVjiGJyT4kdyNql3WOHFhijJ0nFwahq29SWnl3ZyUOVdSi8ue4u3qtbHDew-ZiTbzp7FhA_0OU-AyRZ9l_vQ%3D)
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eddb4721ac4f40b484f6ff121a079e94&_e=R8fq7pdgjAtMHjtudm404WBjgHAVeNCYYfkYATxNux5e-_nIUM-dYv-37zgRPXea7dyhpEetkhbFIfu-Ts6v0ZMhTYRfjU0BPpGCHCHRo2jzmfYrLJlAzeuLnHVQfZF68CwtK8etJ4B34opS7x3u955px5gUsXSzPjluo4HOdkiJQDEV-cg7v_SL4GVQwLeS_WJY3wUs-NZIuHyXw6ZmdcVAkVAAJZB6zFJxXTFuzdIi6oyKLWgTTyOJo2lGHRx91yeBekQRkFDj6WDdKPRmgRrH38RNHN2CY2yKqPbFgek5Fpgd88yVoWH5tkU3qH4FuHxCbzdVAm4EeOylYrXvq9qUtY_E1gSyqWc4t5Y4GgE%3D)
---
| | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eddb4721ac4f40b484f6ff121a079e94&_e=R8fq7pdgjAtMHjtudm404WBjgHAVeNCYYfkYATxNux7QSLg1mKJlyH3tBGcjX7KvX1N3ZdvwxyRDHj8rPhe5D6qs4Cs13kHCWSAMERtDYzEtUXJTuOUBqgC-7WAIVD4E0joTyj-o_YUUtVmiOHhahZFvcSl_tSpN21dZ4hvN0YDEcXrIAbt_bR1kGDx56DU8ElsK2IY3OLOQULfBnGchjpIBSqaLafyq7Qt_rnU5Hsc%3D) **[So please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution right away.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eddb4721ac4f40b484f6ff121a079e94&_e=R8fq7pdgjAtMHjtudm404WBjgHAVeNCYYfkYATxNux5e-_nIUM-dYv-37zgRPXea7dyhpEetkhbFIfu-Ts6v0ZMhTYRfjU0BPpGCHCHRo2jzmfYrLJlAzeuLnHVQfZF68CwtK8etJ4B34opS7x3u955px5gUsXSzPjluo4HOdkiJQDEV-cg7v_SL4GVQwLeS_WJY3wUs-NZIuHyXw6ZmdRVCyGaE1xLkZpc9mwLMdxJtoAQwtgayks-qN0eK1Fj1g__JpHowxJMZuNLIzMymj2wPxkk3tiduivzSrQtc0gmY7-DRMyIqs-uInxvigC8sj6XXjxF5WIGtRapXs0V0fKqdW5dDdL6zTQYGHIuuaIQ%3D)** P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote.
---

clean_body: | | | | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | “A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. name: Glenn Beck
subject: What could be more important than protecting our kids?
body:
This may be the hardest email I ever had to write to you.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsoa43fmdehkdfr4scjbs3tc5rg2deff49d5jlho_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie2pj6c1h2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

This may be the hardest email I ever had to write to you. The graphic content that is being pushed on little kids is despicable.

Every year, children across our nation are exposed to book fairs laden with materials that compromise educational integrity and childhood innocence. The book fair events put on by Scholastic often feature and promote books containing adult content and inappropriate themes that are often not disclosed to parents or educators.

What you and I remember as a purveyor of innocent childhood fun is now promoting books with harmful and confusing gender-transitioning storylines and graphic sexualized content to kids as young as 5 years old!

I’ll be honest... I sometimes feel overwhelmed by the number of ways in which our kids are under attack.

That’s why I’m excited to partner with **SkyTree Book Fairs, the wholesome and age-appropriate alternative book fair experience**. SkyTree carries a wide range of titles, and they just started sending my book, _Chasing Embers_ , to middle schools across the country!

[SkyTree has received a record number of book fair requests, and they need our help to fulfill them. Will you join me in supporting them today? Donate $35, $50, $100, or more today to help SkyTree put wholesome stories that are rooted in truth into the hands of schoolchildren across America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zphpj1gou17ebuu6f72lce7se1d18fah7br2huco_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie2pj6c1h2bs)
[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znmtf55r7avnb9k81vughgdjf4a5eul5s1gq118g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie2pj6c1h2bs)
Across the country, parents, grandparents, teachers, and librarians are waking up to the reality that they can no longer trust that a children’s book is free from messaging about gender transitioning, explicit sexual content, or politically divisive themes.

That’s why they’re turning toward SkyTree.

**In 2024, SkyTree Book Fairs...**
* Hosted over 320 book fairs in 48 states
* Reviewed and added 300+ titles to our book fair collection
* Impacted over 86,000 students

Each book offered at a SkyTree fair has been carefully vetted to ensure it aligns with their mission to uphold wholesome values in our kids through literacy that is fun, engaging, and age-appropriate.

_The best part?_ SkyTree is a non-profit organization. They offer their wholesome book fair experience to schools free of charge and work to have the lowest possible book prices. This ensures that more kids can leave with a developmentally appropriate book!

Private _and_ public schools are seeking them out because teachers and librarians know that when they book a fair with SkyTree, they don’t have to worry about screening every book or parents keeping kids home during book fair week out of fear over what they might be exposed to.

[Donate today to help SkyTree Book Fairs nurture childhood innocence through wholesome, age-appropriate book fairs! Your gift will put uplifting stories into the hands of kids across America. Click to make your contribution toward SkyTree’s 2025 fundraising goal! >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg7spu09jmba5odvd9ua41fr6k4sk8a9pv0b7i20_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie2pj6c1h2bs)
[Donate $10 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb7g3vom4uo7uqo0mvmbj0vq9mtof4lk8viqvdk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie2pj6c1h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ginugd4ljo8iilbfcscfatmaoscvf3iuqihmp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie2pj6c1h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq47b73s0l8lueselsc16nct42uhns1dk8hop6e0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie2pj6c1h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5olbubls4dpag9m5973ik6l5sha4a4cm296v9sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie2pj6c1h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf9c9atplqd775u1d13e2ec6up99hke8b12k2le8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie2pj6c1h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zikqei8vi9nu0p9gmqhd7pupicspg34b2c2r2es0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie2pj6c1h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfb77bb8jov8sd7sb0ghc55q0oa4ldbgqsjhrv00_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie2pj6c1h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsp8oe24leo3iabamcqm985868s8ppp1u1rtl660_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie2pj6c1h2bs)
Thank you in advance for your support,

Glenn Beck

P.S. SkyTree’s fairs aren’t just wholesome. They’re a whole lot of fun! Check out these happy smiles as kids discover a love of reading at a SkyTree book fair.

[Donate Now >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi2ouipf5qti5bfokjkdob2rmi7aomv1nbnc43l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie2pj6c1h2bs)

clean_body: This may be the hardest email I ever had to write to you. | | | "SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, This may be the hardest email I ever had to write to you. The graphic content that is being pushed on little kids is despicable. Every year, children across our nation are exposed to book fairs laden with materials that compromise educational integrity and childhood innocence. The book fair events put on by Scholastic often feature and promote books containing adult content and inappropriate themes that are often not disclosed to parents or educators. What you and I remember as a purveyor of innocent childhood fun is now promoting books with harmful and confusing gender-transitioning storylines and graphic sexualized content to kids as young as 5 years old! I’ll be honest... I sometimes feel overwhelmed by the number of ways in which our kids are under attack. That’s why I’m excited to partner with SkyTree Book Fairs, the wholesome and age-appropriate alternative book fair experience. SkyTree carries a wide range of titles, and they just started sending my book, Chasing Embers , to middle schools across the country! Across the country, parents, grandparents, teachers, and librarians are waking up to the reality that they can no longer trust that a children’s book is free from messaging about gender transitioning, explicit sexual content, or politically divisive themes. That’s why they’re turning toward SkyTree. In 2024, SkyTree Book Fairs... Hosted over 320 book fairs in 48 states Reviewed and added 300+ titles to our book fair collection Impacted over 86,000 students Each book offered at a SkyTree fair has been carefully vetted to ensure it aligns with their mission to uphold wholesome values in our kids through literacy that is fun, engaging, and age-appropriate. The best part? SkyTree is a non-profit organization. They offer their wholesome book fair experience to schools free of charge and work to have the lowest possible book prices. This ensures that more kids can leave with a developmentally appropriate book! Private and public schools are seeking them out because teachers and librarians know that when they book a fair with SkyTree, they don’t have to worry about screening every book or parents keeping kids home during book fair week out of fear over what they might be exposed to. Thank you in advance for your support, Glenn Beck P.S. SkyTree’s fairs aren’t just wholesome. They’re a whole lot of fun! Check out these happy smiles as kids discover a love of reading at a SkyTree book fair. Donate today to provide this fun, educational, and character-building experience to private AND public school students! Click below to donate now.** American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Photo by [Joshua Sukoff](https://substack.com/redirect/a89e5b29-cc27-44ed-96fe-bd5e84559c37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/414a1d75-e65c-4e6f-ac47-97487d5fefd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The concept of limited government, a cornerstone of classical liberalism and American political philosophy, holds that governmental power should be restricted to specific, enumerated functions--leaving most societal affairs to individuals and private entities. This inherently translates to a smaller government, both in scope and size, as it reduces the number of agencies, regulations, and expenditures needed to oversee citizens' lives. A limited government prioritizes essential roles like national defense and law enforcement while minimizing interference in personal and economic freedoms. The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), launched by President Donald Trump in January 2025 and led by Elon Musk, embodies this vision, aiming to shrink the federal bureaucracy and align it with the principles of limited government.
**Why Limited Government Equals Smaller Government**
Limited government, as championed by thinkers like John Locke and enshrined in the U.S. Constitution, restricts state authority through checks and balances--separating powers horizontally among branches and vertically via federalism. James Madison argued in _Federalist No. 51_ that this structure prevents overreach, ensuring government remains a servant, not a master. A smaller government naturally follows: fewer responsibilities mean fewer bureaucrats, departments, and budgets. For instance, if the state avoids micromanaging healthcare or education, it doesn't need sprawling agencies like the Department of Education, which employs thousands and spends billions annually. Historical efforts, like Ronald Reagan's Grace Commission, underscored this by targeting waste to shrink government's footprint, reflecting the belief that efficiency and liberty go hand-in-hand.
Today, the federal government oversees over 400 agencies, with a 2024 budget exceeding $6 trillion--far beyond the limited scope envisioned by the Founders. Critics argue this expansion fuels inefficiency, with overlapping programs and unchecked spending driving a $34 trillion national debt. Limited government advocates assert that paring back to core functions--security, justice, and basic infrastructure--slashes this bloat, delivering a leaner, more accountable system that respects individual rights.
**The DOGE Team 's Role**
Enter DOGE, an advisory body created via executive order on January 20, 2025, tasked with "dismantling bureaucracy, slashing regulations, and cutting wasteful expenditures." Led by Musk, a cost-cutting visionary and advocate for dismantling agencies like the Department of Education, DOGE aims to reduce federal spending by at least $2 trillion and shrink the government to under 100 agencies by July 4, 2026. Unlike traditional departments, DOGE operates outside the bureaucracy, offering recommendations to the White House and leveraging executive authority to modernize systems and trim fat.
Posts on X suggest DOGE's team, now nearing 100 members, has already identified fraud in agencies like FEMA and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), targeting them for reform or elimination. By embedding "DOGE teams" within agencies--each with engineers and specialists--the initiative ensures data-driven cuts, such as a proposed 1:4 hiring ratio (one hire per four departures). This attrition-based approach, paired with plans to ax duplicative programs, aligns with limited government's ethos: do less, but do it better. While Congress must approve major budget shifts, DOGE's focus on executive-led efficiencies--like scrapping outdated regulations--directly shrinks government's operational size.
**Conclusion**
Limited government means smaller government because it confines the state to essential duties, reducing its personnel, cost, and reach. As of February 19, 2025, DOGE is turning this philosophy into action, streamlining a sprawling federal apparatus into a leaner entity. If successful, it could redefine governance, proving less truly can be more.

By embedding "DOGE teams" within agencies--each with engineers and specialists--the initiative ensures data-driven cuts, such as a proposed 1:4 hiring ratio (one hire per four departures). This attrition-based approach, paired with plans to ax duplicative programs, aligns with limited government's ethos: do less, but do it better. While Congress must approve major budget shifts, DOGE's focus on executive-led efficiencies--like scrapping outdated regulations--directly shrinks government's operational size. Conclusion Limited government means smaller government because it confines the state to essential duties, reducing its personnel, cost, and reach. As of February 19, 2025, DOGE is turning this philosophy into action, streamlining a sprawling federal apparatus into a leaner entity. If successful, it could redefine governance, proving less truly can be more. Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Dana Criswell Mississippi ? ?

clean_body: Last chance to have your responses read by President Trump. | | | | Friend, this is your Vice President JD Vance. I won’t take much of your time, however I need your help. President Trump asked me to reach out to our most loyal supporters after his administration was sued by several states for the historic TRUMP EXECUTIVE ORDERS signed on day one. I promise this will take less than 5 minutes of your time. We can’t let them get away with tarnishing the name of our incredible President. We need your help to stop them. Thank you and may God bless you, JD Vance Vice President of the United States | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Support efforts to create a permanent Office of Gun Violence Prevention
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We were proud to stand by Congressman Maxwell Frost and Senator Chris Murphy last week as they introduced a bill to create a permanent federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.
#

Friends,
We were proud to stand by Congressman Maxwell Frost and Senator Chris Murphy last week as they introduced a bill to create a permanent federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.
[**Do you support permanently reinstating the Office of Gun Violence Prevention? If so, we’re asking you to add your name to our petition today→**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ogvp_pet_feb/?source=em250219-1-b&refcode2=10011.3935704.Zt-zkM&akid=10011%2E3935704%2EZt-zkM)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ogvp_pet_feb/?source=em250219-1-b&refcode2=10011.3935704.Zt-zkM&akid=10011%2E3935704%2EZt-zkM)**
The Office of Gun Violence Prevention was established by the Biden-Harris administration in 2022. It was a first-of-its-kind federal government effort to coordinate with states and federal officials to stop violence, invest in community intervention programs, respond to shootings, and support survivors.
After Donald Trump took office, one of the first pages to disappear from the White House’s website was the one for the Office of Gun Violence Prevention.
The fact that Donald Trump decided to shutter this office is yet another disgraceful example of how his allegiance to the gun lobby takes precedence over keeping our country safe from preventable gun violence.
[**We’re grateful to have leaders like Congressman Frost and Senator Murphy who make gun safety one of their top legislative priorities. If you’re ready to join us in supporting their work to establish a permanent Office of Gun Violence, please add your name to our petition.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ogvp_pet_feb/?source=em250219-1-b&refcode2=10011.3935704.Zt-zkM&akid=10011%2E3935704%2EZt-zkM)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ogvp_pet_feb/?source=em250219-1-b&refcode2=10011.3935704.Zt-zkM&akid=10011%2E3935704%2EZt-zkM)**
Thank you so much for using your voice today,
Team GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=10011%2E3935704%2EZt-zkM) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

After Donald Trump took office, one of the first pages to disappear from the White House’s website was the one for the Office of Gun Violence Prevention. Join us every month as we drop a new Presentation that has been carefully translated into Spanish in order to preserve the
powerful truths and life-changing lessons that have been crafted and curated for moms of all ages, cultures, and circumstances.
Gather together as a community to learn about this amazing country we all call home as we strive to better our lives, homes, and
communities one Mom at a time.

Then, on December 31st, roll in the New Year with us as we release not only the completed Spanish resource guide, in both digital
and hard copy, but also the grand reveal of Edition 2 of our English Cottage Meeting Resource Guide, featuring all-new cover art.
A store code will be made available for everyone who joins the Advent Countdown, letting you download a free digital copy or
receive 20% off a printed hardcopy.

Click on the link to join the Advent Countdown. January and February are already available, and a new presentation will be made
available on the first of each month.

clean_body: 2025 is the Year of the Cottage Meeting and we're rolling it out in a big way with our twelve-month countdown of he official release of Moms for America en Español! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] Moms for America en Español Advent Countdown Two Down, Ten to Go! After a bit of technical difficulty, Moms for America is proud to make available our Advent Countdown to the grand release of our Moms for America Cottage Meeting Resource Guide – in Spanish! [] [] Join us every month as we drop a new Presentation that has been carefully translated into Spanish in order to preserve the powerful truths and life-changing lessons that have been crafted and curated for moms of all ages, cultures, and circumstances. Gather together as a community to learn about this amazing country we all call home as we strive to better our lives, homes, and communities one Mom at a time. Then, on December 31st, roll in the New Year with us as we release not only the completed Spanish resource guide, in both digital and hard copy, but also the grand reveal of Edition 2 of our English Cottage Meeting Resource Guide, featuring all-new cover art. A store code will be made available for everyone who joins the Advent Countdown, letting you download a free digital copy or receive 20% off a printed hardcopy. Click on the link to join the Advent Countdown. January and February are already available, and a new presentation will be made available on the first of each month. View the Spanish Advent Countdown [] (Please share this with your Spanish speaking friends.) Join us today as we share the joy and love we have for America with our Spanish speaking moms all across the country. Because there is hope for America, and that hope is you! LIKE WHAT WE DO? name: Glenn Beck
subject: What could be more important than protecting our kids?
body:
This may be the hardest email I ever had to write to you.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z33g5fkqv7g5qo6hu1iunr0renhagd16b3307cio_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

This may be the hardest email I ever had to write to you. The graphic content that is being pushed on little kids is despicable.

Every year, children across our nation are exposed to book fairs laden with materials that compromise educational integrity and childhood innocence. The book fair events put on by Scholastic often feature and promote books containing adult content and inappropriate themes that are often not disclosed to parents or educators.

What you and I remember as a purveyor of innocent childhood fun is now promoting books with harmful and confusing gender-transitioning storylines and graphic sexualized content to kids as young as 5 years old!

I’ll be honest... I sometimes feel overwhelmed by the number of ways in which our kids are under attack.

That’s why I’m excited to partner with **SkyTree Book Fairs, the wholesome and age-appropriate alternative book fair experience**. SkyTree carries a wide range of titles, and they just started sending my book, _Chasing Embers_ , to middle schools across the country!

[SkyTree has received a record number of book fair requests, and they need our help to fulfill them. Will you join me in supporting them today? Donate $35, $50, $100, or more today to help SkyTree put wholesome stories that are rooted in truth into the hands of schoolchildren across America.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze21a3a31v399qbi7ki5818qrvc0cd8smt2qlplg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs)
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn9f14r2dvbteaeuvnbpop5gsll8jsiau0j20mto_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs)
Across the country, parents, grandparents, teachers, and librarians are waking up to the reality that they can no longer trust that a children’s book is free from messaging about gender transitioning, explicit sexual content, or politically divisive themes.

That’s why they’re turning toward SkyTree.

**In 2024, SkyTree Book Fairs...**
* Hosted over 320 book fairs in 48 states
* Reviewed and added 300+ titles to our book fair collection
* Impacted over 86,000 students

Each book offered at a SkyTree fair has been carefully vetted to ensure it aligns with their mission to uphold wholesome values in our kids through literacy that is fun, engaging, and age-appropriate.

_The best part?_ SkyTree is a non-profit organization. They offer their wholesome book fair experience to schools free of charge and work to have the lowest possible book prices. This ensures that more kids can leave with a developmentally appropriate book!

Private _and_ public schools are seeking them out because teachers and librarians know that when they book a fair with SkyTree, they don’t have to worry about screening every book or parents keeping kids home during book fair week out of fear over what they might be exposed to.

[Donate today to help SkyTree Book Fairs nurture childhood innocence through wholesome, age-appropriate book fairs! Your gift will put uplifting stories into the hands of kids across America. Click to make your contribution toward SkyTree’s 2025 fundraising goal! >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zns8hgfvhjpjsmk5thfmr2c72tiua08n7je9nun8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs)
[Donate $10 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjpm1fh5ooppoo87nm79j6t8gj05o3qr1s84vmp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziddand00ij1psbplcqsfo1sq15i2ea3ehf63q20_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi0dh6138vmkhu9o9891vs42bhjk98m8u0a6brlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgckh986g8ehpu7707qv4mceidd8dodii319to28_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbrm956k4j6rhctejn5kl9i1326rsubia2lonhv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zur45pm9bjhp9cjpfb0f75nioq5iv5hb4f8nvs2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znl4e21rhmotufe5rl9dqt1ino2hka8rihuk3v2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zssnu7lq5c9n5p8o3preb82sste71hl3iq0h02a0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs)
Thank you in advance for your support,

Glenn Beck

P.S. SkyTree’s fairs aren’t just wholesome. They’re a whole lot of fun! Check out these happy smiles as kids discover a love of reading at a SkyTree book fair.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlu6o3mobh2m262jmdcne0dlk9vqt1nspobkm1n0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs) **Donate today to provide this fun, educational, and character-building experience to private _AND_ public school students! Click below to donate now.**
[Donate Now >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlicmng3ph1986m6r2godr4dra5k52d6nq8i9cag_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjieeo36c9h2bs)

name: Glenn Beck
subject: What could be more important than protecting our kids?
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kEFz8iAQhn8N3MzAAiE5cPD7nHSmrR7Sdqb2hgEb2iCYxKD_vqO1ue4-u-8zr_axc_uLQvIfAmidGRAAYksEcNwm35--_NPDQnwsyeKYb7y4buH_HZ1ghg-NDmH9sq3L8XlYXZL7PtdpojM-XqKd4XtoZr123XUqV9gotjeEY6uoZGVZECYpblWR6522VpaFIVwbbaAQguVgaU4FYRo7BQQEAVpSIYDzzHBuSkso0B1nO1EgTm45mfa2d42mw5h034fgsyZ43Kl2HONwE6sQVKkP2eHUdPY0_J41wSOo7soIqglBtWnjuohvj7FFrLqVxlZSb-vXOp3fca9MTK7r3JBLxMnn3xs8KfgJAAD__7Zvb1k)

[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j82O2yAUhZ8G72zBBUK88GJaK130ZzFdTTcVxpeExhgHiN28_YjIinRX3_mkc672y-TsoyPqCwG4uDERAMLfCMDtY_Px_s9__1bLP2-0vh1-eVlS-LqrK7zk2egQfv7-eG_zj9Q_Nnf9_76t7KXnx4IveS9t0Gs3Far6auy4HamosGOKt-2RcsWqS3e0Fpkyw0FI2xqlrFaUy1ZYqVm5ynVAQVJgLZMShGhGIcYWKQM2CD7IIxH02dNoj9EZzVLedIwh-MYEX03dJeclPYedCJzS9ZEjYj2EcK2tdjE1Ede1MaGEQz2GWWcsLj_ds_9rtF-0O8-E9yAYpYrAoXCPo7t7wvuIa7roiDvPGAvdIttBCvdokPA-DTsxYc44Z8L7KZxDFbtx2dw0uXRQRNDz85kyfe3gMwAA__-H9or1 "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Patriot,

This may be the hardest email I ever had to write to you. The graphic content that is being pushed on little kids is despicable.

Every year, children across our nation are exposed to book fairs laden with materials that compromise educational integrity and childhood innocence. The book fair events put on by Scholastic often feature and promote books containing adult content and inappropriate themes that are often not disclosed to parents or educators.

What you and I remember as a purveyor of innocent childhood fun is now promoting books with harmful and confusing gender-transitioning storylines and graphic sexualized content to kids as young as 5 years old!

I’ll be honest... I sometimes feel overwhelmed by the number of ways in which our kids are under attack.

That’s why I’m excited to partner with **SkyTree Book Fairs, the wholesome and age-appropriate alternative book fair experience**. SkyTree carries a wide range of titles, and they just started sending my book, _Chasing Embers_ , to middle schools across the country!

[SkyTree has received a record number of book fair requests, and they need our help to fulfill them. Will you join me in supporting them today? Donate $35, $50, $100, or more today to help SkyTree put wholesome stories that are rooted in truth into the hands of schoolchildren across America.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j7uO2zAURL-G6iSQl5QpFSw2EZwij2JTbZoFH9drxqKoJWnJ_vuFDMHtmQPMjA7z6E93ReQ3AnD2LhMAwl8IwOfbGtL1f_j5o27_vdD68_AntFsK33d1gac8WR3j779vr335lYf76i-313VhT73cZ3zKe2mDQftxo3KonOInR0WFikne9x3lklVn5TpHD91J8J6jtYLxjlNJteml1cwaU3kFFFoKrGdtC0I0TgjXI2XAjOCm7Yigj55GB0zeapbLqlOKMTQ2hmpU51Lm_Bh2JHDMl3tJiLWJ8VKftE-5SbgsjY1baGoXJ11wc_nxWsK71WHW_mMifADBKJUEDhsP6Pw1ED4kXPJZJ9x5wbTRNbEd5HhNFgkfstmJjVPBqRA-FLyV99FPF1Yl5ebVj6PPB0kE_Xhc2g4sCr4CAAD__-yYjWE)
[Donate](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0-TnCAQRz8N3rSgAR0PHDaxJof8OWxOm8sWSM8OGREHUOO3TzlrzfX1q3r9034a3GVTpPlCAK7OJgJA-AsBuL-tPs5__fdvpfzzQst7_cvL_QpfD3WBpzz2OoSfv99e2_wjddvqbv9e14U99bxN-JSPaIVeu2GnTVdYxS-WigIVa3jbnihvWHFV0lpsTtTUQhreWikFo8DrVrYXdrICC6eAgqTAWiYlCFFZIWyLlAEzght5IoI-OpX2GF2vWcqrjjEEX_XBF4O65jylx2NnAud023JELE0It_KiXUxVxGWp-rAfTWnDqDPuLj_P2b_32k_afYyEdyAYpQ2BeucerZs94V3EJV11xINnjDtdIztACnPskfAumYP0Ycw4ZsK7z9i7mXMOIyuistPqhsGluiGCfjxm7SMWBf8DAAD__3t8jls)
Across the country, parents, grandparents, teachers, and librarians are waking up to the reality that they can no longer trust that a children’s book is free from messaging about gender transitioning, explicit sexual content, or politically divisive themes.

That’s why they’re turning toward SkyTree.

**In 2024, SkyTree Book Fairs...**
* Hosted over 320 book fairs in 48 states
* Reviewed and added 300+ titles to our book fair collection
* Impacted over 86,000 students

Each book offered at a SkyTree fair has been carefully vetted to ensure it aligns with their mission to uphold wholesome values in our kids through literacy that is fun, engaging, and age-appropriate.

_The best part?_ SkyTree is a non-profit organization. They offer their wholesome book fair experience to schools free of charge and work to have the lowest possible book prices. This ensures that more kids can leave with a developmentally appropriate book!

Private _and_ public schools are seeking them out because teachers and librarians know that when they book a fair with SkyTree, they don’t have to worry about screening every book or parents keeping kids home during book fair week out of fear over what they might be exposed to.

[Donate today to help SkyTree Book Fairs nurture childhood innocence through wholesome, age-appropriate book fairs! Your gift will put uplifting stories into the hands of kids across America. clean_body: "SkyTree Book Fairs" Patriot, This may be the hardest email I ever had to write to you. The graphic content that is being pushed on little kids is despicable. Every year, children across our nation are exposed to book fairs laden with materials that compromise educational integrity and childhood innocence. The book fair events put on by Scholastic often feature and promote books containing adult content and inappropriate themes that are often not disclosed to parents or educators. What you and I remember as a purveyor of innocent childhood fun is now promoting books with harmful and confusing gender-transitioning storylines and graphic sexualized content to kids as young as 5 years old! I’ll be honest... I sometimes feel overwhelmed by the number of ways in which our kids are under attack. That’s why I’m excited to partner with SkyTree Book Fairs, the wholesome and age-appropriate alternative book fair experience. SkyTree carries a wide range of titles, and they just started sending my book, Chasing Embers , to middle schools across the country! Across the country, parents, grandparents, teachers, and librarians are waking up to the reality that they can no longer trust that a children’s book is free from messaging about gender transitioning, explicit sexual content, or politically divisive themes. That’s why they’re turning toward SkyTree. In 2024, SkyTree Book Fairs... Hosted over 320 book fairs in 48 states Reviewed and added 300+ titles to our book fair collection Impacted over 86,000 students Each book offered at a SkyTree fair has been carefully vetted to ensure it aligns with their mission to uphold wholesome values in our kids through literacy that is fun, engaging, and age-appropriate. The best part? SkyTree is a non-profit organization. They offer their wholesome book fair experience to schools free of charge and work to have the lowest possible book prices. This ensures that more kids can leave with a developmentally appropriate book! Private and public schools are seeking them out because teachers and librarians know that when they book a fair with SkyTree, they don’t have to worry about screening every book or parents keeping kids home during book fair week out of fear over what they might be exposed to. Thank you in advance for your support, Glenn Beck P.S. SkyTree’s fairs aren’t just wholesome. They’re a whole lot of fun! Check out these happy smiles as kids discover a love of reading at a SkyTree book fair. Donate today to provide this fun, educational, and character-building experience to private AND public school students! Click below to donate now.

Dear Friend,

I’m on the ground in Iraq, and the Lord has already opened _big doors_! I’ve been ministering in the Middle East for _more than 15 years_ , and I have never seen such favor as I have on this trip (**read the amazing story at the bottom of this email**). **Please continue praying for our medical team** —they’ve been serving and blessing refugees all week. **We are still collecting donations** to purchase more supplies to distribute in the coming days. Our goal is to bless those who have fled war with nothing and help meet their tangible needs—food, shelter, clothing, warmth, and more. Peter, Under DOGE's watchful eye, HHS canceled 62 contracts worth $182 million in administrative expenses. This included terminating a $168,000 contract for an exhibit dedicated to Anthony Fauci at the NIH Museum. **I might support a taxpayer-funded Fauci exhibit if it did nothing but showcase his complicity in the pandemic and his role in the COVID coverup.** __[**Maybe a little something like this ...**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/TdMco4klfAZ4tl2fFqln-8rpV3_lSXkLjW-DF3M39n1TvbPgH5JOXE7t1JAiW0VrvZbr1OR0MGMScPjRGLKXENsNC0EC2DUD8SNkaBhc3-tlRPo3GhZHlLwmrHpYU8d7U4cNc2WZ9o1TYQ7Kr2Tcih7Mhhiz8iCvSVnnTVDc94piD0DxZP3Ig1gCF1t6TkhdL9mxLbXVjdBBE-01utwBty6rJeRf7_h241gfjXAdUQWUQZ-XBW72-UEcyU8V9wGzN27i5O4MRPiszIJbEO17MYm-q6hkk7BwQhaEUj2M5GCB-_2DOs3QDJsrFy1BDKsKk6T4Hhno59EhMBesdvr6770glXIUFszIO9jazqKVbRetnk_Vq6C_eMpV3BAHT68sQLi7WiPo6WrWonPR196EAXZTXzl8butrbjkgbFQRnfsQMC6dQqpmd6fXNiHO2PvisrWQBXUbI8jMhovQNGwc2MI_QfWdZ9lBA8jmsSJLTN9U8g3oiBnoxtLNsHgULB4/fhuvoeW2akToFWi_pZmeZEw9d255q3jo/6)__

subject: It’s official - The Gulf of America is here to stay

body:

|

| | | We have some exciting news to share with you!

**Both Google and Apple have OFFICIALLY updated the name of the Gulf of America to its correct name.** This isn't just a symbolic victory - it's a testament to the strength of our nation.

America is entering into a new golden age of American exceptionalism - what better way to celebrate than claiming this _**EXCLUSIVE**_ shirt! _**History is being made every single day, will you be a part of it?**_

name: DOGE SURVEY ALERT
subject: EMDS: Elon Musk Derangement Syndrome
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Symptoms: hysteria, protests, woke ideology....

|
---
| | | Friend,

**We've identified a fast-growing threat to our progress: Elon Musk Derangement Syndrome (EMDS). The symptoms are clear: woke hysteria, compulsive protesting, and a complete disregard for facts.**

The latest outbreak of EMDS has been triggered by Elon Musk's involvement in the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). You see, Friend, the Radical Left just can't handle the idea of someone doing their due diligence to shrink the size of government, eliminate bureaucracy, and cut wasteful spending.

_Simply outrageous! _

But we won't let their EMDS hold us back. House Republicans are committed to working with innovators like Elon to make government work for the people, not the bureaucrats.

That's where you come in, Friend. We need your input to help us get ready for the battles ahead. **[Will you take a few minutes to complete our DOGE Survey today? We need to hear from you now more than ever.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zie7fapmd297in6gbs538plaj16385tqlrhvciao_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie1o74cth2bs "Will you take a few minutes to complete our DOGE Survey today? We need to hear from you now more than ever.")**
**DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (DOGE) SURVEY

PATRIOT: Friend

---
| | | [COMPLETE NOW](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zubrmcklgd3osmj89l1q3o2m1e6tp4j6de4dbkpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie1o74cth2bs "COMPLETE NOW")
---

Don't let the Left's hysteria become contagious and get in the way of saving our country.

**[Take our DOGE Survey in the next HOUSE and join the fight against wasteful government spending.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zlr8gsakk1kinef94ast3lcbimq07mm3ck02ggi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sjie1o74cth2bs "Take our DOGE Survey in the next HOUSE and join the fight against wasteful government spending.")**

Sincerely,
House Republicans

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. # Fort Wayne City Clerk Keesling elected as GOP chair
---
| | [](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/65BVOLNeRO0AdZ_DBEr8aEP9RO71d1kPLjKKUYjAjuULn6LEL78ZDDfSiniElxp8mFyYxtqAP48LA1-mgnZ6lI6mxMTPY7T1ErPb-i6PsGMHUSOgsXOPC-iz-kSa8eOGyyD48Cs7ifoFHDN9fSWGb8j9vICl8fl-Cmq3mpBL9d4Pw1IUiXZ32IfA1bhmCi5Z4KloxNp11lnLMCyvjcSxCuH4vWbgn48qHnmZmA6tJ5kohhDyULHXepssdjvV-ETDJuSkx4W-QPVygTPebYcSijijVg2qRVkCor4ee_lqn890K52G6fxQchuvjkoFWbXCSzrIKmBkJuVqD8aPsCSMsHBEFM1qkT-WaVA/M4i65UXXsbiJnJfKdEfG-eEQxltbIAGU/6)
---
Indiana Capital Chronicle Whitney Downard February 13, 2025
https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/briefs/fort-wayne-city-clerk-keesling-elected-as-gop-chair/ [Click Here To Read Full Story](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/pQgQ0mYSfAAKQUn_ej-raRKX-MQMKV8fQD2Mcgrn2OJazk5I_MU6L_rWcBJeI8oihEJAZDaNnU300QitCfpoRHu0aaz3DYgXS6THzHWhRkHZ_OvJQkkS15pAigWOfPB1jb_QRIIc07UrVMzraXPWDDBwpFf1keFDmbD8YtfD1pA_xMI_yAhVQJC-TaJoHebPaYdbF_q-sPf4IBW50B-JhQL_-rT9owXpy-eOaq3_e_hPLED-YpoelAwE217OaWNgszi4Ff0EN9li823-U2kYZklBKnDYZ2mz3YhnJsdIT-oonrjLhWiBstzDhAUkJtPs080f-qg1QzRUzs2fiTCQJaEygJfkTMdbVME/UGYIQ0L8wyPRiY-I022LDyIOoBAHj4_u/6) Fort Wayne City Clerk Lana Keesling will be the next leader of the Indiana Republican Party following a unanimous vote from the Indiana Republican State Committee Thursday. “I am deeply honored by the trust Governor Braun and the Indiana Republican State Committee have placed to serve as our party’s Chairwoman,” said Keesling. “I have always been a firm believer in our party’s agenda, and I am deeply grateful to have this opportunity to grow our party and deliver for Hoosiers. As Chairwoman, my first priority will always be to listen to and represent our entire state, and I am certain that together we can create an even stronger, more collaborative, and more effective party.” Keesling received the endorsement of Gov. Mike Braun earlier this month. She will be the fourth party chair in the last two years. “... I commend the State Committee for their decision and appreciated the opportunity to work with them to find leadership for our party,” Braun said in a statement congratulating Keesling. “Lana is a leader who understands commitment, service, and hard work. She will be a tremendous asset to our grassroots leaders and all Hoosier Republicans.” A party release highlighted Keesling’s fundraising record and success in flipping an elected office after decades of Democratic control. She also served as the vice chair of the Allen County Republican Party and the treasurer of the 3rd District Republican Congressional Committee. Keesling worked in the private sector prior to her tenure in public office and had a small business. According to her biography on the Fort Wayne city website, Keesling is a Richard G. Lugar Excellence in Public Service alumna, the president of the Allen County Republican Women’s Group and a member of the Downtown GOP Club. She holds a Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration and an MBA. [To Read The Full Article Click Here](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/nL9PGPrxxAh3nErjnoxnE6lfCkJsI3tBvy1_tBoPWx8T4t4AhtBfF7yM2HSksqZRYJ9ygmkxsl91u8A-zhO1Ygwclf5Q-ToZO-nj7BYOTGmdtkmpel9BrNyedwK6STdbEp_cwdZaLPDtlKcJ0LVRUWJFlo5Z9mYURAArpjODMehuq9vzitQnUGKQ3zUNMfQfBgfGOR47tE8LMs-GLbbHqO67-D2n_XXH-gwCDPsfNkr5D3B58U6As67q1sVSFZjWYI80LmkoQdy9GACBDAFF12SrG84VIyPuP4lXUH6-7AH0baMlnXCgJpeG1tj9lNJmlTbNpv_RywAoCpgh9awi8BaCX24CYHs6UN0/OwOVqzFdhFJJDdRGEEhT2zyuGNgM_OIm/6)

name: Anastasia via Team Yass
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Whether it’s over email or during call time, one of the questions that we hear the most is, _“You just recently won, why do you need to raise money again already?”_ It’s a valid question to ask — so let me explain! Campaigning is a year-round operation, Peter. While Yass is busy at work in Washington or meeting with folks locally in-district, folks like myself and others on the campaign team are putting our heads together to lay the groundwork to win this seat _again_ in 2026. The margin of victory for Congressional races nationwide was the closest they’ve been in a decade, and the extreme right is building their war chest as we speak to expand their extremely narrow majority and attack the record of young, progressive Democrats like Yassamin. [**In order to keep building on our progress and continue to deliver for AZ-03, we need to strengthen our grassroots base today. clean_body: | Whether it’s over email or during call time, one of the questions that we hear the most is, “You just recently won, why do you need to raise money again already?” It’s a valid question to ask — so let me explain! Campaigning is a year-round operation, Peter. While Yass is busy at work in Washington or meeting with folks locally in-district, folks like myself and others on the campaign team are putting our heads together to lay the groundwork to win this seat again in 2026. The margin of victory for Congressional races nationwide was the closest they’ve been in a decade, and the extreme right is building their war chest as we speak to expand their extremely narrow majority and attack the record of young, progressive Democrats like Yassamin. = | = Recurring contributions set the foundation of our strategy and help us plan ahead. Having this base now also allows us the room to respond at the end of the election cycle, when right-wing mega-donors will throw last-minute attacks to confuse voters as they head to the polls. **Hi, I’m Beth Davidson, and I’m excited to announce that I’m running for Congress in New York’s 17th District!**

This is one of just three Republican-held districts that Kamala Harris won in 2024, and I’m determined to flip it blue in 2026. But to make that happen, I need your help. [_**Will you join me and Fight For Progress today as a Founding Donor to my campaign?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102395731/529041605/-1682381099?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-02-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNjYwZmI5LWRjZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ykJ0RNBRpTZDMIJ6pPhivResLceFgyVsgOi5xv2tbbs=)
| | | [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102395735/529041608/-1682381099?&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-02-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNjYwZmI5LWRjZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ykJ0RNBRpTZDMIJ6pPhivResLceFgyVsgOi5xv2tbbs=)
---
I’m running for Congress because I love the Hudson Valley—it’s home. It’s where my husband and I set down roots and are raising our two children. But the truth is, the Hudson Valley has changed in ways that deeply concern me. I’ve seen firsthand how the price of housing has skyrocketed, making it harder and harder for families to afford to live here and how the cost of living has become unsustainable. And I know many local businesses—mom and pop shops that have been here for generations—are closing their doors.

But the truth is, neither Albany nor Washington has been delivering the results our community deserves. Too many families are struggling, and it’s time for new leadership that actually understands the issues we face.

As a former member of the School Board and now as a County Legislator in Rockland County, I’ve fought for people across every age group—from our youngest students to our most senior residents. I’ve always put our community first, and now, I’m ready to take that fight to Washington.

I know how to get things done. In Rockland, I’ve worked across party lines to secure real progress. And I’m ready to bring that same determination and results-driven approach to Congress. We need a leader who understands our community, who knows how to build consensus, and who will always put the needs of the Hudson Valley first.

But I can’t do it alone. This race is set to be one of the most competitive in the country in 2026, so we need to prepare now to flip this seat and defeat Republican Mike Lawler.

[_**Will you contribute whatever you can today between my campaign and Fight For Progress to help us kickstart this campaign and flip this district for the future of the Hudson Valley—and our country?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102395738/529041614/-1682381099?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-02-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNjYwZmI5LWRjZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ykJ0RNBRpTZDMIJ6pPhivResLceFgyVsgOi5xv2tbbs=)

name: Center for Reproductive Rights
subject: Who's threatening repro rights this week?
body:
🚩Repro Red Flags: Agency Watch | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102396151/529042772/1485890129?sourceid=1150429&utm_campaign=25emeus-0201aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bishop&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRiZDZmYS1kY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NraqK1Mc0yv8DWigIOElEazYwkSBJZFanvaP3WySfRE=&emci=33208365-36ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d1dbd6fa-dcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237)
---
The Center for Reproductive Rights is previewing the Senate confirmation hearings for Trump nominees who pose a threat to reproductive rights. Research, legislative records, public statements, and more can be found at [**_Repro Red Flags: Agency Watch_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102396153/529042773/1207998042?sourceid=1150429&utm_campaign=25emeus-0201aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bishop&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRiZDZmYS1kY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NraqK1Mc0yv8DWigIOElEazYwkSBJZFanvaP3WySfRE=&emci=33208365-36ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d1dbd6fa-dcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237). **Confirmation Hearings This Week: 2/18 - 2/23** | **February 20: Office of Management & Budget Deputy Director - [**Dan Bishop**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102396154/529042774/1519692629?sourceid=1150429&utm_campaign=25emeus-0201aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bishop&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRiZDZmYS1kY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NraqK1Mc0yv8DWigIOElEazYwkSBJZFanvaP3WySfRE=&emci=33208365-36ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d1dbd6fa-dcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237)**

**In This Role He Could:**
* Help make decisions about funding priorities, including funding fake abortion clinics designed to deter patients from having abortions.
* Fast track regulations that restrict abortion, including ones that make it easier for law enforcement to access the medical records of abortion patients and defund Title X health clinics.
* Assist OMB Director Russell Vought—who is avidly anti-abortion and a coauthor of Project 2025—in carrying out Trump's anti-abortion agenda.

| **Red Flags:**
* He is a vocal opponent of abortion, explicitly stating that he thinks "it's wrong to have an abortion in the case of rape or incest."
* As a Member of Congress, Bishop recently cosponsored a national abortion ban and a bill that would enshrine fetal personhood into law, which could jeopardize access to abortion and IVF.
* As a North Carolina State Senator, Bishop authored discriminatory legislation restricting transgender individuals’ use of public restrooms.

---
* * *
**Over the Past Two Weeks:**
* [**Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102396155/529042775/503955544?sourceid=1150429&utm_campaign=25emeus-0201aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bishop&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRiZDZmYS1kY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NraqK1Mc0yv8DWigIOElEazYwkSBJZFanvaP3WySfRE=&emci=33208365-36ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d1dbd6fa-dcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237) was confirmed and sworn in as Secretary of Health and Human Services, where he is in a position to limit access to medication abortion. During his confirmation hearings, Kennedy made clear his intent to follow President Trump’s anti-abortion policies and promised to defund Title X family planning clinics. He also committed to hiring anti-abortion staff at HHS.
* [**Pam Bondi**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102396156/529042776/-1978078350?sourceid=1150429&utm_campaign=25emeus-0201aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bishop&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRiZDZmYS1kY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NraqK1Mc0yv8DWigIOElEazYwkSBJZFanvaP3WySfRE=&emci=33208365-36ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d1dbd6fa-dcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237) was confirmed and sworn in as Attorney General. In this role, she could attempt to misuse the Comstock Act—a Victorian-era anti-sex law—to try to restrict or eliminate access to abortion nationwide without the approval of Congress.
* [**Russell Vought**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102396157/529042777/1444626316?sourceid=1150429&utm_campaign=25emeus-0201aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bishop&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRiZDZmYS1kY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NraqK1Mc0yv8DWigIOElEazYwkSBJZFanvaP3WySfRE=&emci=33208365-36ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d1dbd6fa-dcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237), a Project 2025 co-author and staunch anti-abortion extremist, was confirmed and sworn in as Director of the Office of Management and Budget. In this position, he will have the power to make recommendations to defund federal reproductive health care programs through the President's budget and fast-track anti-abortion regulations.

[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102396158/529042778/2141984067?sourceid=1150429&utm_campaign=25emeus-0201aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bishop&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRiZDZmYS1kY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NraqK1Mc0yv8DWigIOElEazYwkSBJZFanvaP3WySfRE=&emci=33208365-36ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d1dbd6fa-dcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102396159/529042779/-1245908844?sourceid=1150429&utm_campaign=25emeus-0201aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bishop&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRiZDZmYS1kY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NraqK1Mc0yv8DWigIOElEazYwkSBJZFanvaP3WySfRE=&emci=33208365-36ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d1dbd6fa-dcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102396160/529042780/589568587?sourceid=1150429&utm_campaign=25emeus-0201aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bishop&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRiZDZmYS1kY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NraqK1Mc0yv8DWigIOElEazYwkSBJZFanvaP3WySfRE=&emci=33208365-36ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d1dbd6fa-dcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102396161/529042781/1393780475?sourceid=1150429&utm_campaign=25emeus-0201aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=bishop&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRiZDZmYS1kY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NraqK1Mc0yv8DWigIOElEazYwkSBJZFanvaP3WySfRE=&emci=33208365-36ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d1dbd6fa-dcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237)

name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: Elon Musk
body:
As you read this, an Elon Musk-backed dark money group is spending more than $1 million supporting the Republican candidate in a Wisconsin Supreme Court race.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=403%2E2563979%2ERcsF5o)

In just a moment, we are going to ask you to rush a donation to the Democratic National Committee. Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
Here's the truth:
As you read this, an Elon Musk-backed dark money group is spending more than $1 million supporting the Republican candidate in a Wisconsin Supreme Court race. The money is going toward massive television ad buys in markets across the state.
Why is he doing this?
Because this race is to replace a left-leaning justice, and if Republicans win they can swing the court in their favor. That will have an impact on things like drawing Congressional Districts in Wisconsin, where Republicans have taken a 50/50 state and given Republicans 3/4 of the seats in Congress.
So Wisconsin Democrats need our help to fight back. We don't have Elon Musk, but we do have lots and lots of folks who care who are willing to chip-in a few bucks where and when they can.
And giving to the DNC today gives them the ability to allocate resources where they are needed, when they are needed most.
So if control of Congress is important to you -- especially when Republicans have such a small majority -- Kamala Harris is asking:
[**Can you please rush a $10 contribution to the Democratic National Committee today? They need your help electing Democrats in Wisconsin and all across the country. There has never been a more important time to give.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250219a&refcode2=403_2563979_RcsF5o&akid=403%2E2563979%2ERcsF5o)

So if control of Congress is important to you -- especially when Republicans have such a small majority -- Kamala Harris is asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Kamala Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.
