subject: Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life—A Gift of Faith for You
body:
It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/xtjahR-l2v9BVgJVTZ2WDoA51ZavAeSG6MQzP8IWoct-pq-VmuYDIzADG9ijnZeJG5e7TzcttWnxmwoc0pA_xJOksO0MaBHZq2eQ4z9RfaaRZ4sbJWE_yg9foilngBhgzknBLmmsBSxScpBSdwMO5zdG-XlTxm36XsASrkZPZYkgSa0XkRSkcwo71RmlW4lUXC5EPnDtmZySgSDDzc8sZXLGfvrfAUOsv72uFo4qygDBW1Cv408svfuVA0T2bP1SuktUt8c5dSl6erOblU2XdTWunMvqbsmcHDpbw-GLuBsfh7s_BEJJ4GawlEtBBXeHCl1HCVRAJfgxWKPJ6E5p0Z56vsqAXFwTQAEZQwQ1CYhtv7fk4UYHZnMXBBAOAIWvHhsZ6OY4eM5P3v79gxTRkNxnmqHgOT8EZ4xMESxxACxO-S9IOYFk4Zna1ZW5svf04PGwm1_2t3ZIrP0ckxPqBcVZ9CBOvCgyzBB6NenKFgIkNxM/RfoEBv0xENFpC8lOl1Lqz200hYXdlTBl/6)
---
Hello Friend,

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perseverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---

Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you.

clean_body: It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. | | | Hello Friend, It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do." Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything." That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life." That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like: Purpose over aimlessness Perseverance over defeat * Faith over worry My book, Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to Pathway to Victory's ministry work this month. Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices. | | To get your copy of Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life , you can give a gift of any amount here: I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer! Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. Request the bundle here: Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Kash Patel should NOT be our next FBI Director
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek,
Kash Patel’s nomination has advanced out of the Senate Judiciary Committee and is headed to a full confirmation vote in the Senate.
I will vote NO on Kash Patel’s confirmation to FBI Director, and I strongly urge my Republican colleagues to put country over party and join me. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/I7i7qOUtxEmaGONtM_87SA2]
As a MAGA loyalist and conspiracy theorist, Patel is a disastrous pick for this critical security role:
* He has indicated support for January 6th insurrectionists.
* He’s pledged to “come after” the media — and any political figures he deems to be the enemy.
* And he has significant financial ties to China and Russia!
There is only one option for any Senator who considers American security to be a top priority — and that is a definitive NO vote on Kash Patel.
Will any Republican put American security first — or will they deliver yet another piece of evidence that they are the Trump-First party?
Please help me demonstrate a strong grassroots opposition to Kash Patel by adding your name to my petition against his confirmation today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/I7i7qOUtxEmaGONtM_87SA2]
Thank you for stepping up.
-Tim Kaine

subject: Airplane Safety, an AOC Probe, and a Baby Seal Wants Pizza
body:
Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy said earlier this week that [air travel remains the safest mode](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp_G7ojw8GcKituky223tAaYiVkR2zIoUd5-le23_PRJ50jn67bcsNSy3f_jg0LnfQEJRkgQk18ylvpe9JgDEwGpkcLklPezUmYa15BQqRTJmNkp9FM0xjAYrVhqIBvzWMKHJmHyk9UA8gKGZjtrBgZm7eKgJeXS9_PyvZetr8T1vT_pvKT9Mdaw9n60Qf0b4DrAFY-NXu1zfcbZS6o0wPWouJFIJ7ZVNGTqb7H1FgUjCusjz1FHZSxYJ5MDsNlny9J5MCjHM-TjVWotzbpBy_sDS_2V979iPAP8BAAA__-9E17R) of transportation, even as four major U.S. aviation disasters in 2025 have claimed at least 85 lives.

| | |

# Wednesday, February 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1878, Thomas Edison received a patent for [the phonograph](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO8yAQBOCnsTssWDDGBcXfpMvfXmmRsIQ9YbAMsuW3PyW69tr5pBlpvu7L3VGi_PrvVrQtlAU4jIwDE_PiHaVrUb23ARFQ9mjFJOfZSDmKPtpJO5ikMdo_uRFKK8cfSowzeBmE8bon-27jIGahFQAfYESjjQoQIAQ1PTrF0VMr-_BdKLeIIV3lwH14lrVPNra21U7-6-DWwe08zyFSbWW_3t7BrUWqzLuLUWa_8knL6ipz6XAMPdWS2eYa5lZZi8i2WHJ57W6L_W79dlJKVPXUKf5aHaXPdPvrisPCTwAAAP__o9ViEg), which was the first device to record and playback sound. Some mysteries in life remind us just how little we actually have figured out—like the nature of dark matter, or why a [baby seal was causing a traffic jam](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L3O4yAQheGrwd1EMOC_gmIbumy7pYXtIWaFwTKTRM7Vr7L9Vx_p0dH75z7dfUwxP377nSyHMqHEFiSCGqfVx3RNplltIELSDVnV63EctG5Vs9k2ICrTox_M2GEwZpCz0hpbTUENXddE-9UkqlF1BlHesKWhG0zAgCGYfhZG0hq5nLe_JWbeKKSrvOi8LWVvkt2Yjyr0L4FOoMvXUSp_J4HuCwt0EgU6NQh0zwqZ3lWg26_KdMbyrDD7-YJKPkFI5agQMxfY47omghJgKTnTwnF5MmwEb19ho5OAC_B5AW8ES_I7HPHz8QJdc9r1eMeUYu16YeRj9zH9_8o_tXtZ_BcAAP__NudwOA) in downtown New Haven earlier this week. Read more below, and if you have a theory about how it got there, hit reply and let us know. Later today, we’ll be sending a special message from our sponsor, [Pacaso](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX8N3mzBgQ0eGCpF2dK1o0XMEV8FBtkkVf595bTq1vW9T3dP38dlujiKtN7eXUJbQ56AQ99yaMU4eUfxOanG24AIKBu0QstxNFL2olnsMAbO_aA0v87GKAEz9qFXVw2zHkTQDdnjGgcxikEB8A56NINRAQKEoPSVKY6eat66z0xrXTDEZ37g1s05NdEutZadyTcGZwZnWh-416642e35II5Ynu81TXu-bzMyecLkKDIYjjChp3ti8lQc-ba4ra647QuV3352qTi6rS_irxSGt3I0048CwXVvpOSGj81mffmiGGkfNFP8drx6Da3_iXtY-A4AAP__IRdukQ)—the market leader in vacation home co-ownership—sharing an exciting investment opportunity in their luxury home platform. Thank you for your time and interest! We're sponsored today by [Mode Mobile](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAQQL8Gb7bgwBgGhkpRtnTtaBFzxFeBsWySKn9fOa26db33dHd6H5fx4inRcnv3GV2NZQQOfcuhFXYMntJzVE1wERFQNujEIK01Uvaimd2g-wDa8MihV3bi0ouAVtvBSqOvtm_IHds4CCu0AuAd9Gi0UREixKiGK1McA9WydZ-FljpjTM_ywK2bSm6Sm2tddybfGJwZnGl54F67XALmcqWEh3Ugeb7XPO7lvk3I5Amzp8RAH8OMge6ZydPqKbSr3-qC2z7T-ssnn1dPt-Vl_EFheCt7Of5kEJpLq7QEo5vNhfWLUqJdD0zx23Hq9Wz9L97DwXcAAAD__4svb7E), offering an investment opportunity in a mobile communication company that is changing the game.
|
---
## U.S., Russia Agree to Work Toward Ukraine Peace
Russia and the United States agreed Tuesday in Saudi Arabia to [work toward ending the war in Ukraine](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp_G7ohgMBgKituky223tAZ7iGeDf4Rxorz9Kttv-emTjo7O1224IWde7_9xoVDTNoAEIyQI5YcJOb-Hrp1CIgLSLQXVa--d1ka1c0CQDm1nJERljYLeSSk9oFV67JOLLYcPTYLyynYA8gKGnHVdggQpdX1sOkkT161cvjde60wpv7cnlcu4LW0Oc6370eh_DVwbuOK-0uv4XJ9RKo-ZGriW8zgYxfkoyCuJFxZR-I3TLCrmxyFqOZdd7GflVZQz8ibkqCNRTJSM0578ZKRPyTjQHm0cTVvCtL84Zz5s33TyviDnX6X6V6JngJ8AAAD__3rhZ-4) and improving diplomatic and economic ties, marking a remarkable diplomatic shift under President Trump. U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov announced three initial goals: restoring embassy staffing, supporting Ukraine peace talks, and exploring broader cooperation, though plans for a Trump-Putin summit remain uncertain. [See who was at the table](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAQxvGngW4NDKNiQXGN3V57pUEZ1llRNkrW7NtfvP66L_mSX_L_uQ93z4m3x7dfyZWYB1BQ3xTcdDcEz-kzoAwuEgEZSU63puusMbWWs-sCotc1UW1BRRugJa392NjGgjc-SHaXpkB3ukEAVUFNtrEYIUKM2I4CFQUuea-embcyU0yf_Ka9mvIqk5tLeR3CfAnoBfTneVbjOF2fgH6j8xDQ-73wlOiaU4vmmeyCy5Ll7sLr5JT4aFqB6rF6Tn9q-a_y7eA3AAD__xhqUxc). The meeting was the most extensive U.S.-Russia dialogue since Moscow’s 2022 invasion, though Ukraine and European allies [voiced concerns about being sidelined](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvgzAQBeBfYzYj-zAEBg9d2NK1IzJwl1xr7Mh2YuXfV3Tv9klPek96X9fl6thzuH26A22huICCXiqQelp2x_69mGa3hAjYNWj1pZumset63dztNhhNZlWEG-huJHIjbXpENfXr3uutYXu2KdCTHgyAaqHHcRgNAQGRuazCKNy5xNR-Rw7ljuTf8YWp3eLReHsv5ZFF9yFgFjDXWtttzQFrPnMB80kB8zPL9MyZnTwQC4eb5OOR4utUQu8Kx5Dl8yc5DiirSwLmJtn9Udl7zsNFGHU7HPu_2fLfDS8LvwEAAP__KMhhhA). Rubio stressed the talks were a starting point, with further work needed to secure peace.
## Three Arrested in Multi-State Cult Killings
Authorities in Maryland arrested three suspected [members of the "cult-like" Zizian group](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD9vwyAUxD-N2YjgAbYZGLpkS9eOFn_eS2iJsTBKlHz6yt07nk53p_t9XZaLzyWv109_R9epLiDAcAFc2iX5XF6LZskRIqBi6OSkrJ2VMpLdnIohJAiIKFBIbWKSKCVhJKRk_cSyO9oESCtHDSBOYHAeZ01AQKSnMGiBKffaTt81r_2GVF71ge0U650Vd-t92wf1McB5gLPfVnzuh3WI1nMsOMD5nd_Zrzv_yeU4svNQW8LGN99bLTyQsTaFMViMyug4zpgMkU5mEjLMmjWXtueR3cdp0OJ697n87ff_eDwc_AYAAP__zLZi_g), allegedly linking them to multiple killings across the U.S., officials announced Monday. The group’s alleged leader, Jack "Ziz" Lasota, along with Michelle Zajko and Daniel Blank, face weapons and obstruction charges as part of an ongoing investigation. Read an [in-depth article about the group here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FugzAQQL_G3ozOZwfw4KELW7p2RA4-h6sMjsANIl9fpXvnJ72n93Udr4Ezr_fPsJCvqYwIeFGASrsxBs7naGX0iQjJSPK6M871xly0nH0fJusoRIM3Gyliis6YLkJqAdzkkmT_tgFqp1uLCA1eqG97mzBhSra7CQsUuZat-S681plSPsuTtmYqi8x-rvWxC_MhcBA4HMfRnGEu5U0FDisdu8DhxS8Oq5p-clV7DVulqJZwqkxRgTYIYNA0c12y3Hx8HJwz720nLNyXwPkvVf9bf3r8DQAA__8FcFsC). The Zizians, described as [tech-savvy radicals bonded by veganism](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAUAL8Gb1jwwDYMDF28pUtUdbSIeTivIcbCJFHy9VW6dz7pdLrvw3TwlGhdPv0VXY15AgEdF8ClnYKn9Jx0E1xEBFQNOjkoa41SnWzOTsIsNZ6CNp1BMFYqKztvBmGG3g96bsi9bQKklb0GEC10aHqjI0SIUQ8npgUGqrm0P5nWesaYnvmOpZ3ztUnuXOu2M_XBYGQw-tO84mNvl_zGDMavI4PxQQWPNZcng3HLiWbkvhTcK_fb5guulSf0AQufb6kmuiB_0Yv8ypeSbxtPtF4wcCmNFVoY1RQXtgelRHs_MC2Wq6f011P_-3N38BsAAP__kEdnrw), gender identity issues, and artificial intelligence, have been connected to the January shooting of a U.S. Border Patrol agent in Vermont, the 2022 sword attack and the recent murder of a California landlord, and the unsolved shooting deaths of Zajko’s parents in Pennsylvania. Investigators believe the group’s violence stems from a mix of personal disputes, anti-authority beliefs, and efforts to cover their tracks.
## Transportation Sec. Backs Airline Safety
Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy said earlier this week that [air travel remains the safest mode](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp_G7ojw8GcKituky223tAaYiVkR2zIoUd5-le23_PRJ50jn67bcsNSy3f_jg0LnfQEJRkgQk18ylvpe9JgDEwGpkcLklPezUmYa15BQqRTJmNkp9FM0xjAYrVhqIBvzWMKHJmHyk9UA8gKGZjtrBgZm7eKgJeXS9_PyvZetr8T1vT_pvKT9Mdaw9n60Qf0b4DrAFY-NXu1zfcbZS6o0wPWouJFIJ7ZVNGTqb7H1FgUjCusjz1FHZSxYJ5MDsNlny9J5MCjHM-TjVWotzbpBy_sDS_2V979iPAP8BAAA__-9E17R) of transportation, even as four major U.S. aviation disasters in 2025 have claimed at least 85 lives. The latest incident occurred Monday when a Delta jet carrying 80 people crashed and flipped while landing at Toronto Pearson International Airport, injuring 18 but causing no fatalities. [See a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kMFqxCAUAL_G3Az6NIkePBRKbttLKT0Go8_NKyaGRHbJ35ftveeBYZjv23TzlGm7f_gVXU1lAgEdF8ClnaKnfE26iS4hAqoGnRyUtUapTjaLUwqDD0bDrEGIoA2GzvSd6gGHWVrbkHvZBEgrew0gWujQ9EYnSJCSHmamBUaq5Wh_Cm11wZSv8sCjDWVtsltq3U-m3hiMDEY_hw2fZ3svL8xg_PpkMMbDr75S4A-KWPi5lOfJ17LiVnnEXD3fs9-Qp0z7jpH7VPFgMJ61HBdTI0Wm3qU0FqTqhuZwcX9SznT2A9PivnrKfzX1vzsPB78BAAD__7k9Zg8). The Jan. 29 midair collision near Washington that killed 67 was the deadliest U.S. airliner crash in nearly 16 years, followed by in Philadelphia, Alaska, and Arizona. Everywhere I go, from booth to booth, no matter if it’s at home in Bergen County or down in Vineland, people tell me: “Jersey’s too expensive.”

clean_body: | | Friends, here in the Diner Capital of the world, tax cuts are this week’s special. Everywhere I go, from booth to booth, no matter if it’s at home in Bergen County or down in Vineland, people tell me: “Jersey’s too expensive.” From housing to taxes to utility bills and the cost of child care, hardworking Jersey families can’t keep up with how unaffordable our state has gotten. It’s time to take action to make Jersey more affordable. When I’m Governor, we will. | My “Tax Cut Plan” will lower property and income taxes for middle-class families, put money back in the pockets of Jersey families, help seniors stay in their homes, and attract jobs and families to Jersey. You can learn more by heading to our website. Fighting for the hardworking people of Jersey is always on my menu — from lowering taxes and lowering costs to protecting Jersey Values. We must FIGHT BACK , EXPOSE their corruption, and put AMERICA FIRST**. Let's get this done. For America, Congressman Eric Burlison Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress 2135 E. name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: Here's what I'm thinking...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
With so much news and change coming from Washington, it has been my priority to share resources and information with all of you as I have it. As your Congresswoman, I feel strongly that transparency, honesty, and facts are critically important tools in the challenges and opportunities ahead. We are strongest when we work together and focus on solutions.
That’s why I started my new series called “ Sarah Explains it All [https://www.instagram.com/reel/DFoeES-xIDW/?igsh=cGZzNGNwNGt5MDJp] .” Our goals are simple: give you a look into what’s going on in Washington, what I’m doing about it, and what you can do to help. It’s also been fun to lean into my roots as a college professor, and I hope that this series can help demystify some of the more complicated aspects of the policy challenges ahead and my job here in Congress. And the 90s nostalgia is just a bonus!
We’ve already had a few special guests on the show like my friend, Congresswoman Sarah McBride, who came on to explain Medicaid in a special edition of “Sarah(s) explain it all.” Check out that episode H [https://www.instagram.com/reel/DGBqdvgx5rL/?igsh=czFub3ZsZnQwZ3Y4] ERE [https://www.instagram.com/reel/DGBqdvgx5rL/?igsh=czFub3ZsZnQwZ3Y4] .
My commitment to you is that we will always be here to listen to the needs of our community and keep an open line of communication. Let’s do this together!

name: Team WFP
subject: February survey results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, We’ve been looking over the responses to our February WFP member survey, and one thing is clear: **right now, it feels like _everything_ is coming at us.** The challenges are real, but so is our collective power to shape what comes next — together. [**If you haven’t completed the February WFP member survey yet, can you take a minute to do so now? We value hearing from each and every one of you, and your responses are collectively helping to guide our priorities as we navigate these tough times and plan for 2025 and beyond.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKTpJTUFr6kN3BZIJFJXqqIlorRAiArS22T3lFBuKjVlDY65gjLP1TE8UmYHOfFcKPZSuE7cc-txhtCCktIu8JbQic-XXhETC6mogH-C5r3EQFFPh9OQvhnq8IcbV5qaDoYg4XxTYCIebeDXLpQlc0JieU8vHESQFt2FoLutc5aGpOjVw7EXm1Qldqxvwn1LFr377PcBnTTLzPI9uvpJo-_LohTEFHnmMptDJ4Qa8Y4ULT3EVfxXi0f8kLR5V3dMSA/4e5/kwj7Ge1AT7WalBwftlUkuQ/h0/h001.HkMMDPf60rtuq66ud246f6NpN_S3X27RE_6wWtS7A7E) **[Take the survey »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKTpJTUFr6kN3BZIJFJXqqIlorRAiArS22T3lFBuKjVlDY65gjLP1TE8UmYHOfFcKPZSuE7cc-txhtCCktIu8JbxvKYM-PhEdrPMv5u5lQBe82vZdlQy4Qivz-YI5FuM3NBkF127OBVVyAPrIkgiAbymjHrwvVrjdMMNKHGMelK5jMVTxSH9qK7P-WK-RQgGzuHzygIxVgBdh7qfxMbtiy7nk9gtpWpUOaDzqezQVwIbMpBaJra6HInzpksOJcqhpk/4e5/kwj7Ge1AT7WalBwftlUkuQ/h1/h001.9CKT6pn7KrzWsm0rugb99iYc7HzM4WfH1tahv_CYUMk)** _Reminder: If you want to participate before seeing the current results,_[**_take the survey here_**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKTpJTUFr6kN3BZIJFJXqqIlorRAiArS22T3lFBuKjVlDY65gjLP1TE8UmYHOfFcKPZSuE7cc-txhtCCktIu8JbLYgEh-6-dWTqiY0B0utKyP1duMGvLPEiEtBH4b2BBpwhmZ-VTke4XgOMqgvlyhjFi2lFw7YoXZPmGTXcU75VvNNLeoYObjT-KYWTlHaKMHwykr1OeDBWVmVu-uolpSFFZU-B4F5Lo1abd_RVTC3vWoem_zcLaxa1zMLHHFsBbmY/4e5/kwj7Ge1AT7WalBwftlUkuQ/h2/h001.jms_6AapFMuRRooRhxBqL3Y5LY9D8JkCvlwW3vx4yt0) _before reading any further!_ Day after day, we’re witnessing Trump and his allies wage relentless attacks on working people — from gutting programs we rely on, to giving billionaires like Elon Musk unchecked power to dismantle government agencies under the guise of “cutting costs,” to rolling back protections that keep our communities, our parks, and even our airplanes safe. This is happening everywhere, in red states and blue states alike — **and it’s _overwhelming_ , Peter. It’s _scary_.** In fact, those were the top two words that you used when we asked you to describe how you're feeling at this moment. But there was another word that came through just as strongly: **Determined** And that third word? **_That’s_ the one we need to hold onto.** Because when we come together — when we stay determined and refuse to retreat into cynicism, when we block out the negative messages designed to make us feel powerless — we know we can win. You also made it clear what’s driving so many of us right now. When we asked what priority was motivating you the most, these were the top three responses:
* **Defending democracy and fighting back against MAGA extremism** (55.9%)
* **Organizing to win pro-working families policies and defend communities at the local level** (19.6%)
* **Electing more champions at the state and local level and in special elections** (18.2%)

And when we asked which issues you feel are most urgent, these were your top responses:
* **Democracy and voting rights** (56.0%)
* **Climate crisis** (41.8%)
* **Taxing the rich and corporate accountability** (37.2%)
* **Health care and Medicare for All** (34.3%)

The forces trying to destroy the government so they can steal from working people _want_ us to feel like we’re powerless to stop them. But we know better. We know that when we come together, we have the power to _upend_ the status quo. History has shown us that movements like ours can win — and we can do it again. [**So, if you haven’t already, please take one or two minutes to fill out the February WFP member survey.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKTpJTUFr6kN3BZIJFJXqqIlorRAiArS22T3lFBuKjVlDY65gjLP1TE8UmYHOfFcKPZSuE7cc-txhtCCktIu8Jb_2piBQDumUhMPwHEvMYLHGDGshBAiaITaOmyrOreAR8RxCmZAjAgU39RexGMvnwQCLWjpmgfM7qUwdsuDif32A4F6M7xzVr_bGjn_W5w5xDFgxizKXoAVsHCpNx6kvDUurXB1B2MB9sMWjnkzJhKjcxb3Zx_E_Jh8-CwxEQkuW0/4e5/kwj7Ge1AT7WalBwftlUkuQ/h3/h001.tSMXlHm7mozspJbv5UtWkG3Y0BoydJdX4CUs_D11W1c) Surveys like this are an invaluable opportunity for us to hear from WFP members about your ideas, your priorities, and how you plan to get more involved. And right now, your input and your involvement have never been more critical. **[Take the survey »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKTpJTUFr6kN3BZIJFJXqqIlorRAiArS22T3lFBuKjVlDY65gjLP1TE8UmYHOfFcKPZSuE7cc-txhtCCktIu8JbE8bHFqcQmqoXJlqg_ZDK3gmv9fCkrtRBT0joyAZSrsnnmMSWK__v8ByOAJpS5anXIO9hOzvYFecJAfiuOvqUONMYAi_JuW8UV7iOjBYpAfziKuwAea4KDGg6cGOLig4Obs7maPdHPN9y4YYwq_Yp_h8G5nF3_K0nExFH9TDWCe8/4e5/kwj7Ge1AT7WalBwftlUkuQ/h4/h001.fpzhXuXiCTw1g_28pr7ZpArWzt-k3oGRjMqNKYd6oos)** In solidarity and resistance, Team WFP clean_body: | | | Peter, We’ve been looking over the responses to our February WFP member survey, and one thing is clear: right now, it feels like everything is coming at us. The challenges are real, but so is our collective power to shape what comes next — together. Reminder: If you want to participate before seeing the current results, before reading any further! Day after day, we’re witnessing Trump and his allies wage relentless attacks on working people — from gutting programs we rely on, to giving billionaires like Elon Musk unchecked power to dismantle government agencies under the guise of “cutting costs,” to rolling back protections that keep our communities, our parks, and even our airplanes safe. This is happening everywhere, in red states and blue states alike — and it’s overwhelming , Peter. It’s scary. In fact, those were the top two words that you used when we asked you to describe how you're feeling at this moment. But there was another word that came through just as strongly: Determined And that third word? That’s the one we need to hold onto. Because when we come together — when we stay determined and refuse to retreat into cynicism, when we block out the negative messages designed to make us feel powerless — we know we can win. You also made it clear what’s driving so many of us right now. When we asked what priority was motivating you the most, these were the top three responses: Defending democracy and fighting back against MAGA extremism (55.9%) Organizing to win pro-working families policies and defend communities at the local level (19.6%) Electing more champions at the state and local level and in special elections (18.2%) And when we asked which issues you feel are most urgent, these were your top responses: Democracy and voting rights (56.0%) Climate crisis (41.8%) Taxing the rich and corporate accountability (37.2%) Health care and Medicare for All (34.3%) The forces trying to destroy the government so they can steal from working people want us to feel like we’re powerless to stop them. But we know better. We know that when we come together, we have the power to upend the status quo. History has shown us that movements like ours can win — and we can do it again. Surveys like this are an invaluable opportunity for us to hear from WFP members about your ideas, your priorities, and how you plan to get more involved. And right now, your input and your involvement have never been more critical. In solidarity and resistance, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . * **TOP NEWS**

"**West Texas measles outbreak climbs to 58, with four saying they were vaccinated,** " Texas Tribune's**Ayden Runnels** -- "An outbreak of measles in West Texas has grown to 58 cases, including four patients who said they were vaccinated against the disease.

Ten more cases were added to the Department of State Health Services' count Tuesday, including for the first time the four who self-reported they were vaccinated against the disease, according to the agency's [latest update](https://substack.com/redirect/7d4471e2-b5fa-48f5-9859-1a7270e5130f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). A spokesperson with DSHS said health investigators are in the process of confirming whether the four were, in fact, vaccinated against measles and how many doses they may have received.

DSHS [initially warned](https://substack.com/redirect/2083f9a7-41de-4c50-bdb0-eeed84eeace8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of two cases of measles in underage children in Gaines County in late January. The disease has since spread to four other counties and 58 people -- most of whom are children -- but 45 of the cases are still in Gaines County. Lubbock County, which reported a single case, is the largest county in which a case was reported.

Thirteen patients have been hospitalized, according to DSHS, and spokesperson **Lara Anton** said officials are still unsure what the initial source of exposure was. The outbreak is Texas' largest in more than 30 years, and comes at a time where vaccination rates among children [have dropped](https://substack.com/redirect/04a27314-979b-48fc-87dc-951c752af9e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Almost 97% of Texas kindergarteners were vaccinated against measles in 2019, compared to 94.3% in 2024, according to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/ae92e18c-47a8-4eb8-85e0-1e1481b8691c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Despite the increase in infections among those potentially vaccinated, a DSHS spokesperson said virologists do not currently see "any evidence" the measles virus present in the patients has mutated into a vaccine-resistant variant.

The measles, mumps and rubella vaccine, commonly referred to as the MMR vaccine, is about 93% effective with one dose and 97% effective with two doses, according to the CDC. The first dose is usually administered to infants aged 12 to 15 months, while the second dose is given to kids between 4 and 6. Follow-up doses are not required if patients received them in their youth, and older eligible patients can be immunized at any period.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/ae92e18c-47a8-4eb8-85e0-1e1481b8691c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Measles' symptoms include high fever, watery eyes, runny nose and rashes, which can be minor or full-body. Symptoms can become serious and even fatal, especially among children and those who are unvaccinated. One in five unvaccinated people who are infected are hospitalized, according to the National Foundation for Infectious Diseases.

Part of what makes measles so infectious is the virus' ability to stay active long after a patient has left, as the virus can stay active for up to two hours in the air and on surfaces, according to the World Health Organization.

Anton said the outbreak has especially affected the large Mennonite community in Gaines County. While the Mennonite Church does not forbid or disavow vaccinations, Anton said their communities tend to be undervaccinated, which drastically increases the likelihood of infection. Measles has a 90% infection rate among unvaccinated people who are exposed to the virus, according to WHO.

Alongside the decrease in vaccination numbers, Texas lawmakers have introduced [over 20 bills](https://substack.com/redirect/05c86d89-81f6-4ee6-8ff9-5044e54b4be8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into the Legislature aimed at loosening vaccine requirements across the state with the support of vaccine-hesitant or anti-vaccine groups." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/e2f8a40f-1736-4555-ba40-1bcedbc54d9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

TOP NEWS "West Texas measles outbreak climbs to 58, with four saying they were vaccinated, " Texas Tribune'sAyden Runnels -- "An outbreak of measles in West Texas has grown to 58 cases, including four patients who said they were vaccinated against the disease. Ten more cases were added to the Department of State Health Services' count Tuesday, including for the first time the four who self-reported they were vaccinated against the disease, according to the agency's . A spokesperson with DSHS said health investigators are in the process of confirming whether the four were, in fact, vaccinated against measles and how many doses they may have received. DSHS of two cases of measles in underage children in Gaines County in late January. The disease has since spread to four other counties and 58 people -- most of whom are children -- but 45 of the cases are still in Gaines County. Lubbock County, which reported a single case, is the largest county in which a case was reported. Thirteen patients have been hospitalized, according to DSHS, and spokesperson Lara Anton said officials are still unsure what the initial source of exposure was. The outbreak is Texas' largest in more than 30 years, and comes at a time where vaccination rates among children . Almost 97% of Texas kindergarteners were vaccinated against measles in 2019, compared to 94.3% in 2024, according to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention. Despite the increase in infections among those potentially vaccinated, a DSHS spokesperson said virologists do not currently see "any evidence" the measles virus present in the patients has mutated into a vaccine-resistant variant. The measles, mumps and rubella vaccine, commonly referred to as the MMR vaccine, is about 93% effective with one dose and 97% effective with two doses, according to the CDC. The first dose is usually administered to infants aged 12 to 15 months, while the second dose is given to kids between 4 and 6. Follow-up doses are not required if patients received them in their youth, and older eligible patients can be immunized at any period. Measles' symptoms include high fever, watery eyes, runny nose and rashes, which can be minor or full-body. Symptoms can become serious and even fatal, especially among children and those who are unvaccinated. One in five unvaccinated people who are infected are hospitalized, according to the National Foundation for Infectious Diseases. Part of what makes measles so infectious is the virus' ability to stay active long after a patient has left, as the virus can stay active for up to two hours in the air and on surfaces, according to the World Health Organization. Anton said the outbreak has especially affected the large Mennonite community in Gaines County. While the Mennonite Church does not forbid or disavow vaccinations, Anton said their communities tend to be undervaccinated, which drastically increases the likelihood of infection. Measles has a 90% infection rate among unvaccinated people who are exposed to the virus, according to WHO. Alongside the decrease in vaccination numbers, Texas lawmakers have introduced into the Legislature aimed at loosening vaccine requirements across the state with the support of vaccine-hesitant or anti-vaccine groups." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. subject: Can we rekindle the flame?

body:
I'm not sure where to begin, but I know I have to be honest with you.
Last chance to renew your membership:
|
---
| | | Friend,

As I sit down to write this email, my heart is heavy with a mix of emotions. Sadness and a hint of desperation. _I'm not sure where to begin, but I know I have to be honest with you._

**I've been waiting for what feels like an eternity for you to renew your membership. But the silence is deafening.** It's like you've vanished into thin air, with your presence haunting me like a ghost.

I know we've been through tough times before. We've faced adversity and come out on top. But this time, it feels different. **This time, it feels like the stakes are higher, and the consequences of failure are too great to bear.**

So I'm asking you, Friend, to search deep within yourself and find the spark that once drove us forward. _**Can we rekindle the flame of your House GOP Membership that once burned so brightly?**_

clean_body: I'm not sure where to begin, but I know I have to be honest with you. Last chance to renew your membership: | | | | Friend, As I sit down to write this email, my heart is heavy with a mix of emotions. Sadness and a hint of desperation. I'm not sure where to begin, but I know I have to be honest with you. I've been waiting for what feels like an eternity for you to renew your membership. But the silence is deafening. It's like you've vanished into thin air, with your presence haunting me like a ghost. | | "REACTIVATE MY MEMBERSHIP" | | "2025 Membership" | | "REJOIN THE TEAM" I know we've been through tough times before. We've faced adversity and come out on top. But this time, it feels different. This time, it feels like the stakes are higher, and the consequences of failure are too great to bear. So I'm asking you, Friend, to search deep within yourself and find the spark that once drove us forward. Can we rekindle the flame of your House GOP Membership that once burned so brightly? | | "RENEW MEMBERSHIP" | | | "REJOIN HOUSE GOP" "So please, Friend, don't let this be the end. Renew your membership, and let's start anew. Let's rekindle the flame and make a difference together." name: Power Generator
subject: FOX Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator...
body:
Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20367/6374453/5973e5c084b72351e091b5961534b5f8dc5cba89/5536550b021f49ba6385c31b9af8fce5372a2ab6)
---
| | |
---
_February 19th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
**FOX & Friends Features
Breakthrough Solar
Generator** _**Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans
Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20367/6374453/5973e5c084b72351e091b5961534b5f8dc5cba89/5536550b021f49ba6385c31b9af8fce5372a2ab6)
---
FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20367/6374453/9ecc6559d4ba238ed4fe4f9f62ba2944de1b85b3/5536550b021f49ba6385c31b9af8fce5372a2ab6) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts
Fear Imminent Threat To
Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government Is
Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are****securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20367/6374453/9ecc6559d4ba238ed4fe4f9f62ba2944de1b85b3/5536550b021f49ba6385c31b9af8fce5372a2ab6). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000
Americans already have it
in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or – what's really cool – with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20367/6374453/9ecc6559d4ba238ed4fe4f9f62ba2944de1b85b3/5536550b021f49ba6385c31b9af8fce5372a2ab6) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Generator** **Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" **Angel H.**
"Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." **Sharon P.**
"Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic." [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20367/6374453/9ecc6559d4ba238ed4fe4f9f62ba2944de1b85b3/5536550b021f49ba6385c31b9af8fce5372a2ab6)
---
| | |
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20367/6374453/5973e5c084b72351e091b5961534b5f8dc5cba89/5536550b021f49ba6385c31b9af8fce5372a2ab6)
---
|

|

Despite the increase in infections among those potentially vaccinated, a DSHS spokesperson said virologists do not currently see “any evidence” the measles virus present in the patients has mutated into a vaccine-resistant variant.

The measles, mumps and rubella vaccine, commonly referred to as the MMR vaccine, is about 93% effective with one dose and 97% effective with two doses, according to the CDC. The first dose is usually administered to infants aged 12 to 15 months, while the second dose is given to kids between 4 and 6. Follow-up doses are not required if patients received them in their youth, and older eligible patients can be immunized at any period.

Measles’ symptoms include high fever, watery eyes, runny nose and rashes, which can be minor or full-body. Symptoms can become serious and even fatal, especially among children and those who are unvaccinated. One in five unvaccinated people who are infected are hospitalized, according to the National Foundation for Infectious Diseases.

Part of what makes measles so infectious is the virus’ ability to stay active long after a patient has left, as the virus can stay active for up to two hours in the air and on surfaces, according to the World Health Organization.

Anton said the outbreak has especially affected the large Mennonite community in Gaines County. While the Mennonite Church does not forbid or disavow vaccinations, Anton said their communities tend to be undervaccinated, which drastically increases the likelihood of infection. Measles has a 90% infection rate among unvaccinated people who are exposed to the virus, according to WHO.

Now, there's , 2,500x smaller than Nvidia, with significant potential. And with Trump’s recent $500 billion AI push, the timing couldn’t be better. | TOP NEWS “West Texas measles outbreak climbs to 58, with four saying they were vaccinated, ” Texas Tribune'sAyden Runnels — “An outbreak of measles in West Texas has grown to 58 cases, including four patients who said they were vaccinated against the disease. Ten more cases were added to the Department of State Health Services' count Tuesday, including for the first time the four who self-reported they were vaccinated against the disease, according to the agency’s . A spokesperson with DSHS said health investigators are in the process of confirming whether the four were, in fact, vaccinated against measles and how many doses they may have received. DSHS of two cases of measles in underage children in Gaines County in late January. The disease has since spread to four other counties and 58 people — most of whom are children — but 45 of the cases are still in Gaines County. Lubbock County, which reported a single case, is the largest county in which a case was reported. Thirteen patients have been hospitalized, according to DSHS, and spokesperson Lara Anton said officials are still unsure what the initial source of exposure was. The outbreak is Texas’ largest in more than 30 years, and comes at a time where vaccination rates among children . Almost 97% of Texas kindergarteners were vaccinated against measles in 2019, compared to 94.3% in 2024, according to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention. » Despite the increase in infections among those potentially vaccinated, a DSHS spokesperson said virologists do not currently see “any evidence” the measles virus present in the patients has mutated into a vaccine-resistant variant. The measles, mumps and rubella vaccine, commonly referred to as the MMR vaccine, is about 93% effective with one dose and 97% effective with two doses, according to the CDC. The first dose is usually administered to infants aged 12 to 15 months, while the second dose is given to kids between 4 and 6. Follow-up doses are not required if patients received them in their youth, and older eligible patients can be immunized at any period. » Measles’ symptoms include high fever, watery eyes, runny nose and rashes, which can be minor or full-body. Symptoms can become serious and even fatal, especially among children and those who are unvaccinated. One in five unvaccinated people who are infected are hospitalized, according to the National Foundation for Infectious Diseases. Part of what makes measles so infectious is the virus’ ability to stay active long after a patient has left, as the virus can stay active for up to two hours in the air and on surfaces, according to the World Health Organization. Anton said the outbreak has especially affected the large Mennonite community in Gaines County. While the Mennonite Church does not forbid or disavow vaccinations, Anton said their communities tend to be undervaccinated, which drastically increases the likelihood of infection. Measles has a 90% infection rate among unvaccinated people who are exposed to the virus, according to WHO. Alongside the decrease in vaccination numbers, Texas lawmakers have introduced into the Legislature aimed at loosening vaccine requirements across the state with the support of vaccine-hesitant or anti-vaccine groups." clean_body: I won’t chase my tail. I’ll get straight to the point: | = Hi Peter! It’s Bad Bunny, Emily’s new spokesdog, writing to you (barking at you) from Washington, D.C. I won’t chase my tail. I’ll get straight to the point: Emily is working around the clock to stop the worst of the Trump agenda while also preparing to take back the House in 2026.= = It’s my job to keep morale up in the office — and it’s been a tough job these last few weeks. The Trump administration and Republican-controlled Congress are scarier than any vacuum cleaner, fireworks show, or unexpected noise could ever be. From the cruel actions toward immigrants to disastrous Executive Orders, it’s enough to make you want to hide under a blanket. But here’s the truth: The GOP majority in Congress is tiny (like me). If we pressure a handful of House Republicans, we can block the worst MAGA policies from getting passed. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = That’s all from me! Despite the increase in infections among those potentially vaccinated, a DSHS spokesperson said virologists do not currently see “any evidence” the measles virus present in the patients has mutated into a vaccine-resistant variant.

The measles, mumps and rubella vaccine, commonly referred to as the MMR vaccine, is about 93% effective with one dose and 97% effective with two doses, according to the CDC. The first dose is usually administered to infants aged 12 to 15 months, while the second dose is given to kids between 4 and 6. Follow-up doses are not required if patients received them in their youth, and older eligible patients can be immunized at any period.

Measles’ symptoms include high fever, watery eyes, runny nose and rashes, which can be minor or full-body. Symptoms can become serious and even fatal, especially among children and those who are unvaccinated. One in five unvaccinated people who are infected are hospitalized, according to the National Foundation for Infectious Diseases.

Part of what makes measles so infectious is the virus’ ability to stay active long after a patient has left, as the virus can stay active for up to two hours in the air and on surfaces, according to the World Health Organization.

Anton said the outbreak has especially affected the large Mennonite community in Gaines County. While the Mennonite Church does not forbid or disavow vaccinations, Anton said their communities tend to be undervaccinated, which drastically increases the likelihood of infection. Measles has a 90% infection rate among unvaccinated people who are exposed to the virus, according to WHO.

Read today's FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . | PRESENTING SPONSOR: AI Capital News | TOP NEWS “West Texas measles outbreak climbs to 58, with four saying they were vaccinated, ” Texas Tribune'sAyden Runnels — “An outbreak of measles in West Texas has grown to 58 cases, including four patients who said they were vaccinated against the disease. Ten more cases were added to the Department of State Health Services' count Tuesday, including for the first time the four who self-reported they were vaccinated against the disease, according to the agency’s . A spokesperson with DSHS said health investigators are in the process of confirming whether the four were, in fact, vaccinated against measles and how many doses they may have received. DSHS of two cases of measles in underage children in Gaines County in late January. The disease has since spread to four other counties and 58 people — most of whom are children — but 45 of the cases are still in Gaines County. Lubbock County, which reported a single case, is the largest county in which a case was reported. Thirteen patients have been hospitalized, according to DSHS, and spokesperson Lara Anton said officials are still unsure what the initial source of exposure was. The outbreak is Texas’ largest in more than 30 years, and comes at a time where vaccination rates among children . Almost 97% of Texas kindergarteners were vaccinated against measles in 2019, compared to 94.3% in 2024, according to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention. » Despite the increase in infections among those potentially vaccinated, a DSHS spokesperson said virologists do not currently see “any evidence” the measles virus present in the patients has mutated into a vaccine-resistant variant. The measles, mumps and rubella vaccine, commonly referred to as the MMR vaccine, is about 93% effective with one dose and 97% effective with two doses, according to the CDC. The first dose is usually administered to infants aged 12 to 15 months, while the second dose is given to kids between 4 and 6. Follow-up doses are not required if patients received them in their youth, and older eligible patients can be immunized at any period. » Measles’ symptoms include high fever, watery eyes, runny nose and rashes, which can be minor or full-body. Symptoms can become serious and even fatal, especially among children and those who are unvaccinated. One in five unvaccinated people who are infected are hospitalized, according to the National Foundation for Infectious Diseases. Part of what makes measles so infectious is the virus’ ability to stay active long after a patient has left, as the virus can stay active for up to two hours in the air and on surfaces, according to the World Health Organization. Anton said the outbreak has especially affected the large Mennonite community in Gaines County. While the Mennonite Church does not forbid or disavow vaccinations, Anton said their communities tend to be undervaccinated, which drastically increases the likelihood of infection. Measles has a 90% infection rate among unvaccinated people who are exposed to the virus, according to WHO. Alongside the decrease in vaccination numbers, Texas lawmakers have introduced into the Legislature aimed at loosening vaccine requirements across the state with the support of vaccine-hesitant or anti-vaccine groups." You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=11f45764bb5a47e4b4411198ef03ebd398356f606f9409b9cc6ee1284bc641a23d2d7f93bf0a1ba0cdd107db599bc731125ae2ecbfc9401393f26f1695b52de5 So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience: Dear President Trump, I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States. Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. >From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience: Dear President Trump, I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States. Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
| | | ...the deep-state
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Today, I’m asking you to complete this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=634870aeacfe4a938ce70e40095e3927&_e=ddq0yl74em4Qc82OJA94717J8cF1tHXN9TeY8RjuDFhehyzBAVoPCA0a6pOUqX19zyqtKuNMe-VC6tijUVsF1rf4vDTyctSa50YWWA0ApVgyO8_zCOuPrb1_par5LPr5WJ175JPmEB8les0amfjaKBUXUjLzlgmBPllQpCUcuss1LQHwFTBa3JPdVJ7EOLX6LEtCvRFj2bhFgnDIGYJItb3F_jIi3WCv9zIjmD4cX465igeS933iiSJLutSuySBHgBXaV9tAnNeBDA61eczcq7thcGOA9EwH6ORMC0P8a8oDu46FyTEo3qmYAQcp-A9fmHXbSonG-6KUzkILinjGCtatuQ6Yh6hk4v4TCY2zwsBwcSXpWs4RY-YNEj1A6C8VKrEMdjV1oN_pyr2sRsj_sQIRwwEPyZ84pVwwi-iiy_4%3D)**
---
| | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem.
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=634870aeacfe4a938ce70e40095e3927&_e=ddq0yl74em4Qc82OJA94717J8cF1tHXN9TeY8RjuDFhehyzBAVoPCA0a6pOUqX19zyqtKuNMe-VC6tijUVsF1rf4vDTyctSa50YWWA0ApVgyO8_zCOuPrb1_par5LPr5WJ175JPmEB8les0amfjaKBUXUjLzlgmBPllQpCUcuss1LQHwFTBa3JPdVJ7EOLX6LEtCvRFj2bhFgnDIGYJItb3F_jIi3WCv9zIjmD4cX465igeS933iiSJLutSuySBHgBXaV9tAnNeBDA61eczcq064y_z177F1fX8vTYmOuWhO6k7I1fi7ajGomNX_vEBkL_bs6ETw3TyNNrm2GMwpkSJWAJfUH9g-ZRNhgRQqcSItYezJZX97Zabw61dEZ-9nG9kg0ZpWjs2ccxEyz4l8vQNJb5S7m0QBhL2sYMZTAcY%3D)
---
| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=634870aeacfe4a938ce70e40095e3927&_e=ddq0yl74em4Qc82OJA94717J8cF1tHXN9TeY8RjuDFhehyzBAVoPCA0a6pOUqX19zyqtKuNMe-VC6tijUVsF1rf4vDTyctSa50YWWA0ApVgyO8_zCOuPrb1_par5LPr5WJ175JPmEB8les0amfjaKBUXUjLzlgmBPllQpCUcuss1LQHwFTBa3JPdVJ7EOLX6LEtCvRFj2bhFgnDIGYJItb3F_jIi3WCv9zIjmD4cX465igeS933iiSJLutSuySBHgBXaV9tAnNeBDA61eczcq-FN7EpwjlRKGCLCyNQT9IyWCHW8q6hSS8_1DFJ1faCDfJBz4eNDpom3IhRHgrdnQlNnosqiEK_nLMxNjdlyYyaAVk4mh0EVqJueJ1SJTZ6XCMCPStI7v7bLMudyQtJeaMCZk0uAkEDk-fbBj-BSovU%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=634870aeacfe4a938ce70e40095e3927&_e=ddq0yl74em4Qc82OJA94717J8cF1tHXN9TeY8RjuDFhehyzBAVoPCA0a6pOUqX19zyqtKuNMe-VC6tijUVsF1rf4vDTyctSa50YWWA0ApVgyO8_zCOuPrb1_par5LPr5WJ175JPmEB8les0amfjaKBUXUjLzlgmBPllQpCUcuss1LQHwFTBa3JPdVJ7EOLX6LEtCvRFj2bhFgnDIGYJItb3F_jIi3WCv9zIjmD4cX465igeS933iiSJLutSuySBHgBXaV9tAnNeBDA61eczcqyhhzNu8H1ie1gIm1EKR7bakWAnaGu2Z_4ac8fO_IlMx7hvBFHi8m7f9ncstHsMZXIbjKtiq7c6RTup8Z9Zy1BAoBnYhtZZ5OVDvsZpm9bH-Zj8unEoBoJdaZnmXXoVh3CrEMrbhA47eMc1swupU1vs%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. **[**Your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS is the key to reaffirming this mandate by demonstrating the consensus that exists to remove the obstructionist deep-state.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=634870aeacfe4a938ce70e40095e3927&_e=ddq0yl74em4Qc82OJA94717J8cF1tHXN9TeY8RjuDFhehyzBAVoPCA0a6pOUqX19zyqtKuNMe-VC6tijUVsF1rf4vDTyctSa50YWWA0ApVgyO8_zCOuPrb1_par5LPr5WJ175JPmEB8les0amfjaKBUXUjLzlgmBPllQpCUcuss1LQHwFTBa3JPdVJ7EOLX6LEtCvRFj2bhFgnDIGYJItb3F_jIi3WCv9zIjmD4cX465igeS933iiSJLutSuySBHgBXaV9tAnNeBDA61eczcq9Fc4p_e25aUv2WYlKE30HNKMEcvQ0ZYbrp_mYnL_v6oFtpDenbY3SsQ2RQoknE730Mh5UsKOZfYMeTOBKQG6HHuabuRx8agitci8JabTPVDx5yJbNE63UcRJHu43K2Dk5ContlQJde174QK5bS0gHU%3D)** Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it _never_ will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. **[That’s why I’m asking you to complete your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS without delay.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=634870aeacfe4a938ce70e40095e3927&_e=ddq0yl74em4Qc82OJA94717J8cF1tHXN9TeY8RjuDFhehyzBAVoPCA0a6pOUqX19zyqtKuNMe-VC6tijUVsF1rf4vDTyctSa50YWWA0ApVgyO8_zCOuPrb1_par5LPr5WJ175JPmEB8les0amfjaKBUXUjLzlgmBPllQpCUcuss1LQHwFTBa3JPdVJ7EOLX6LEtCvRFj2bhFgnDIGYJItb3F_jIi3WCv9zIjmD4cX465igeS933iiSJLutSuySBHgBXaV9tAnNeBDA61eczcq34yfnPGd8fWTDnnK1aPd4hzNLhUtOb2UMA3ILUkXJhG4_65TaHVGPRdErrbPdDB5w-AwSRMHjc3oxgJpJVlFVVPsFN85LXv72e34uH7jrY4bFT-b59DqlG83vUUGWKs_M9HrYEOFHI7qPHUnxkE6zY%3D)** And that’s why **I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35** when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.**That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign.** I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before:
---
* They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on).
* We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts.
* The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract.

---
You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=634870aeacfe4a938ce70e40095e3927&_e=ddq0yl74em4Qc82OJA94717J8cF1tHXN9TeY8RjuDFhehyzBAVoPCA0a6pOUqX19zyqtKuNMe-VC6tijUVsF1rf4vDTyctSa50YWWA0ApVgyO8_zCOuPrb1_par5LPr5WJ175JPmEB8les0amfjaKBUXUjLzlgmBPllQpCUcuss1LQHwFTBa3JPdVJ7EOLX6LEtCvRFj2bhFgnDIGYJItb3F_jIi3WCv9zIjmD4cX465igeS933iiSJLutSuySBHgBXaV9tAnNeBDA61eczcq6pZb1-FCCcmVwNNCPttNKTPLfIsJkEP8_Acfy43cWcYwdRu7WLrUYWqxCAExoOcmeKu9jZIuwIOQYgjlusR42uM6RMftN6gSVzIBHHloSjQukHoJThpktHblNDxOfXKS8DA0o8NKpbDjgZyT4-eIws%3D)
---
| | **David Horowitz**
---
P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “** _On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues_**.” **[**Your survey and your financial support are of the utmost importance in this fight to overcome the illegal, ill-gotten influence of these government unions.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=634870aeacfe4a938ce70e40095e3927&_e=ddq0yl74em4Qc82OJA94717J8cF1tHXN9TeY8RjuDFhehyzBAVoPCA0a6pOUqX19zyqtKuNMe-VC6tijUVsF1rf4vDTyctSa50YWWA0ApVgyO8_zCOuPrb1_par5LPr5WJ175JPmEB8les0amfjaKBUXUjLzlgmBPllQpCUcuss1LQHwFTBa3JPdVJ7EOLX6LEtCvRFj2bhFgnDIGYJItb3F_jIi3WCv9zIjmD4cX465igeS933iiSJLutSuySBHgBXaV9tAnNeBDA61eczcq2ffJrtdvVpcz-WwmGVGH_Y9n6A1MfdjLQ9rwPa7J4A0XGT_YD-Ha3eVNB6QvlW2t-DgHEbxlw9LRyuA8gDtkeKnJcqkgGHHmhpVhPtS2VBIZw4HzXq32XAIXDrMGAJXZvxW_uEPNpKB4NQyJAwLCIs%3D)**
---

clean_body: | | | ...the deep-state | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem. | | | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). Your participation is of the utmost importance. Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%. Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies? Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year? Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average? What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee? These are the questions on part one of the And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration. Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government? Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch? Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service? Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats? You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it never will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. And that’s why I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign. I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before: They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on). We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts. The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract. You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight. Sincerely, | | David Horowitz P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “ On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues.” | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | | ---|---

Anti-choice extremists have made it clear they’ll stop at nothing to restrict women’s ability to access reproductive care. | | |
Friends, Anti-choice extremists have made it clear they’ll stop at nothing to restrict women’s ability to access reproductive care. Over the past few weeks since session has begun, Republicans in the House have introduced several anti-choice bills. **_I’m fighting in the Senate to restore abortion rights nationwide and protect the right to contraception in federal law._** This is what Nevadans elected me to do — stand up for our rights and our freedom in the Senate. I will always stand up to anti-choice extremists who want to take away women's reproductive freedom. **_[Rush a contribution to NV Dems if you agree → Reproductive care is health care. clean_body: Anti-choice extremists have made it clear they’ll stop at nothing to restrict women’s ability to access reproductive care. | | | Friends, Anti-choice extremists have made it clear they’ll stop at nothing to restrict women’s ability to access reproductive care. Over the past few weeks since session has begun, Republicans in the House have introduced several anti-choice bills. I’m fighting in the Senate to restore abortion rights nationwide and protect the right to contraception in federal law. This is what Nevadans elected me to do — stand up for our rights and our freedom in the Senate. I will always stand up to anti-choice extremists who want to take away women's reproductive freedom. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | – Jacky The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
