Wes is committed to helping our public servants during this unpredictable and chaotic time. **[You can check out the Maryland Public Servants Resource Website here, and be sure to share it with anyone you know who may need help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102401582/529059977/-443472566?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWY2ZTgyZi1lN2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgrSOl3W5JsBOILxCnojvIiJcHekuhi2vEfwjYAYK6Y=&emci=5de661d4-e1ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=8af6e82f-e7ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=24635485)** Thank you, Team Moore

subject: standing up for American democracy

Hillary & her corrupt allies are TERRIFIED of what DOGE means for her family and political cronies. "They're afraid that with Elon Musk on board, we'll actually start to see some real results... and that's the LAST thing they want!" That's why they've taken to the streets, waving their signs and chanting their slogans. They're trying to intimidate us into backing down. But this simply tells us that we are on the scent. And that's where you come in. House Republicans trust YOU, a tried and true patriot, to help us figure out how DOGE can be most impactful. name: EMILYs List
subject: When RFK Jr. says "I agree with President Trump," here's what he means:
body:
The only thing standing between us and a national abortion ban is a strong firewall of Democratic pro-choice women in office. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102402614/529062783/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE238_20250219_RFKBad_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055720&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWI1ZDFlZi1lOGVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TsBj1EZxAtXk-GV3NWw6BDHKSmHIwwTN5Sd5s1FPNBM=) Peter,

The GOP wants a national abortion ban, plain and simple. And with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. now confirmed as head of the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, they've taken a massive step toward making that a reality.

[**Under this corrupt and chaotic presidential administration, EMILYs List women will be the frontline defense for abortion access across the country. In his new position, RFK Jr. has direct control over the FDA and, more dangerously, the future of mifepristone, a safe and effective abortion medication that has been used for decades. Donald Trump has already given him marching orders to look into it — and during his confirmation hearing, RFK Jr. suggested he might revoke FDA approval of the drug.

We know exactly what that means: this is just the next step of the GOP's relentless push to strip away reproductive rights, state by state, ruling by ruling, until abortion access is gone entirely.

RFK Jr. admitted that he'll follow Trump's lead on abortion policy, stating "Whatever he does, I will implement those policies." That's a chilling promise — and a direct threat to millions of Americans' fundamental freedoms.

Because here's the truth: The vast majority of Americans are pro-choice. Now, the only thing standing between us and a national abortion ban is a strong firewall of Democratic pro-choice women in office: **Democratic** attorneys general who can file suit against illegal executive orders, **Democratic** members of Congress who can hold figures like Trump and RFK Jr. accountable, **Democratic** governors who can take them to court, and **Democratic pro-choice women** at every level of government who can fight for reproductive rights everywhere.

| |

The CFPB is under attack and we need to fight back. | [View in browser](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ2Nzg4NzU1NTgwMTI3MTkwLFwiclwiOjE0Njc4ODc5NzkwMDY1NDE2Mn0iLCJzIjoiMjY2YTVlZjc2ZDNlMmI3NiJ9)

---
|
---
Friend,

Thousands of people signed our petition telling Senators to vote down Russell Vought’s appointment.

Democrats and Independents in the Senate held firm against the architect of Project 2025.

But once in power, one of his first acts was to **shutter the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB)**.

The CFPB was created to enforce regulations on big businesses and banks so they stopped ripping people off. It was spearheaded by none other than _Elizabeth Warren_. It’s delivered over $20 billion back to regular, ordinary people who are getting overcharged on their credit card, their checking account, their student loans, or their home mortgage.
|
---
| [ ](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ2Nzg4NzU1NTk3OTUyOTkwLFwiclwiOjE0Njc4ODc5NzkwMDY1NDE2Mn0iLCJzIjoiZDcxMTAwMGQxMjk0ZGM0NyJ9)
---
|
---
The Trump administration is rapidly descending into a free-for-all for the richest, most corrupt to take apart the government.**

It’s no coincidence that the CFPB was already investigating many of Shadow President Elon Musk’s companies.**

In fact, Elon is refusing to publicize his financial disclosure forms!
|

| [ ](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ2Nzg4NzU1NjA1MjkzMDI1LFwiclwiOjE0Njc4ODc5NzkwMDY1NDE2Mn0iLCJzIjoiMWNjOGFjZDkyMTM0NmNmZCJ9)
---
|

Elon’s right about one thing: he __is__ using his position pulling Trump’s strings as an unelected crook to profit.

We need to rally against this because even Republicans are seeing that Elon’s time is up.**

62% of Americans disagree with Elon Musk’s role in the government and his DOGE bullsh!t.**__
|
---
_**[The more we reach out to voters to keep them educated on what’s happening, the more Trump and Elon’s poll numbers go down, and they’re dragging others down with them. We need you to chip in today so we can break through the noise and not let this story get buried:](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ2Nzg4NzU1NjExNTg0NDg1LFwiclwiOjE0Njc4ODc5NzkwMDY1NDE2Mn0iLCJzIjoiMmZkN2E1N2Y0YjNhZWU0NCJ9)**_

clean_body: | | The CFPB is under attack and we need to fight back. | | | | | Friend, Thousands of people signed our petition telling Senators to vote down Russell Vought’s appointment. Democrats and Independents in the Senate held firm against the architect of Project 2025. But once in power, one of his first acts was to shutter the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB). The CFPB was created to enforce regulations on big businesses and banks so they stopped ripping people off. It was spearheaded by none other than Elizabeth Warren. It’s delivered over $20 billion back to regular, ordinary people who are getting overcharged on their credit card, their checking account, their student loans, or their home mortgage. | | | The Trump administration is rapidly descending into a free-for-all for the richest, most corrupt to take apart the government. It’s no coincidence that the CFPB was already investigating many of Shadow President Elon Musk’s companies. In fact, Elon is refusing to publicize his financial disclosure forms! | | | Elon’s right about one thing: he is using his position pulling Trump’s strings as an unelected crook to profit. We need to rally against this because even Republicans are seeing that Elon’s time is up. 62% of Americans disagree with Elon Musk’s role in the government and his DOGE bullsh!t. | | | | | | Thank you for your support, — Path to Progress | | Path to Progress Action Checks can be sent to : Path to Progress Action PO Box 34004Washington, D.C. Amy Klobuchar and Chuck Schumer's plan is vitally important.

Here's what it would do:

**FIRST:** It would overturn _Citizens United_ - which has ERODED our democracy for fifteen years.

**SECOND:** It would prevent Super PACs and Dark Money donors from flooding undisclosed funds into our elections.

**FINALLY:** It would stop Billionaires from EVER attempting to buy our elections again!!

This would be groundbreaking.

And it would give Democrats a HUGE opportunity to win the Midterms and take back our Majority in 2026 - fair and square!

name: Gay Valimont
subject: Halting Legal Aid for Vulnerable Children: A Call to Action
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
This is Gay Valimont, FL-6 candidate;
I'm deeply troubled by the recent decision to halt legal aid for unaccompanied immigrant children. This abrupt move leaves approximately 26,000 minors without representation, forcing them to navigate complex immigration proceedings alone.
I NEED YOUR HELP TO END THIS.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/744F3756576E7042796F5861414276397974416445445A664C4170454459656359494C49394C4B3362425A74706C43434A772F7443333672304B56555A507253/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-02-19%20at%2011.55.55%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Organizations like the Acacia Center for Justice have been ordered to cease their critical work, a directive that endangers children already at risk of trafficking, abuse, and deportation. Expecting a child to represent themselves in court is both absurd and unjust. As a mother and advocate, I cannot stand by while vulnerable children are denied their fundamental rights.
In Congress, I will fight to restore and protect legal services for these children, ensuring they receive the representation they deserve. Our nation's values compel us to defend the most vulnerable among us.
You and I can resolve this issue, but I can only do so much on my own. Can I count on you to rush $9 to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/744F3756576E7042796F5861414276397974416445445A664C4170454459656359494C49394C4B3362425A74706C43434A772F7443333672304B56555A507253/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-02-05%20at%202.24.04%E2%80%AFPM.png]
Help me reach those who need it most. Without help, countless children are at the mercy of the current administration.
Thank you for your unwavering support.
Gay Valimont
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/107746/images/GaySignoff.png]
Paid For By Gay Valimont
Gay Valimont For Congress
PO Box 1258
Gulf Breeze, FL 32562
United States

Yes, you read that correctly. **Donald Trump's efforts to completely eliminate the Department of Education have begun. **This is a campaign promise he made last fall, and now he is trying to make it a reality — **a move that would be absolutely _DISASTROUS_ for our country. **
Look, friend, we need the Department of Education. It plays a crucial role in funding public schools and making sure our students are learning at the appropriate pace and standards.
**Now more than ever, it's imperative that we stand up for this critical federal department and do everything in our power to STOP President Trump from dismantling it. That starts with grassroots activists like you speaking up TODAY.**

**Since you're a reliable Democrat in 43614, Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand is counting on you to stand with us. So please, will you add your name to our petition before midnight tonight to help us protect the Department of Education?**

name: Hon. Ram Villivalam
subject: My belief on how to build a winning party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102406013/529074157/860564428?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_190225_EVT_Ram-Villivalam&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU2MTZlOTYtZWZlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fhZeYOrAuukTWThVDzJfBiW7v48wIql_OYUmuTTSvlQ=)
Team,

It’s an honor to meet you. I’m State Sen. Ram Villivalam, and I’m also a 2025 IDCCA Party Builder Award Honoree.

Here’s a bit about me: I was raised on the northwest side of Chicago as the son of Indian Immigrants. Though my father and mother were a civil engineer and a teacher in India respectively, they had to work minimum wage jobs in the United States, go back to school, and work hard to provide for their family.

I was elected to the Illinois State Senate in 2018, but before that election, I worked at SEIU Healthcare. I fought on behalf of home care for seniors and people with disabilities, child care for working families, and Medicaid for those in need.

I am incredibly proud to be the first Asian American and Indian American elected to the Illinois State Senate. I am also very proud to have sponsored and fought for the passage of the Worker's Rights Amendment.

I believe that building a winning party means building a party that is responsive to people’s needs – [**and you can hear more about that if you join us on February 24th for the IDCCA Party Builder Awards. You can RSVP here to secure your spot to join us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102406014/529074158/860564428?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_190225_EVT_Ram-Villivalam&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU2MTZlOTYtZWZlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fhZeYOrAuukTWThVDzJfBiW7v48wIql_OYUmuTTSvlQ=)
[RSVP →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102406015/529074159/860564428?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_190225_EVT_Ram-Villivalam&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU2MTZlOTYtZWZlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fhZeYOrAuukTWThVDzJfBiW7v48wIql_OYUmuTTSvlQ=)I’ll see you at the awards!

Hon. Ram Villivalam
State Senator, 8th District
39th Ward Democratic Committeeperson
2025 IDCCA Party Builder Award Honoree

I am incredibly proud to be the first Asian American and Indian American elected to the Illinois State Senate. I am also very proud to have sponsored and fought for the passage of the Worker's Rights Amendment. I believe that building a winning party means building a party that is responsive to people’s needs – = ’ll see you at the awards! Hon. Ram Villivalam State Senator, 8th District 39th Ward Democratic Committeeperson 2025 IDCCA Party Builder Award Honoree | | | | GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! | | | | | | = = | | | | Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible. Please note your contribution may be used in connection with a federal election. Federal law requires political committees use their “best efforts” to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. State law requires that we report the occupation and name of the employer of any individual who contributes over $500. A copy of our reports are available for free online at FEC.gov. A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the board’s official website, www.elections.il.gov, or for purchase from the Illinois State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL The Illinois Democratic County Chairs’ Association P.O. name: Ritchie Torres
subject: I asked my team to stop sending these…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
Let me explain

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102406868/529076353/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDRmZmU0My1mMWVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ag_6CFXNljvQujyVb2mPxzLN28E6U3hiliPx-8DpxgU=)
---
Peter, it’s Ritchie. I want to say something upfront:

**I asked my team to cut back on sending fundraising emails like this one.**

But Peter, since I don't do “call time” or have MAGA billionaires bankrolling me to victory, this campaign is built by people like you, doing _what_ you can, _when_ you can — even if it means just chipping in $3 to an email like this!

The truth is, my journey from public housing in the Bronx to fighting for progress in Washington would have been __impossible__ without your grassroots support.

[That’s how I know I can count on you to keep this people-powered coalition moving towards victory. We're in the midst of a coordinated political ambush to sabotage everything we're doing: - The Hill fired off this headline: "A tidal wave of resistance is coming for Elon Musk" - Ranking Member Jaime Raskin raised the idea of IMPEACHING Elon Musk - Liberals are holding anti-Musk protests in front of government buildings - Fake News outlets are trashing every plan we come up with - The Democrat Legal Machine is bogging us down in dozens of court battles It 's a disgrace. All of it. Unfortunately, the Democrats are blasting out email after email to gin up their megadonor base whenever we defund one of their Liberal pet projects. That's why it's time for us to go on offense! If that doesn't anger you to your core, I don't know what will. Luckily, that's ending RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW. But the Democrats are desperate to stop us from seeing this through to the very end. name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Baumtoberfest 2025 - Wed March 19 - RSVP Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | (509) 370-8398 | www
body:
Our annual Octoberfest-style event is moving to March. Please join us!

| | | | |
---
| | | | | Friends,
**I’m excited to announce the details for Baumtoberfest 2025!** Our annual Octoberfest-style event is moving to **Wednesday March 19**. Please mark your calendar and [RSVP today](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=74890a29ba&e=5a45b9550e)! Last year, Baumtoberfest SOLD OUT and we’re anticipating the same this year. You don’t want to miss this fun event!
**The House Republican Deputy Whip - Congressman Guy Reschenthaler - is going to be joining us for our festivities this year!** He and I will update you on the “behind-the-scenes” of what’s going on in Congress, and Republican plans to secure the border, unleash American energy and grow our economy.
Baumtoberfest attendees will be treated with a full German dinner, beverages and dessert, in addition to our fun program. _Lederhosen optional, but encouraged!_ [You can RSVP by clicking here.](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=fe47596235&e=5a45b9550e)
**Baumtoberfest 2025****Wednesday, March 19, 2025** The German Hall - 25 W. 3rd Avenue, Spokane
5:30 VIP Reception - $1,000/couple or PAC6:00pm Dinner & Program - $125 per person or $1,000 for a table of 8
Baumtoberfest is always a great time, so please [RSVP today](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=5c623b2d71&e=5a45b9550e). If you’d like to host a table and recruit a group of eight guests, you can also indicate that on your RSVP.
Look forward to seeing you there!
Michael
---
[](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=a936c78911&e=5a45b9550e)
| **About Congressman Guy Reschenthaler**
_Congressman Guy Reschenthaler represents Pennsylvania's 14th Congressional District and is serving in his 3rd term in Congress. He currently serves as the House Chief Deputy Whip.__Guy is the son of former teachers and was raised in southwestern Pennsylvania. He is a graduate of Penn State, The Behrend College, and completed law school at Duquesne University.____After law school, Guy fulfilled a lifelong dream and joined the U.S. Navy Judge Advocate General Corps and volunteered for duty in Iraq.____In Baghdad, Guy prosecuted nearly 100 terrorists, including some of Iraq’s most dangerous terrorists. He also successfully defended a Navy SEAL falsely accused by the Obama Administration of mishandling the Butcher of Fallujah.____Back home in southwestern Pennsylvania, Guy practiced law and developed experience running a small business as a partner in real estate brokerage and other real estate-related businesses, employing roughly a dozen employees.____In 2013, he was elected Magisterial District Judge, winning the nomination of both parties, and in 2015, he was elected to serve in Pennsylvania's State Senate.____Guy currently serves as the House Chief Deputy Whip for the 119th Congress. He also serves as the Vice Chair of the House Committee on Rules and as a member of the House Appropriations Committee._
---
|
---
| Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | (509) 370-8398 | www.votebaumgartner.com

Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203
---

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102408035/529079879/-2113420158?refcode=EM_NBI_JP_20250219_FR_FightBack_0_6MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTk5NGFkNS1mM2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gBXk9v5G4z4lMgWghw4LzjjyzpiY-jQx8LOcdXXQK9k=&emci=7f994ad5-f3ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=85994ad5-f3ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

Right now, our Constitution is facing a defining moment.

Since returning to office, the President has launched a number of executive orders that freeze federal funding, provide unelected billionaire Elon Musk access to taxpayers' most personal information, strip away birthright citizenship, dismantle critical agencies, undermine the rule of law, and more.

Here in the House, we are working swiftly with the courts to protect our Constitution and block some of the President's overreaches. These include:
* **Halting the repeal of birthright citizenship,** ruling that the President cannot strip away a Constitutional right by executive order
* **Protecting healthcare,** stopping the repeal of vital services for LGBTQ Americans
* **Blocking funding freezes,** preventing Trump from withholding federal assistance from states and nonprofits that rely on these critical funds
* **And more.**

Our system of checks and balances is working, but there is more to do. Together, we must stay focused, organize, and fight back effectively.

[**Can you chip in right away to help me fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102408054/529079917/387901678?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_JP_20250219_FR_FightBack_0_6MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTk5NGFkNS1mM2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gBXk9v5G4z4lMgWghw4LzjjyzpiY-jQx8LOcdXXQK9k=)

Thank you,

Jimmy Panetta

The Democrat Machine enriched themselves and their friends – for years – on our dime. If that doesn’t anger you to your core, I don’t know what will.

Luckily, that’s ending RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW.

Our House Majority is working around the clock with President Trump, Elon Musk, and DOGE to investigate, audit, and eliminate waste everywhere we possibly can. **But the Democrats are desperate to stop us from seeing this through to the very end. **

So let me reiterate:

")_**

Please don’t underestimate the importance of our fight OR the impact you can make by contributing right now.

Thanks for all you do,
_– Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**

name: BREAKING NEWS: VPP
subject: Make Bank Fees Great Again?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Republicans are trying to increase your bank fees.
| **_Pete Buttigieg just issued a SERIOUS warning:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/bank-fees/?source=VPP_20250219_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18966%2E878179%2ELyjUYj) **YOU READ THAT RIGHT:[**Republicans are plotting to increase your bank fees. We’re gathering 100,000 signatures within the next 48 hours to stop them in their tracks, can we count on you to sign your name?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/bank-fees/?source=VPP_20250219_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18966%2E878179%2ELyjUYj)** | [**TELL REPUBLICANS: LEAVE MY BANK FEES ALONE →**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/bank-fees/?source=VPP_20250219_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18966%2E878179%2ELyjUYj)
---
* * *
Republicans in Congress launched a full-scale attack on our wallets.

House Financial Services Chair French Hill (R-AR) and Senate Banking Chair Tim Scott (R-SC) are leading the charge to overturn the Biden Administration’s rule capping outrageous overdraft fees.

**If they succeed, banks will once again be free to nickel-and-dime hard working people with fees as high as $35 per overdraft._AWFUL!_**

[**This is our chance to fight back and show Republicans that the American people won’t bow down to corporate greed. We need 100,000 signatures in the next 48 hours to stop this rollback. Will you add your name?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/bank-fees/?source=VPP_20250219_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=18966%2E878179%2ELyjUYj)
[**TELL REPUBLICANS: LEAVE MY BANK FEES ALONE →**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/bank-fees/?source=VPP_20250219_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=10&akid=18966%2E878179%2ELyjUYj)
---
Let’s be clear: _this stunt is nothing more than a cash grab._

These fees don’t protect consumers—they punish them. They hit the hardest on people living paycheck to paycheck.

The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) installed this rule to stop banks from exploiting customers for billions in extra profits. **But Republicans would rather side with big banks than everyday Americans.**

[**We can’t count on Republicans to have a change of heart and reverse this cruel punishment on the American people. Please take two seconds out of your day to sign the petition to stop Republicans from increasing our bank fees.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/bank-fees/?source=VPP_20250219_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=11&akid=18966%2E878179%2ELyjUYj)
[**TELL REPUBLICANS: LEAVE MY BANK FEES ALONE →**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/bank-fees/?source=VPP_20250219_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=12&akid=18966%2E878179%2ELyjUYj)
---
Together against corporate greed,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18966%2E878179%2ELyjUYj). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18966%2E878179%2ELyjUYj).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18966%2E878179%2ELyjUYj) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=18966%2E878179%2ELyjUYj). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18966%2E878179%2ELyjUYj)

body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021925_1&amount=25]
Fox News: End of the Electoral College is in sight if Democrats keep getting their way [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=021925_1&amount=25]
Fox News is wrong, friend -- big surprise.
Our movement to end the Electoral College isn't about partisanship. It's not about gaming the system. Fox has spent decades drowning in their own rhetoric and can't understand the simple fact of people choosing a system that's right and just over a system that benefits themselves and silences others.
Fox News is worried about political parties. We're worried about the people's voices being heard and their votes meaning something . We're worried about a system that has rewarded the popular vote loser with the job anyway five times now. We're worried about the people and the states that get ignored and lost along the way to *just enough* Electoral College votes.
The Electoral College is an antiquated system built for a vastly different America and can't stand up to the challenges we face today. RUSH $25 or whatever you can today to help end it forever >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=021925_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=021925_1&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=021925_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=021925_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=021925_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=021925_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=021925_1&amount=35]
Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go.
It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection before it happens again.
Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=021925_1&amount=25]
Thanks,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021925_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021925_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021925_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021925_1&amount=25]

And then they’ll be waiting and ready to POUNCE, LIE to even more parents, and permanently sterilize and SICKEN healthy children. “The value of money in local races is EXTREMELY good.” With those simple words, Elon PROVED our plan! That’s why we are the NAVY SEALs of school board campaigns! We’ve beaten BILLIONAIRES like George Soros and Bill Gates... We’ve defeated the RADICAL leftist National Teachers Union... And we’ve even DEMOLISHED leftist candidates who were backed by the Obama & Clinton political machine. Over the last 3 years we’ve won 250 school board races and freed more than 4.5 MILLION students from the EVIL of leftist indoctrination in their schools... ... and we’ve earned the wholehearted support of America’s TOP Conservative leaders! Ben Shapiro donated to the 1776 Project PAC. Tucker Carlson asked all of his viewers to send in support. Matt Gaetz PERSONALLY reached out to thousands of Conservatives to join our team. Glenn Beck was our VERY FIRST supporter and told everyone he knew to support us! But we need your support! A donation of $17.76 or more today will have a MASSIVE impact in our fight to DEFEAT leftist school board candidates nationwide, and force Planned Parenthood to FORFEIT their attempt to infiltrate our nation’s schools! Thank you for reading all the way to the end. name: Gay Valimont
subject: Less than 45 days for Dems to WIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Folks,

Gay Valimont here - I’m one of three Democrats up for Congress THIS YEAR whose victory would help stop MAGA in its tracks.

And my election is less than 45 DAYS AWAY.

My victory - OUR VICTORY - would send shock waves through the political world and would hypercharge the fight back to Elon Musk, Donald Trump and the efforts to save democracy and the Middle Class.

But I do need some help.

My victory on April 1st would:

* DERAIL Republican plans for a $4.5 TRILLION TAX BREAK for billionaires like Elon Musk and corporations who ship jobs overseas.
* PROTECT Medicaid and Medicare from the MASSIVE CUTS that Republican leaders like Mike Johnson and Elon Musk are ALREADY FLOATING OUT THERE
* GUM UP the Republican efforts to totally dismantle our government, purging it of experts and filling it with strange-os and zealots who don’t believe in science - OR Civil Rights.

I’ve been running for this seat - formerly Matt Gaetz’s - for almost two years and I can tell you that enthusiasm has never been higher.

NOW is the time to act - can you split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]In just under 45 days, we have a chance to send a message that we don’t like kings in America - we love our democracy, the Rule of Law - and a government that will protect the rights of all.

With gratitude for all you’ve done,

Gay Valimont
Democrat, First Congressional District, Florida

Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today? ](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkT2L3DAQhn_NuLORRrZ8LlwEjCHFpbkipdBJs16BvpDkHPn3wcsupLz2fYaZ92F-v6t37byLxy8daHW1qlKVz8qmqL2t_afzvg_6rpDh1DPs-aJ4Z9cJ-dvtraOVz2JZFomSd_d1xpHziZi5aRLIGCMSJIksGUZynju3XnsY8oUvYmLzcEM2ar5Mo0QU1hoY2ZmtbjS4WJ2lalLKOXnXnKlDKkfn13truYL4AbgD7pXMWWj4crGQHUwKgPvn35LiUwFwtyn2udTcU9DuoUOlzymD2M8WVCDrzgBie-BCsWkPKC9U01kMgdh8fibNgNh-fnz0L5FnbnTI2h0RxPYkXP1fQz2uvoZTbBQbiO2ijQClDul8JMgGnABlubyKiweIrZWTurLa_OW8d1XOMLLjKnv5du3bf_uz4r8AAAD__8Rqoso)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.
It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only _INCREASED_ since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand.
Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Putting differences aside
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
Cats and dogs might not always get along, but there’s a lot we can learn from them.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39446%2E3422442%2EU9gg_h)
These days, Derek, there’s a lot of nastiness in our politics. You only have to watch the news for a few minutes to see a report about Democrats and Republicans not getting along.
But in this time of polarization, I have a story of friendship to share...
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250219?refcode=em20250219-39446&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39446_3422442_U9gg_h&akid=39446%2E3422442%2EU9gg_h)
Meet Dino and Poppy, my family’s furry friends. I promised my three kids that we could get a cat or dog if my Senate campaign didn’t advance through the primary last year. Ever the overachiever, I ended up opting for both!
Dino joined our family first, but as soon as we brought Poppy home, the two of them quickly became besties. While they might not agree on their favorite toy or the best treat (perhaps because Poppy will simply eat whatever she can get her paws on), they light up our home for my kids and me.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250219?refcode=em20250219-39446&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39446_3422442_U9gg_h&akid=39446%2E3422442%2EU9gg_h)
Dino and Poppy have found common ground, co-chairing a committee to hog all the space on my bed. If cats and dogs can do it, surely our country’s leaders can learn to come together to improve the lives of families across the country—as much as Dino and Poppy have improved ours.
More soon,
Katie
Truth to Power PAC supports candidates who will fight for families across America.

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39446%2E3422442%2EU9gg_h).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
clean_body: Cats and dogs might not always get along, but there’s a lot we can learn from them. These days, Derek, there’s a lot of nastiness in our politics. You only have to watch the news for a few minutes to see a report about Democrats and Republicans not getting along. But in this time of polarization, I have a story of friendship to share... Meet Dino and Poppy, my family’s furry friends. I promised my three kids that we could get a cat or dog if my Senate campaign didn’t advance through the primary last year. Ever the overachiever, I ended up opting for both! Dino joined our family first, but as soon as we brought Poppy home, the two of them quickly became besties. While they might not agree on their favorite toy or the best treat (perhaps because Poppy will simply eat whatever she can get her paws on), they light up our home for my kids and me. Dino and Poppy have found common ground, co-chairing a committee to hog all the space on my bed. If cats and dogs can do it, surely our country’s leaders can learn to come together to improve the lives of families across the country—as much as Dino and Poppy have improved ours. More soon, Katie Truth to Power PAC supports candidates who will fight for families across America. Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. Paid for by Truth to Power PAC

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Petition: GOP bill would kick 20 million off Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — while Elon
Musk works on gutting government services, Republicans in Congress are
pushing a budget bill that would rip Medicaid away from 20 MILLION people
and pass even more tax breaks for billionaires. We’re joining Bernie in
the fight to protect healthcare and save lives!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21695?t=1011&akid=7729%2E5885482%2EQbL2_T ][IMG]

Trump, Musk, and the GOP in Congress are lining up to take healthcare away
from Americans all across the country—from Medicaid recipients to seniors
to veterans. It’s a DISGRACE.

Our Citizen Action Team of 30,000 volunteers (and counting) are mobilizing
to protect critical government services like Medicaid. We need to hold all
Democrats in the House and flip just two Republicans by continuing our
massive advocacy push on Capitol Hill.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21695?t=1012&akid=7729%2E5885482%2EQbL2_T ]Will you stand with Bernie and Our Revolution to demand Congress
PROTECTS Medicaid coverage and STOPS the GOP’s Trump 2.0 tax breaks for
billionaires?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21695?t=1013&akid=7729%2E5885482%2EQbL2_T ]ADD YOUR NAME

Trump continues to claim that he doesn’t want to cut Medicaid, Medicare,
or Social Security. So why are Musk and Trump’s band of loyalist House
Republicans pushing so hard for these cuts? Trump is trying to cover up
the devastating plan to cut the services that working class Americans rely
on.

Republicans want to add onerous work requirements to Medicaid so they can
kick people off their healthcare. They want to cut $2 trillion from
Medicaid and pass a $4.5 trillion tax break for the ultra-rich. They’re
coming after everything the majority of Americans need to live their lives
in order to fund more ridiculous tax cuts for yacht-buying CEOs and Big
Tech billionaires like Musk and Bezos.

Trump’s Authoritarian Capitalism will be built on destroying the social
safety net and this is the key legislative fight of 2025 that will
determine if he can succeed. That’s why we need to make a giant push to
stop Trump, Musk, and the GOP from winning this crucial battle.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21695?t=1014&akid=7729%2E5885482%2EQbL2_T ]Add your name now to join Bernie in the fight to protect Medicaid from
Musk-Trump!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21695?t=1015&akid=7729%2E5885482%2EQbL2_T ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee –

Elon Musk’s attempt to defund the NIH and cut the federal workforce is sending shockwaves through my district which is home to some of the country's top universities and research institutions.

[Peter, will you sign my petition to stop Elon Musk from defunding the NIH and help defend North Carolina’s science, innovation, and economy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102411839/529092027/-207471635?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_021825_1_1_NIH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjM1ZTczOS1mY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HE4JZMXm0NZduwk9X_aJGEURURKOW-HO9mHnlW28Ui4=&emci=9090ec33-fcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=1f35e739-fcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=799895) | [SIGN ON – DEFEND THE NIH](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102411841/529092031/-207471635?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_021825_1_1_NIH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjM1ZTczOS1mY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HE4JZMXm0NZduwk9X_aJGEURURKOW-HO9mHnlW28Ui4=&emci=9090ec33-fcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=1f35e739-fcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=799895)
---
As one of the top five states that receive NIH funding, Musk’s illegal plan would drain hundreds of millions of dollars from North Carolina’s economy and result in mass layoffs from our state's largest employers like UNC and Duke University.

The funding cuts would even apply to research grants already awarded, posing significant setbacks for the development of lifesaving medical breakthroughs that benefit the country and the world.

We must raise our voices to tell unelected billionaire Elon Musk that we will NOT allow him to dismantle our world-class scientific research to pay for his tax cut. [Will you sign my petition to defend the vital funding from the NIH for North Carolina’s research institutions?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102411843/529092033/-207471635?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_021825_1_1_NIH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjM1ZTczOS1mY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HE4JZMXm0NZduwk9X_aJGEURURKOW-HO9mHnlW28Ui4=&emci=9090ec33-fcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=1f35e739-fcee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=799895)

Valerie Foushee

body:
Why the idea isn't as crazy as some believe

| |
---|---|---

# [Greenbacks for Greenland?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=157459680&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NDU5NjgwLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzk5OTUzNTEsImV4cCI6MTc0MjU4NzM1MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.B0Cvy8bIw-gEm44KSDcuf1Hv2g8MVtvMuxy1K999H6E)
### Why the idea isn't as crazy as some believe
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| Feb 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=157459680&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NDU5NjgwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczOTk5NTM1MSwiZXhwIjoxNzQyNTg3MzUxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vPXC4i4KVwCbsHYLNkCB9891YtIX4isihYHec8rnp4M&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=157459680&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NDU5NjgwLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzk5OTUzNTEsImV4cCI6MTc0MjU4NzM1MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.B0Cvy8bIw-gEm44KSDcuf1Hv2g8MVtvMuxy1K999H6E&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=157459680&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NDU5NjgwLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzk5OTUzNTEsImV4cCI6MTc0MjU4NzM1MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.B0Cvy8bIw-gEm44KSDcuf1Hv2g8MVtvMuxy1K999H6E)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/greenbacks-for-greenland?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7bb1e69e-37d2-4d50-8182-2112be889d37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Even before he was sworn in to his second term, President Donald Trump's public musings about acquiring Greenland -- by purchase or by force -- left ordinary Americans and elites alike puzzled by the seemingly erratic attention being paid to the Arctic island.
But after the confusion (and mocking) subsided, Americans quickly learned of [Greenland's strategic importance to U.S. interests](https://substack.com/redirect/5ae6e967-a9f2-48e1-93db-bbe08530f726?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). John Bolton, a fierce Trump critic, explained that, despite his criticisms of Trump's method, Greenland had a direct impact on critical national security interests that affect "Canada, the United States, the entire NATO Alliance." Let me be more blunt: Greenland, and the Arctic more generally, is a [hotly-contested region in the rapidly expanding and escalating great power rivalry between the US and China](https://substack.com/redirect/26088061-d14b-4b92-83d3-cf7c871fe767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cea1ea40-98f5-461f-b1bf-0b6553446ce8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [https://www.petersonschriever.spaceforce.mil/Pituffik-SB-Greenland/](https://substack.com/redirect/bab12160-ae5d-4f23-b8fd-72973b603b70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Greenland has been historically seen as strategically important by America for several reasons, most importantly because it geographic location. During WWII, the U.S. pre-emptively seized the territory after Germany conquered Denmark to prevent the Nazis from using it as a U-boat base. Even today, the Greenland-Iceland-United Kingdom (GIUK) Gap is seen by NATO and American analysts as a strategic chokepoint for the Russian navy. Greenland's is also home to Pituffik Space Base (formerly Thule Air Force Base) and plays a big role in space surveillance and early warning systems to detect ballistic missile launches.
Mike Pompeo highlighted the region's importance in 2019 while he was US Secretary of State. He pointed out that receding ice could open up new sea lanes to commercial and military passage. These new routes, Pompeo noted, could trim 20 days off a trip between North America and Asia. In addition to sea lanes, receding ice could also lead to a natural resource bonanza. Some estimates point to $35 trillion worth of oil and natural gas reserves in the Arctic. Let's not forget that China announced a "polar silk route" in 2018 explicitly to exploit the economic and resource potential of the region.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e74bbeed-1e3e-4d0d-be51-d3167ae0e6bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The list of known mineral resources in Greenland is long, and includes zinc, lead, gold, iron ore, diamonds, copper, and uranium as well as the critical and rare-earth commodities needed to power electric cars and many of our devices. Greenland needs help developing these resources though, and for now the island country is heavily reliant on the public sector, fishing, and the Danish government. Meanwhile, the US is heavily reliant on China for the processing of rare earth metals and minerals.
The idea of the U.S. buying the island isn't as [crazy as some suggest](https://substack.com/redirect/4fccd783-2e73-4240-8a89-0af0e1a68f03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Not only is the U.S. no stranger to large purchases of territory (the Louisiana Purchase and Alaska come readily to mind), this also isn't the first time the U.S. eyed Greenland. Secretary of State William Seward had his eyes on it in 1868, a land swap was proposed by the U.S. ambassador to Denmark in 1910, and in 1946, Harry Truman tried to buy it for $100 million in gold bars. Even as late as 1955, the Pentagon proposed acquiring the island in a memo to President Dwight D. Eisenhower.
> **Not only is the U.S. no stranger to large purchases of territory (the Louisiana Purchase and Alaska come readily to mind), this also isn 't the first time the U.S. eyed Greenland.**
So, how does Greenland feel about this? Interestingly, Greenland has had an independence movement that has been gaining momentum. The island was granted home rule in 1979, then expanded its autonomy and made Greenlandic the official language in 2009. And before the pandemic, in 2019, a survey showed that 68 percent of Greenlanders supported independence, with 38 percent saying that they would vote for independence right away. Last year, the island officially declared independence as its ultimate goal and on March 11 of this year, Greenlanders are heading to the polls in an election that will have independence as its main issue.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-_nLp-AvN_UU0OhctuxqjSCNGnPDfCCSZsbw_G6vrY0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=157459680)
One speedbump on Greenland's road to independence is concern about the economic impact. Denmark still heavily subsidizes the world's largest island with a roughly $511 million block-grant, the equivalent of 20 percent of Greenland's GDP. But Trump's interest has emboldened those seeking independence for the island. Could greater economic ties with the U.S. give Greenlanders the confidence to pull away from Denmark? And might the U.S. gain a loyal security partner and access to natural resources, while simultaneously boxing out the Russians and Chinese?
For precedent for such a scenario, look no further than Teddy Roosevelt and Panama. After failing to come to terms with Colombia to build a canal in what was then the Colombian territory of Panama, the Rough Rider sent warships to back Panamanian independence in 1903; Roosevelt then cut a deal to build the Panama Canal with the newly independent country. _**It 's easy to imagine a similar scenario in the North Atlantic: The U.S. recognizes an independent Greenland, helps develop its economy, and in the process, **_**de facto** _**draws the island nation into the American economic and security sphere.**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7b925bea-beb2-4b3a-bffc-b2c30eb443fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
While these opening gambits have some in a frenzy about an aggressively expanding America, Trump may be telegraphing the opposite. The United States seems to be pulling back from foreign entanglements and focusing on America's vital interests in the Western Hemisphere and the Arctic. And in that light, Trump's comments about Greenland, Canada, and even the Panama Canal are not illogical or ill-conceived. We may be witnessing the rapid emergence of the Monroe Doctrine 2.0, something I've called the Trump Doctrine, in which the United States makes it clear to Russia, China, and Iran that the Western Hemisphere is off-limits.
| | POLL
---
What do you believe is the most likely future for Greenland? (3-5 years from today)

---|---|---
**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/a0e4744b-28e5-4ae7-91b5-816c0665f006?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/b0c79f6e-e7b1-4020-b4ba-dd7d7b7751a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/f901b5e3-a055-4965-8a70-9b332ab4cc8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

(3-5 years from today) | ? ? ? | | ---|---|--- VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, , and . Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. Navigating Uncertaintyis a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support our work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Invite your friends and earn rewards If you enjoy Navigating Uncertainty, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Kelan Publishing, LLC PO BOX 932, Lincoln, NH 03251 ? ?

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Faith, hope, and love in action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter — Faith, hope, and love are alive and well in Oregon communities. I saw all three in action as we unveiled a new living space for homeless families in need of stability before they transition to long-term housing. Multiple communities have stepped up to meet the challenges of our homelessness crisis and provide transitional housing to Oregonians in need. In Dallas, Oregon, they’ve opened 12 new shelter beds this month with 8 more coming in March. **Our focused efforts to tackle homelessness are projected to rehouse 3,300 households across the state and prevent another 24,000 households from experiencing homelessness in the first place.** This progress won’t just help people right now — it will change lives. I’m proud to support initiatives like these as Oregon’s Governor. I’m working with leaders across the state to build more affordable housing and get rid of red tape that slows down construction so all Oregon residents have a safe, affordable place to call home. **Let’s keep going, Peter.**[_**If you support my efforts to facilitate solutions to the homelessness crisis, please consider fueling my work with a contribution today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102411769/529091953/-1108825948?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmM0YWMyNS1mY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hh_5PRfkutCKLNaB97wRBd7c7-MdAOcYeSW5_d-qzfY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102411770/529091955/-1108825948?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmM0YWMyNS1mY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hh_5PRfkutCKLNaB97wRBd7c7-MdAOcYeSW5_d-qzfY=)

subject: hidden guns in schools and churches
body:
| |
---
Randy Fine is pushing legislation to allow concealed carry weapons on college campuses. Imagine what he’ll do in Congress. | [View in browser](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ2Nzk1NjUwODAwOTQ1MDg2LFwiclwiOjE0Njc5NTc1MzQ4NTg5NTExNn0iLCJzIjoiM2EyNTM4YzRiNGNmMDgzYSJ9)
| |

| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ2Nzk1NjUwODA4Mjg1MTIxLFwiclwiOjE0Njc5NTc1MzQ4NTg5NTExNn0iLCJzIjoiYjEwZDQ1NWU0NDY3ZDExNSJ9)
---
|
---
Team,

You don’t have to be anti-Second Amendment to recognize that this country has a persistent and serious problem with gun violence and mass shootings.

And it doesn’t make you anti-freedom to think that the solution to gun violence is **not** flooding our communities with even more guns and less tools to prevent shootings.

MAGA lunatics like my opponent, Randy Fine, think that everyone should be prepared at all times to fire a gun or be shot by one. To NRA goons like him, it’s _kill or be killed_.**

That’s why he is fighting to expand concealed carry on college campuses, claiming it is necessary to combat “Muslim terror”:**__**
**
|
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ2Nzk1NjUwODE1NjI1MTU0LFwiclwiOjE0Njc5NTc1MzQ4NTg5NTExNn0iLCJzIjoiMTNhMDUwNzc2NGEyYTdiOSJ9)
---
|
---
In a culture of fear, it is easier to exploit division and foster suspicion of our fellow Americans. That’s exactly how Trump and his MAGA cronies want us: frightened, angry, and ready to give up power to fake macho strongmen for “protection.”

But while politicians like Fine who are bought and sold by the NRA push this horrific vision of America, **_most voters don’t want this_**. Huge majorities support common sense measures to prevent gun violence and promote safety and security in public.

Our opponent is an extremist who will make us less safe everywhere: _even in churches and schools_. **Josh Weil is a public school teacher who will fight to make schools safe for our kids.**__**
**
|
---

clean_body: | | Randy Fine is pushing legislation to allow concealed carry weapons on college campuses. Imagine what he’ll do in Congress. | | | | | Team, You don’t have to be anti-Second Amendment to recognize that this country has a persistent and serious problem with gun violence and mass shootings. And it doesn’t make you anti-freedom to think that the solution to gun violence is not flooding our communities with even more guns and less tools to prevent shootings. MAGA lunatics like my opponent, Randy Fine, think that everyone should be prepared at all times to fire a gun or be shot by one. To NRA goons like him, it’s kill or be killed. That’s why he is fighting to expand concealed carry on college campuses, claiming it is necessary to combat “Muslim terror”: | | | In a culture of fear, it is easier to exploit division and foster suspicion of our fellow Americans. That’s exactly how Trump and his MAGA cronies want us: frightened, angry, and ready to give up power to fake macho strongmen for “protection.” But while politicians like Fine who are bought and sold by the NRA push this horrific vision of America, most voters don’t want this. Huge majorities support common sense measures to prevent gun violence and promote safety and security in public. Our opponent is an extremist who will make us less safe everywhere: even in churches and schools. Josh Weil is a public school teacher who will fight to make schools safe for our kids. | | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Josh Weil for Congress | | | | | | | | | Mail Checks to : Josh Weil for Congress PO Box 350345 Palm Coast, FL 32135 | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Josh Weil for Congress PO Box 350345 Palm Coast, FL 32135 | |

let’s cut to the chase

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102412726/529094874/-950381840?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_project2025_250219_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjQ5ZDYyMi1mZWVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I2A78pmGdHgBmcEHmjdcDEcO2IOu8lGZJ1DAnhRPht0=) Let’s be honest, Derek.**Donald Trump knew about Project 2025.**

How else can you explain that he has people with ties to the playbook serving in his administration AND that many of the presidential directives he’s signed in his first weeks mirror the priorities of Project 2025?

I mean, Russell Vought, the director of the Office of Management and Budget is literally the key author of Project 2025. How much more obvious can you be?

The truth is, Donald Trump doesn’t respect the American people enough to admit he supported Project 2025 from the get go. But if you take one look at many of his early actions in office, they not only achieve, _but expand_ , on proposals from the playbook.

[_**Just remember that every day in Washington, I will do everything in my power to stop Project 2025 from hurting Virginians and all Americans. Will you pitch in $5 so I can keep up this work in the Senate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102412727/529094875/-950381840?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_project2025_250219_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjQ5ZDYyMi1mZWVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I2A78pmGdHgBmcEHmjdcDEcO2IOu8lGZJ1DAnhRPht0=)

# Wednesday, February 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** Today, I'm excited to introduce our partner, [**Pacaso**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80D1r8zAQwPFPI282p5Otl0HD8xCypWtHo0jnWGDZwlLS9NsXp1Do0vXuB3f83y_jxcUlrrc3l8jW57SNgUL0rlIYAVtuWhzGvgn2CsHwhixXwhgjpcBmtrr3YFBKMloNXGqpBAX00vVceClUEy0CDoDcICDA0KHX_DpdezV4pMkY1gOFWLe9qzNVeroyLZ_bg_bOb6lZ7FxrLkz8Y3hmeI7rg0rtsvOubIc4xuJ8r2ks2333xMSJkosLQ-lSZuL_sUoU4j0xccouhja7va60lznmX8q7lF28rS_3Q7iGVhj93WLkoAYtBGgwzW5D_ojLEotUrIfbcfb1dP2j48PiVwAAAP__c8N09w), the market leader in vacation home co-ownership. They're changing the way people invest in and enjoy luxury second homes--and they've opened up an investment opportunity to our readers. You'll find all the details below. Thanks, as always, for your time and support. --Cole, _CEO_
* * *
[](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kD2P4yAQQH8N7mwNg42hoDgpSpdrr7QwDDGSsZEhuey_Xzm72nLb9540H_9u083GNW73vzaRqa-wT558dLaSnwBbrlscpr7xZgaveUOGj0JrLaXAZjGklZxHq4RUSvbBBTvrgE54QOGIQxMNAg6AXCMgwNChU3wOcz8ODilozXogH-t-dHWhSi9bwvqxP-no3J6a1Sy15sLEH4ZXhte4PanULltny34WJxbXR01T2R-HIyYulGxcGcoTJvLxkZi4ZBt9m-1RNzrKEvO3dzZlG-_bu_iRXEErtPq6f-IwDkoIUKCbw_j8P65rLHJkPdzPUe9F6y-_exr8DAAA__9WEnJc) When the team that built Zillow into a $16B real estate leader launches a new company, it's worth paying attention. That's why top firms like **SoftBank** and **Maveron** have already backed their latest venture, Pacaso, a company that's transforming the $1.3 trillion vacation home market. [Pacaso's](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kD2P4yAQQH8N7mwNg42hoDgpSpdrr7QwDDGSsZEhuey_Xzm72nLb9540H_9u083GNW73vzaRqa-wT558dLaSnwBbrlscpr7xZgaveUOGj0JrLaXAZjGklZxHq4RUSvbBBTvrgE54QOGIQxMNAg6AXCMgwNChU3wOcz8ODilozXogH-t-dHWhSi9bwvqxP-no3J6a1Sy15sLEH4ZXhte4PanULltny34WJxbXR01T2R-HIyYulGxcGcoTJvLxkZi4ZBt9m-1RNzrKEvO3dzZlG-_bu_iRXEErtPq6f-IwDkoIUKCbw_j8P65rLHJkPdzPUe9F6y-_exr8DAAA__9WEnJc) streamlined digital marketplace is leading the co-ownership revolution, making luxury vacation homes accessible, fully utilized, and hassle-free. And the results speak for themselves: **$1B+ in transactions** , **1,500+ happy homeowners** across **40 destinations** , and **$100M in gross profits** in just four years. Now, after **record-breaking sales in Paris** , Pacaso is turning its focus to international expansion. Thanks, as always, for your time and support. --Cole, CEO When the team that built Zillow into a $16B real estate leader launches a new company, it's worth paying attention. That's why top firms like SoftBank and Maveron have already backed their latest venture, Pacaso, a company that's transforming the $1.3 trillion vacation home market. streamlined digital marketplace is leading the co-ownership revolution, making luxury vacation homes accessible, fully utilized, and hassle-free. And the results speak for themselves: $1B+ in transactions , 1,500+ happy homeowners across 40 destinations , and $100M in gross profits in just four years. Now, after record-breaking sales in Paris , Pacaso is turning its focus to international expansion. They've already added 7 homes in Cabo and recently finalized the purchase of their most expensive European home yet in London. But with this expansion already underway, their current share price won 't last long. ** This is a paid advertisement for Pacaso's Regulation A offering. name: Senator Mark Huizenga
subject: District Update
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| Dear friends,
Serving as your State Senator is a privilege, and my commitment goes beyond representations of our community. My goal is to keep you well-informed and engaged in the latest developments in Lansing and our district. Stay tuned for updates, as transparency is of utmost importance to me. With each passing day is another opportunity to work towards bringing back a Republican Senate majority. I appreciate your ongoing support, and I am grateful for the opportunity to keep working hard for our community.
---
|
---
| **Protecting Tipped Workers**
Last week I was proud to support a bipartisan solution that will protect tens of thousands of Michigan jobs, particularly for servers, bartenders, and local restaurants. For months, we’ve been calling for action to save the tipped wage, and now we have a workable solution that allows workers to keep their tips and ensures family restaurants remain open. After listening to both restaurant owners and servers, I’m pleased to see us come together to do the right thing. I will continue working with both parties and the business community to find responsible solutions for all Michiganders.
---
|
---
| **Governor Whitmer’s Budget Falls Short**
My priorities are to invest in our children, fix our roads, protect our communities, and address the challenges facing Michigan families. While the governor’s budget includes an increase in school funding, it falls short by focusing taxpayer dollars on unproven government programs rather than providing essential tax relief to Michigan families. Instead of easing the burden on struggling families, the governor’s proposal raises taxes, adding to the financial strain at a time when our children’s education is in decline. This budget ignores the real needs of Michigan families and fails to deliver meaningful solutions.
---
|
---
| **Thank you!**
Your efforts are truly impactful. By contributing, you’re helping us advocate for the changes and reforms our community needs. Every donation, no matter the size, fuels our mission and ensures a brighter future for all. Join us in shaping a better tomorrow; donate today!
---
| [Donate Here!](https://takeitbackmi.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=53b70145fc&e=9ec31248a9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/brightsparkstrategies/district-update-0d30m3lk2i?e=9ec31248a9)Paid for by:
Take it Back Super PAC * 106 W. Allegan, Ste. 200 * Lansing, MI 48933 * USA
[update your preferences](https://takeitbackmi.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=1777d46eea&e=9ec31248a9&c=4e8479b2ee) or [unsubscribe](https://takeitbackmi.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f3a7dccdb3ca90c7483cf93d3&id=1777d46eea&t=b&e=9ec31248a9&c=4e8479b2ee)
---

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Humbly asking you: Don’t skip this email...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
VoteVets, first and foremost, is an organization aimed at supporting Veterans. At the end of the day we are focused on improving outcomes and care for all Veterans, regardless of their politics.
#
Peter:
VoteVets, first and foremost, is an organization aimed at supporting Veterans. At the end of the day we are focused on improving outcomes and care for all Veterans, regardless of their politics.
If someone signed on to serve — no matter when, no matter the branch, no matter the ribbons on their chest, no matter who they voted for — it’s our fundamental belief that our country has a moral, ethical, and legally binding duty to care for them.
As you read this, that obligation is being abandoned.
Over the last week we’ve heard story after story of Veterans kicked to the curb by the Trump administration and the richest man on earth. Disabled Veterans fired from VA hospitals. VA staff, employed for years, terminated because they switched jobs. Veterans who served in uniform, employed by the Department of Education or USDA or Forest Service or National Parks — thousands of them fired.
These aren’t parasites. They are your friends, neighbors, and family.
They even fired folks working the Veterans Crisis Line. Remember when everybody cared that 22 Veterans took their lives every day? Trump and Elon just fired some of the people tasked with answering the phone.
There’s no time to waste. Lives are on the line. Each of us has to decide if we’re going to fight for everything we’ve worked for or let Trump and Elon take it all away.
VoteVets is going to be on the front line of that fight. We might not be able to stop every single thing they try to do, but we sure as hell are going to make them regret it.
If that sounds good to you, please:
[**Make a donation to VoteVets and help us keep going. We depend on contributions from supporters like you to power our work.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb25.EILYhu&refcode=em250219-1-f&t=1&akid=34185%2E3013755%2EnEQKV-)

clean_body: VoteVets, first and foremost, is an organization aimed at supporting Veterans. At the end of the day we are focused on improving outcomes and care for all Veterans, regardless of their politics. Peter: VoteVets, first and foremost, is an organization aimed at supporting Veterans. At the end of the day we are focused on improving outcomes and care for all Veterans, regardless of their politics. If someone signed on to serve — no matter when, no matter the branch, no matter the ribbons on their chest, no matter who they voted for — it’s our fundamental belief that our country has a moral, ethical, and legally binding duty to care for them. As you read this, that obligation is being abandoned. Over the last week we’ve heard story after story of Veterans kicked to the curb by the Trump administration and the richest man on earth. Disabled Veterans fired from VA hospitals. VA staff, employed for years, terminated because they switched jobs. Veterans who served in uniform, employed by the Department of Education or USDA or Forest Service or National Parks — thousands of them fired. These aren’t parasites. They are your friends, neighbors, and family. They even fired folks working the Veterans Crisis Line. Remember when everybody cared that 22 Veterans took their lives every day? Trump and Elon just fired some of the people tasked with answering the phone. There’s no time to waste. Lives are on the line. Each of us has to decide if we’re going to fight for everything we’ve worked for or let Trump and Elon take it all away. VoteVets is going to be on the front line of that fight. We might not be able to stop every single thing they try to do, but we sure as hell are going to make them regret it. If that sounds good to you, please: - If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | - ** | - | | - | - | | - | - ** Thank you. name: Amanda Chase
subject: What you can expect today? Thursday, Feb 20
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
The 2025 General Assembly Session
| | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
---
| 2025 SESSION Thursday What can you expect?
---
|
### SESSION BEGINS AT 10AM
---
|
# AMANDA CHASE
---
|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
| Dear Hello It was a long day on the Senate floor today. And there are still about 35 bills on the regular calendar that will have to be heard on the Senate floor tomorrow.
I've listed those for you below.
You will see bills about government using high-risk artificial intelligence, development of bleeding control programs in public schools, and more SOL reforms, just for starters.
Legislators are also working on their conference assignments on bills that were assigned to conference committees for differences to be hashed out.
Bills that are waiting on action from either the House or the Senate are still in play as legislators either approve or reject amendments from bills made by the other house body. Amendments are simply small tweaks to one or two sentences in a bill. Sometimes the amendments are accepted. Sometimes they are rejected. If the amendments are rejected, that's when the bill is assigned to a conference committee.
It's always been amazing to me how efficiently the Senate hears and votes on thousands of bills within the 30 or 45 day session deadline, which is coming up this Saturday.
Keep in mind they still have to vote on the final vote. Legislators are given 48 hours to review the final budget proposed by both the House and Senate conferees.

---
| |
---
One question you may have asked yourself is, what bills did my Senator or Delegate introduce this year?
Click for a full listing of legislators [here.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gs31GCSNZMqWnpq3ZvvAxXwAdv5dwgsjNHEEgfKt4dE0VmKd59rcF3qk_a9fCuhx921UBrCaeTNQR-YIZNUg4s-wjBk6IrnalHE2pTcO9MQlIBZETu0QO39U9ip6oZMJsKs4H6LCuf89O1IpLIenmU-RdE2LeRn4xRzQKfCpK9vSNsvkMvGyO0M_VEYZzVM7CqYtMt-LNRRsLCkWmodf4w==&c=HnkguJ1NO5k4QlF1Z0difWA4QJvBoupGdX2eEO1Dz30909ioYaUYAQ==&ch=yM0vFe88EVH6PVXrkQOqXOTIOak8BnLc1WsnWifIMSySbdquZX9Npw==) Then click on "chief patron" to see what bills were sponsored. You have the ability to click on each bill, review the bill summary and even follow the bill to see which legislators voted up or down on the bill.
As we wind down all legislation for the 2025 Legislative Session, Governor Youngkin is gearing up. All of the bills that passed both the Democrat controlled House and Senate will end up on his desk. Here bills will be signed into law, vetoed or the Governor will offer amendments that have to be approved by both bodies, the House and the Senate.
By now I hope you can begin to appreciate all of the work a bill must go through before becoming law. I hope you will also notice that getting bills passed is mostly a numbers game. Whichever party has the majority is the one that controls the makeup of each subcommittee and committee. Under the current environment, if the Democrats don't like your bill, it's not going to pass.

---
| "A wise and frugal government, which shall leave men free to regulate their own pursuits of industry and improvement, and shall not take from the mouth of labor the bread it has earned -- this is the sum of good government." - Thomas Jefferson
