**The radical Left is at it again** - doing everything they can to **BLOCK** President Trump's nominee to lead the FBI, Kash Patel. They want to keep Trump's and Senate Republicans' America First agenda from succeeding. These Senate Democrats don't care about the will of the people. They want to obstruct, delay, and destroy.

I'm SICK of their games. _I've had ENOUGH._ And I know you have, too.

They don't want President Trump to have his team in place because they fear what we'll do-SECURE the border, CRUSH inflation, and PUT AMERICA FIRST.

**Well, I've got a message for them:** _We aren't backing down. We aren't rolling over. And we sure as heck aren't letting them sabotage President Trump._

It's time to send a message so loud, so undeniable, that even the most corrupt and incompetent Democrats in the Senate can't ignore it.

name: Team Ilhan
subject: They’re just lying
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
They know nobody on their side will hold them accountable for being wrong
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1521%2E791427%2EgHp9hF)

Team, at some point under Donald Trump’s leadership, the Republican party decided that they should just lie to the American people.
Really, they just lie and lie about anything they want because they know nobody on their side will hold them accountable for being wrong.
Just look at Elon Musk’s DOGE.
The other day they claimed on their website to have saved taxpayers $8 billion by cutting a contract that turned out to only be **$8 million.** _Huge difference._ To put that in perspective, $8 million is only 0.1% of $8 billion.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3103?t=2&akid=1521%2E791427%2EgHp9hF)
But did they correct that mistake? Of course not, they just removed the screenshot on their own website that proved they were lying about how much money they saved. And now it seems they even changed the amount in the federal database to cover their screwup:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3104?t=3&akid=1521%2E791427%2EgHp9hF)
Another lie: Elon Musk tweeted that there are millions of people with a listed age of 120 years or older in the Social Security system, receiving fraudulent checks. Trump repeated the claim at a press conference, too. If true, it would be a multi-billion dollar fraud.
But it turns out Elon just didn’t understand how the Social Security Administration codes their data. Funny how he missed that, since he considers himself one of the smartest men in the world.
Associated Press:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3105?t=4&akid=1521%2E791427%2EgHp9hF)
Washington Post:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3106?t=5&akid=1521%2E791427%2EgHp9hF)
So now that this lie was easily debunked, did Elon correct himself? Of course not, because lying is part of their strategy. And the millions and millions of people who saw his lie on Twitter or heard Trump lie on the news will not see these fact checks.
**Friend — It’s clear that DOGE is turning out to be exactly what we expected: A way for Elon and Trump to justify more tax-breaks and handouts for the mega-rich based on “savings” that are either unconstitutional or flat-out incorrect.**
If we want to stand up for the truth against a flood of lies, it will take more than just a few fact checks.
We have to build a big, diverse, and durable movement to oppose Trump and Musk. A movement that will bring the truth to each and every community in this country and fight for the _real_ solutions that will help Americans, not misguided ploys like DOGE.
Solutions like providing healthcare, housing, and education so every American can thrive. Solutions that lift people up rather than cut them down.
**[If you’re with us in the fight against lies, corruption, and the attacks on the working class of this country, please make a donation towards our movement today. We will keep confronting Trump and Musk in every way we can, but we need to know you have our backs.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb25.YmER0g&refcode=em250219-1-120&t=6&akid=1521%2E791427%2EgHp9hF)

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: The Midwest is the true battleground. Let’s fight for it.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102413576/529098262/1514584251?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgyYmEzMC0wMmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3OZjEXIhGXI6g1306Shly71cnv-GS8SQ_bs1Xa7phE=)
Hey Peter, I’ve been hearing from a lot of folks lately who are frustrated—who feel like Democrats are being outmaneuvered while our values, our communities, and even our democracy itself are under attack. I get it. I feel it too. **But here’s the thing: we can’t just sit back and watch it happen. We have to fight back.** That’s why I started Storm PAC. While national headlines focus on House races in New York and California, the real battleground for control of Congress is right here in the Midwest. If we’re going to stop Trump’s allies from flipping the House, we need to protect and support the Democrats fighting in tough Midwestern districts like mine. [**Can you pitch in now to help us hold the line in the Midwest? Every dollar goes directly toward defending and flipping battleground House seats.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102413577/529098263/1361552421?refcode=em-2.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgyYmEzMC0wMmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3OZjEXIhGXI6g1306Shly71cnv-GS8SQ_bs1Xa7phE=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102413578/529098264/1361552421?refcode=em-2.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgyYmEzMC0wMmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3OZjEXIhGXI6g1306Shly71cnv-GS8SQ_bs1Xa7phE=)
---
**I’ve seen some Democrats turn to consultants and five-point plans for answers. I’ll be honest, I’ve never been a fan of that approach.** When I ran for Congress in 2022, the political establishment told me not to. They said I couldn’t win, that I’d cost Democrats the seat. But I didn’t listen to the so-called experts. I listened to my community. And I won.
Now, I’m taking action again. We’ve seen what happens when we show up, invest in the right races, and push back against the GOP’s attacks. The path to **a Democratic majority runs through heartland states like Illinois, Michigan, and Wisconsin.** We have to invest now to hold the line.
[**I’m not waiting for some consultant’s strategy memo. I’m asking you to take action with me today. Can you chip in to Storm PAC? Every dollar goes directly toward defending and flipping key House seats in the Midwest.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102413579/529098265/1361552421?refcode=em-2.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgyYmEzMC0wMmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3OZjEXIhGXI6g1306Shly71cnv-GS8SQ_bs1Xa7phE=)
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102413580/529098266/1361552421?refcode=em-2.19.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgyYmEzMC0wMmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3OZjEXIhGXI6g1306Shly71cnv-GS8SQ_bs1Xa7phE=)
---
Be well, and thanks for being in this fight with me.
-Eric
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102413581/529098267/779985510?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgyYmEzMC0wMmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3OZjEXIhGXI6g1306Shly71cnv-GS8SQ_bs1Xa7phE=&emci=329bb929-02ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=b682ba30-02ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102413582/529098268/-1582993359?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgyYmEzMC0wMmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3OZjEXIhGXI6g1306Shly71cnv-GS8SQ_bs1Xa7phE=&emci=329bb929-02ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=b682ba30-02ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102413583/529098269/988740625?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgyYmEzMC0wMmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3OZjEXIhGXI6g1306Shly71cnv-GS8SQ_bs1Xa7phE=&emci=329bb929-02ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=b682ba30-02ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=18052858) Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, [consider making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102413584/529098270/1514584251?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgyYmEzMC0wMmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3OZjEXIhGXI6g1306Shly71cnv-GS8SQ_bs1Xa7phE=)

Conservatives across the country stepped up and signed their names to protect our democracy. But, if I don't receive another 18 signatures before 11:59 PM, I’m afraid we won't have the grassroots support necessary to protect our democracy and save the integrity of our elections from the Democrats' electioneering schemes once and for all. And your name is still MISSING from my final tally. name: Team Bonta
subject: Rob’s top priority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250219&t=1&akid=1648%2E1088799%2ElAIBHF)
This week, Rob issued felony charges against a man suspected of running an **illegal assault weapons manufacturing operation out of his garage.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250219?refcode=em20250219-1648&amount=5&refcode2=1648_1088799_lAIBHF&akid=1648%2E1088799%2ElAIBHF)
The charges came after the Department of Justice investigated the suspect, who tried selling silencers and assault weapons at a local gun show. After searching his residence, we found and seized eight illegal assault rifles, and a cache of handguns, rifles, large-capacity magazines, and ammunition.
**Protecting public safety and California communities from the threat of gun violence is Rob’s top priority as our state’s chief law enforcement officer.**
While California has some of the strongest gun violence prevention laws in the country, Rob is making sure to hold those who skirt those laws accountable.
**[As Rob continues to do everything in his power to keep deadly weapons of war off our streets, will you support our campaign with a grassroots contribution of $5 or more today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250219?refcode=em20250219-1648&amount=5&refcode2=1648_1088799_lAIBHF&akid=1648%2E1088799%2ElAIBHF)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250219?refcode=em20250219-1648&amount=5&refcode2=1648_1088799_lAIBHF&akid=1648%2E1088799%2ElAIBHF)**
— Team Bonta
* * *

subject: 🚨BREAKING: Illinois Review Vindicated by Unanimous Decision
body:
view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/3b525117b4e9/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10350831?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=8abfee6d9f) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=8abfee6d9f)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
This IR e-Blast Powered By:
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this conservative news alert from Illinois Review, the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 IllinoisReview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
State Election Board Vindicates Illinois Review in 6-0 Vote as Mayor Pekau Allies Fail to Silence Conservative Voice (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/02/state-election-board-vindicates-illinois-review-in-6-0-vote-as-mayor-pekau-allies-fail-to-silence-conservative-voice.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/02/state-election-board-vindicates-illinois-review-in-6-0-vote-as-mayor-pekau-allies-fail-to-silence-conservative-voice.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(BRITTA PEDERSEN/AFP/Getty Images)
By Illinois Review

On Tuesday, the Illinois State Board of Elections ruled unanimously 6-0 in favor of Illinois Review after allies of Republican Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau filed a frivolous case in 2023 meant to intimidate and silence the conservative news publication.

During a hearing in downtown Chicago on Tuesday, ISBE general counsel Marni Malowitz characterized the complaint against IR as “impinging on First Amendment rights.”

On August 1, 2023, Illinois Review broke news that Orland Park mayor Keith Pekau and his village trustees were using taxpayer-funded village resources to run his failed congressional campaign against incumbent U.S. Rep. Sean Casten (D-IL).
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/02/state-election-board-vindicates-illinois-review-in-6-0-vote-as-mayor-pekau-allies-fail-to-silence-conservative-voice.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau during a village board meeting on May 1, 2023. (Source: Orland Park YouTube)
Days later, William Healy, an Orland Park village trustee and close ally of Pekau, filed a complaint against Illinois Review General Counsel Scott Kaspar. Healy, a CPA, remains under investigation by the Federal Election Commission for allegedly comingling state and federal campaign contributions relating to Mayor Pekau’s failed congressional bid.

At a preliminary hearing in October 2023, the ISBE hearing officer found that Kaspar and IR editor-in-chief Mark Vargas had done nothing wrong – and that Illinois Review was an independent and long-standing news organization not under the purview of the Board’s election authority.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/02/state-election-board-vindicates-illinois-review-in-6-0-vote-as-mayor-pekau-allies-fail-to-silence-conservative-voice.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
IR’s Scott Kaspar testifies before the Illinois State Board of Election on Friday, July 26, 2024. (Illinois Review)
Despite the hearing officer’s decision, allies of senior IL GOP leaders ignored the report that found no wrongdoing – and instead, requested that the case go to the next round regardless of the preliminary ruling.

On July 29, 2024, almost a year later, Vargas and Kaspar testified for a second time. But on Tuesday, the case was finally dismissed in a 6-0 vote.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/02/state-election-board-vindicates-illinois-review-in-6-0-vote-as-mayor-pekau-allies-fail-to-silence-conservative-voice.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
IR’s Mark Vargas testifies before the Illinois State Board of Election on Friday, July 26, 2024. (Illinois Review)
Censoring media outlets is typical in third world countries ruled by dictators. In Russia, President Vladamir Putin signed a law that criminalizes news publications from reporting on anything that contradicts, or is critical of his administration.

In China, a country that leads the world in jailing reporters, there are an estimated 274 journalists currently in prison for reporting on stories that angered the ruling Communist political party – and citizen journalist Zhang Zahn sits in a Chinese prison for her reporting the facts during the pandemic.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/02/state-election-board-vindicates-illinois-review-in-6-0-vote-as-mayor-pekau-allies-fail-to-silence-conservative-voice.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8abfee6d9f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Russian President Vladimir Putin and Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing in October. (Sergei Guneyev / Kremlin Pool Photo via AP file)
In Iran, there are 41 journalists in prison for writing stories that exposed the corruption of Iranian authorities.

Jim Dodge, a former Orland Park clerk and trustee, is challenging Pekau in the mayoral primary on April 1.

clean_body: view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this conservative news alert from Illinois Review, the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () State Election Board Vindicates Illinois Review in 6-0 Vote as Mayor Pekau Allies Fail to Silence Conservative Voice () (BRITTA PEDERSEN/AFP/Getty Images) By Illinois Review On Tuesday, the Illinois State Board of Elections ruled unanimously 6-0 in favor of Illinois Review after allies of Republican Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau filed a frivolous case in 2023 meant to intimidate and silence the conservative news publication. During a hearing in downtown Chicago on Tuesday, ISBE general counsel Marni Malowitz characterized the complaint against IR as “impinging on First Amendment rights.” On August 1, 2023, Illinois Review broke news that Orland Park mayor Keith Pekau and his village trustees were using taxpayer-funded village resources to run his failed congressional campaign against incumbent U.S. Rep. Sean Casten (D-IL). Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau during a village board meeting on May 1, 2023. (Source: Orland Park YouTube) Days later, William Healy, an Orland Park village trustee and close ally of Pekau, filed a complaint against Illinois Review General Counsel Scott Kaspar. Healy, a CPA, remains under investigation by the Federal Election Commission for allegedly comingling state and federal campaign contributions relating to Mayor Pekau’s failed congressional bid. At a preliminary hearing in October 2023, the ISBE hearing officer found that Kaspar and IR editor-in-chief Mark Vargas had done nothing wrong – and that Illinois Review was an independent and long-standing news organization not under the purview of the Board’s election authority. IR’s Scott Kaspar testifies before the Illinois State Board of Election on Friday, July 26, 2024. (Illinois Review) Despite the hearing officer’s decision, allies of senior IL GOP leaders ignored the report that found no wrongdoing – and instead, requested that the case go to the next round regardless of the preliminary ruling. On July 29, 2024, almost a year later, Vargas and Kaspar testified for a second time. But on Tuesday, the case was finally dismissed in a 6-0 vote. IR’s Mark Vargas testifies before the Illinois State Board of Election on Friday, July 26, 2024. (Illinois Review) Censoring media outlets is typical in third world countries ruled by dictators. In Russia, President Vladamir Putin signed a law that criminalizes news publications from reporting on anything that contradicts, or is critical of his administration. In China, a country that leads the world in jailing reporters, there are an estimated 274 journalists currently in prison for reporting on stories that angered the ruling Communist political party – and citizen journalist Zhang Zahn sits in a Chinese prison for her reporting the facts during the pandemic. Russian President Vladimir Putin and Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing in October. (Sergei Guneyev / Kremlin Pool Photo via AP file) In Iran, there are 41 journalists in prison for writing stories that exposed the corruption of Iranian authorities. Jim Dodge, a former Orland Park clerk and trustee, is challenging Pekau in the mayoral primary on April 1. We were denied entry. What did Elon have to say about it? “👋” Peter, this isn’t a f***ing joke. An unelected billionaire has seized control of a checkbook for the entire federal government and the sensitive information of hundreds of millions of Americans... including you, Peter. There’s no telling what he’s doing with your information behind closed doors. So we’re not laughing – we’re fighting the hell back. Unchecked power like this from someone that NOBODY elected is an exact warning sign of fascism. I will not allow it to continue, but I need your help to keep fighting. And if you wanna beat an unelected billionaire, you need a lot of grassroots help. [**So, Peter, will you split a donation between me and Collective PAC right now to help us keep advocating for oversight, defending our rights, and to send a message to Elon that he can’t just do whatever he wants without consequences? >>**](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtVZMoUzmrpmQzZz1dPuCDsmLB8s_CWOX6KXrRp0AyqsJLpFhlw5SEgfGLjknIo2NOPrlp2JarZJ5FIFP_t8fRA8Q-_ahCNs2a6Sv1NsBRqj46L0KWe0Cq4gif831wvpwZQTUaT_EqYvrLry9wvMwIB9Uk4-ESZPrrmmd9sll3QMpDIYmfsIT3MNzRYibEXOwZXXbZdtw1IATTpa-0NsPs3mHRPVj8MuUlYlOZb9SCPuGLQjizT1zE96vNTj9aPAa8gcuvyhyvBZuOyrEabZroEcn_gnfSnJbDWqH8o8epkJkHZ6zBeIlENWhzjNBX1gv1-j--C89qWjaNGcXkM3GiJ5R03xskgAmE5YVuJb5EmFw/4e5/Yu9MuPIUTiK6AaDjhUWVHg/h3/h001.RMkXmD4WRHOLONvf1A0Hwq6J-6CR5pdN60IM_3S6d8g) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Maxwell Frost and Collective PAC immediately.

name: Constitutional Nightmare. (via VPP)
subject: “Trump Muses About a Third Term”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
NO! NO! NO!!!
| | This is an unconstitutional NIGHTMARE: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86969?t=6&akid=18960%2E878179%2E1o5YSS) **_We can’t just sit back and let Trump completely disregard the rule of law!_**

We need to RAPIDLY organize to stop Trump from serving any longer than he has to. _He’s already done _enough_ damage to our Democracy!_

Peter — I hope this clears things up: Republicans and their billionaire donors are using DEI in place of _much more offensive_ terms to disparage people of color, women, and queer people. While fires raged through Main Street and Palisades, Elon Musk said that “DEI means people die” about the Los Angeles Fire Department’s response to the California wildfires. **This is beyond wrong, and it's harming people from all walks of life.** When the most powerful people in our country talk down to marginalized groups, the most extreme among their supporters are emboldened to do the same — if not much worse. Their dog whistling is a complete and utter distraction from the fact that Trump has _no plans_ to provide any sensible leadership as our nation's president. [**I'm urging Republicans to drop their obsession with DEI, stop scapegoating and attacking helpful programs that increase accessibility for everyone, and focus on pressing issues like disaster relief and lowering costs. Please, add your name in support if you're with me:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102414948/529102467/-645402128?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmNjZDU2OC0wNWVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QgBy0IhMa2zpPVp7E7WjHRLQGfuP_DyQIhR1GyPsJS0=&emci=43bdec61-05ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=62ccd568-05ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=43402272) | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102414949/529102468/-645402128?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmNjZDU2OC0wNWVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QgBy0IhMa2zpPVp7E7WjHRLQGfuP_DyQIhR1GyPsJS0=&emci=43bdec61-05ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=62ccd568-05ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=43402272)

clean_body: | = Peter — I hope this clears things up: Republicans and their billionaire donors are using DEI in place of much more offensive terms to disparage people of color, women, and queer people. While fires raged through Main Street and Palisades, Elon Musk said that “DEI means people die” about the Los Angeles Fire Department’s response to the California wildfires. This is beyond wrong, and it's harming people from all walks of life. When the most powerful people in our country talk down to marginalized groups, the most extreme among their supporters are emboldened to do the same — if not much worse. Their dog whistling is a complete and utter distraction from the fact that Trump has no plans to provide any sensible leadership as our nation's president. | Thanks for reading and taking action with me. It’s time we get back to making progress. — Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

The MAGA crowd has made it very clear: **They think they can silence our voices and ignore our needs while deepening their pockets.**
But here’s the bottom line — whether they like it or not, _the Youth Vote is going to be heard_. **NextGen is going to make sure of it.**
I won’t lie, the hatred and vitriol coming out of Trump’s camp is insane.
They’re coming for trans people who serve our country in the military. They’re coming for young women everywhere with extreme abortion bans and threats to reproductive care. They’re coming for vulnerable communities and families with threats of mass deportation.
**They’re coming for people like me.**
**They’re coming for all of us.**
But if I know one thing about the Youth Vote, it’s that we won’t keep silent while our rights and futures are being threatened. NextGen is working nonstop to empower young Americans everywhere to make a difference, at the ballot box and beyond.
For us to succeed, we’re going to need the resources to reach the Youth Vote where they are. From targeted online actions to election prep in key states, we need supporters like you on our side to help us win this fight for our future.

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Sarah McBride
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Sarah McBride is a proven champion for all of her constituents.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250219-1&t=1&akid=1757%2E587540%2E8FXw47)
Peter, we were proud to help elect Sarah McBride to Congress in November.
As the first openly trans member of Congress, Sarah is an undeniable trailblazer.
But it became clear from her record in the Delaware State Senate and our early conversations with Sarah that she wasn’t running for Congress to focus solely on LGBTQ+ issues. **Sarah has proven herself a champion for _all_ of her constituents.**
While MAGA Republicans engage in a hateful campaign against Sarah — voting for a rule to police which bathroom she uses and misgendering her on the House floor — she’s been undeterred in her fight for Delaware and the American people.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250219-1?refcode=em20250219-1757&amount=5&refcode2=1757_587540_8FXw47&akid=1757%2E587540%2E8FXw47)
**Sarah has already introduced her first bill in Congress, targeting predatory credit repair companies who financially fleece the most vulnerable Americans.**
This is what Leaders We Deserve is all about – electing young candidates who are running to not only make history, but to get to work making peoples’ lives better.
**[Can you split a $5 contribution between Sarah McBride and Leaders We Deserve to support Sarah’s fight in Congress and help elect more folks like her?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250219-1?refcode=em20250219-1757&amount=5&refcode2=1757_587540_8FXw47&akid=1757%2E587540%2E8FXw47)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250219-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250219-1757&refcode2=1757_587540_8FXw47&akid=1757%2E587540%2E8FXw47)**
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250219-1&t=2&refcode2=1757_587540_8FXw47&akid=1757%2E587540%2E8FXw47)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1757%2E587540%2E8FXw47)

name: Abigail Spanberger for Governor HQ
subject: Abigail’s opponent is doubling down on her support for Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:

_**Does Abigail’s opponent really think Virginians have been better off under Trump’s leadership these past few weeks?**_ Virginians are already feeling the sting of Trump’s federal funding freeze, his reckless tariffs, and his efforts to fire thousands of career public servants (many of whom call Virginia home).

These policies aren’t just abstract ideas — they’re affecting real families. Workers in Virginia are facing uncertainty, and tariffs could really hurt local and small businesses. And if Trump’s plan moves forward, it will hurt Virginia’s economy.

As Governor, Abigail will advocate for policies that benefit working Virginians, not play destructive political games. But she needs your support. name: Team Sykes
subject: Fighting for rail safety
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Two years after the devastating derailment in East Palestine
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102415347/529103871/985656371?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.19_b1_ts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdlMTc4My0wN2VmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HtsrMb9XqU7d3WIBB9EN5PfzuS5INmKbCskVlAg0pJY=) Peter, It’s been two years since the devastating train derailment in East Palestine, but Emilia hasn’t stopped fighting for those affected. **That’s why she has re-introduced the bipartisan _RAIL Act_ , which aims to improve railroad safety and protect communities from the harmful impact of derailments.** **It’s just one way that Emilia is fighting for Ohioans.** Throughout her time in Congress, Emilia has never lost sight of what matters most. Whether it means working across the aisle to deliver progress, or going to the mat over defending vital programs – **Emilia will always put people over politics.** **[Her work is possible thanks in part to grassroots supporters like you, Peter. So please, will you chip in $10 to our campaign to support Emilia’s work delivering for Ohioans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102415348/529103872/985656371?&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.19_b1_ts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdlMTc4My0wN2VmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HtsrMb9XqU7d3WIBB9EN5PfzuS5INmKbCskVlAg0pJY=)** Thank you, _Team Sykes_

| **A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102415349/529103873/985656371?nd&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.19_b1_ts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdlMTc4My0wN2VmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HtsrMb9XqU7d3WIBB9EN5PfzuS5INmKbCskVlAg0pJY=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102415350/529103874/985656371?-nd&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.19_b1_ts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzdlMTc4My0wN2VmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HtsrMb9XqU7d3WIBB9EN5PfzuS5INmKbCskVlAg0pJY=)

|
---
Peter, Hundreds of Hoosiers showed up at the Statehouse on Monday to protest the overreach and dangerous agenda from Donald Trump, Elon Musk, Mike Braun, and the state Republican supermajority. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102415430/529104159/1779248050?refcode=250219bauer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmVlYzVkMC0wN2VmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ffxuxTZ3gCmLETIENRQq1Q9APvcflgz6cFBs-BHtn8c=#basics) She laid out what Hoosier Democrats are fighting for at this critical time: **protecting healthcare, supporting public schools, and ending waitlists for Medicaid recipients who need care.** **[We want you to be a part of this moment – watch Rep. Bauer’s speech outside the Indiana Statehouse at this link and hear what we’re doing to stand up for Hoosier families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102415431/529104160/1779248050?refcode=250219bauer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmVlYzVkMC0wN2VmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ffxuxTZ3gCmLETIENRQq1Q9APvcflgz6cFBs-BHtn8c=#basics)** This is a critical moment. We need all hands on deck to build a stronger party, and defeat the most dangerous proposals by Republicans. We know we can. We’ve already defeated legislation that would dissolve Indianapolis and Gary public schools. But there is more work to do. **[Watch Rep. Bauer’s speech to hundreds of Hoosiers from Monday, and consider making a donation to help us continue fighting for Hoosiers every day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102415432/529104161/1779248050?refcode=250219bauer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmVlYzVkMC0wN2VmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ffxuxTZ3gCmLETIENRQq1Q9APvcflgz6cFBs-BHtn8c=#basics)** Thanks,
Indiana Democrats

She laid out what Hoosier Democrats are fighting for at this critical time: protecting healthcare, supporting public schools, and ending waitlists for Medicaid recipients who need care. This is a critical moment. We need all hands on deck to build a stronger party, and defeat the most dangerous proposals by Republicans. We know we can. We’ve already defeated legislation that would dissolve Indianapolis and Gary public schools. But there is more work to do. Thanks, Indiana Democrats [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Emerge HQ
subject: The SAVE Act would create significant barriers to voting!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Now more than ever, we need strong leaders who will fight to make voting easier, not harder.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102415760/529105575/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-02-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3MDZkOTZlLTA5ZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XOl3XK5ivgb1ObZ6H6g2h2_gHY4M7hlfsuR5uZ1VR1o=)
---
| Peter,

MAGA Republicans in Congress reintroduced the **SAVE Act** in the House, and if passed, this dangerous bill would create significant barriers to voting– _disproportionately affecting women, transgender people, people of color, and people with disabilities._

The **SAVE Act** would require Americans to provide proof of citizenship, such as a birth certificate or a passport, in person _every time_ they register or update their voter registration. Millions of women who changed their last names after marriage, transgender people who updated their legal documents, and disabled people facing accessibility challenges **_could be denied the right to vote._**

We’re not shocked that they would try to pull something like this. They simply don’t want us to vote so they can retain their power– _but we won’t sit idly by!_

At Emerge, we are dedicated to finding women leaders who are a part of the fabric of their communities and will safeguard our rights against these relentless attacks on our democracy. Now more than ever, we need strong leaders who will fight to make voting easier, _not harder._

[_**Your support today will help us recruit and train the next generation of Emerge women. Together, we can flip the seats needed to take back the House in 2026 and defend our most fundamental right to vote. If you’re with us, will you contribute anything you can today to help fuel our work?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102415762/529105577/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-02-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3MDZkOTZlLTA5ZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XOl3XK5ivgb1ObZ6H6g2h2_gHY4M7hlfsuR5uZ1VR1o=)

name: Dave McCormick
subject: At West Point, we had a code: cadets don't lie, cheat, steal, or tolerate those who do.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
Please read this full message
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b61ca4418bd24771b6c0990c340fe186&_e=GNHNU_CyaGlhLP0AeYwnyvCgeLacEuazDcZNMNITqhHaEO7qTyBg-JHv1AKkIv2X1PxSdrGoja_SJNeb_L2CSLAc7Ikdrh9tX7HQgnD8asNMy58E_L921uIodCjSU6BArkmc1LAMrGgXwno0PXy7jprABDm74AVuxXW1k8byYyigtIKTAxRx_ilV9Y8AMRUWazj9VX2vc8ghSUx55mVWVPkHfdAwJX46lOcSGR7NlK5G_iSBEec3T0snn470qG-_FolWhFgEJnGv8TgmO3BN7JLoOqo-xZ73XqMj12-BF-h2cP7tS_DlphA6cc2b1LJWZ-mMcEw9jTJnCyyYAgXs4KmzajrzGSXfAx5N_TT0cLwLvGhVSysPazrbBgXSGjycR-K1Pw5urn4dnNV-ec4Uk5F8R-eaFzfxVl-DgN3vHlQ%3D)

Peter ,

**At West Point, we had a code: cadets don't lie, cheat, steal, or tolerate those who do. **

_In just a few short weeks, the new administration and Congressional majorities have exposed an egregious amount of WASTE, FRAUD, and ABUSE of taxpayer dollars that has gone UNCHECKED**until now.**_

I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election.

I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I'm working to do that every single day.

**But the entrenched political class is terrified that we are uncovering their decades-long grift of lies and stealing from taxpayers.** **[They are doing everything they can to stop us and I WON'T TOLERATE IT.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b61ca4418bd24771b6c0990c340fe186&_e=GNHNU_CyaGlhLP0AeYwnyvCgeLacEuazDcZNMNITqhHaEO7qTyBg-JHv1AKkIv2X1PxSdrGoja_SJNeb_L2CSLAc7Ikdrh9tX7HQgnD8asNMy58E_L921uIodCjSU6BArkmc1LAMrGgXwno0PXy7jprABDm74AVuxXW1k8byYyigtIKTAxRx_ilV9Y8AMRUWazj9VX2vc8ghSUx55mVWVPkHfdAwJX46lOcSGR7NlK5G_iSBEec3T0snn470qG-_FolWhFgEJnGv8TgmO3BN7ExHFPfrvib5_0RtoLPNpLEBRYdsxRtIRRTdBhsVcPORz5w0ta-_7WH2hKrPZhWVL_Sdeq4S6Iwnk2RJYD8fWA2h2vmO-qOLPmSFL1IrUazMsUuF6prTUFIkPxPVHihcRnknEw9i9tgsEAAx9cLCytc%3D)**

**This is a long message and I hope you will read all the way to the end.**

I grew up in Bloomsburg, Pennsylvania. We lived on campus at Bloomsburg State College and my parents owned a farm ten minutes down the road.

I had summer jobs baling hay and trimming Christmas trees at nearby farms.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b61ca4418bd24771b6c0990c340fe186&_e=GNHNU_CyaGlhLP0AeYwnyvCgeLacEuazDcZNMNITqhHaEO7qTyBg-JHv1AKkIv2X1PxSdrGoja_SJNeb_L2CSLAc7Ikdrh9tX7HQgnD8asNMy58E_L921uIodCjSU6BArkmc1LAMrGgXwno0PXy7jprABDm74AVuxXW1k8byYyigtIKTAxRx_ilV9Y8AMRUWazj9VX2vc8ghSUx55mVWVPkHfdAwJX46lOcSGR7NlK5G_iSBEec3T0snn470qG-_FolWhFgEJnGv8TgmO3BN7ICozMp5Va7H6hbYfAp_E5WqPdO_JduT5dn6C0DPQpTlHaVwJiqshquVkPOMTmzU0DKHZ3J53lhroM2PYuugR1Z1l7Yx6dJTftfFeZHYxh8F-8ME-5KZIMfaRy5pLQnJyL_vhHSburolOCDxon9ziUE%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b61ca4418bd24771b6c0990c340fe186&_e=GNHNU_CyaGlhLP0AeYwnyvCgeLacEuazDcZNMNITqhHaEO7qTyBg-JHv1AKkIv2X1PxSdrGoja_SJNeb_L2CSLAc7Ikdrh9tX7HQgnD8asNMy58E_L921uIodCjSU6BArkmc1LAMrGgXwno0PXy7jprABDm74AVuxXW1k8byYyigtIKTAxRx_ilV9Y8AMRUWazj9VX2vc8ghSUx55mVWVPkHfdAwJX46lOcSGR7NlK5G_iSBEec3T0snn470qG-_FolWhFgEJnGv8TgmO3BN7EkBOySNVB7NvNpxJivRq1qXqU-TLFuzJeJxeXN95pF_-gnaWZavts6PA19EQmiZOxwKj-gEiCrE8Zdx6MvTnmHmd20KcK8wbimNh5_tmjO2KbvfgfyZvCqNNmBsYt0sD6rqS5KYoEXwdjuwrTlMEDc%3D)

My dad started his career teaching history, economics, & democracy at Punxsutawney High. My mom began teaching fourth through sixth graders at a public school near Pittsburgh.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b61ca4418bd24771b6c0990c340fe186&_e=GNHNU_CyaGlhLP0AeYwnyvCgeLacEuazDcZNMNITqhHaEO7qTyBg-JHv1AKkIv2X1PxSdrGoja_SJNeb_L2CSLAc7Ikdrh9tX7HQgnD8asNMy58E_L921uIodCjSU6BArkmc1LAMrGgXwno0PXy7jprABDm74AVuxXW1k8byYyigtIKTAxRx_ilV9Y8AMRUWazj9VX2vc8ghSUx55mVWVPkHfdAwJX46lOcSGR7NlK5G_iSBEec3T0snn470qG-_FolWhFgEJnGv8TgmO3BN7FgWq4qBoRET1EIfputNjPEpQrx-O0MDEEvuLGODz1z0ylUB131bo4TEFmANTNvcr9eJigfpHEsg7-aCc5to855GO58KxPliPYpAxPmhwrucElSB8eo_tV1Kst39PgXCHxmRfctyGkBaQ4u1-27SzyA%3D)

I'm incredibly proud that my dad was chosen to be president of Bloomsburg State College (now Bloomsburg University) at only 34 years old.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b61ca4418bd24771b6c0990c340fe186&_e=GNHNU_CyaGlhLP0AeYwnyvCgeLacEuazDcZNMNITqhHaEO7qTyBg-JHv1AKkIv2X1PxSdrGoja_SJNeb_L2CSLAc7Ikdrh9tX7HQgnD8asNMy58E_L921uIodCjSU6BArkmc1LAMrGgXwno0PXy7jprABDm74AVuxXW1k8byYyigtIKTAxRx_ilV9Y8AMRUWazj9VX2vc8ghSUx55mVWVPkHfdAwJX46lOcSGR7NlK5G_iSBEec3T0snn470qG-_FolWhFgEJnGv8TgmO3BN7EgpsFYuTbwnG19xEQ7rQ_liVsyH05HSNo3emUxbtL44Y3rAwvm31XMEvMw0-nEBh5s9gXfHjkv45fNUo1uIcs8OpdIZiYu-AmggkIJjWZqyW22Ikjyv9qMLYnBTR9kBj9iBYya2nk4NSCARf-29j_c%3D)

I'm so proud of my parents' teaching careers and to have been raised in Bloomsburg.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b61ca4418bd24771b6c0990c340fe186&_e=GNHNU_CyaGlhLP0AeYwnyvCgeLacEuazDcZNMNITqhHaEO7qTyBg-JHv1AKkIv2X1PxSdrGoja_SJNeb_L2CSLAc7Ikdrh9tX7HQgnD8asNMy58E_L921uIodCjSU6BArkmc1LAMrGgXwno0PXy7jprABDm74AVuxXW1k8byYyigtIKTAxRx_ilV9Y8AMRUWazj9VX2vc8ghSUx55mVWVPkHfdAwJX46lOcSGR7NlK5G_iSBEec3T0snn470qG-_FolWhFgEJnGv8TgmO3BN7JYsq1dSPG08x_kAqaSQTDWh_5qvvqIA6k1tJqNjK5vfpFZ07D8YaeuINMiDOAJzArOne-DSJS0JgUXt2a2Cmy-iiWCAlack4polHEQqRhYzkhtNBxcfc5cw4MlT4MUs4t5XBvRNouyFzcHBSaQ_v7E%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b61ca4418bd24771b6c0990c340fe186&_e=GNHNU_CyaGlhLP0AeYwnyvCgeLacEuazDcZNMNITqhHaEO7qTyBg-JHv1AKkIv2X1PxSdrGoja_SJNeb_L2CSLAc7Ikdrh9tX7HQgnD8asNMy58E_L921uIodCjSU6BArkmc1LAMrGgXwno0PXy7jprABDm74AVuxXW1k8byYyigtIKTAxRx_ilV9Y8AMRUWazj9VX2vc8ghSUx55mVWVPkHfdAwJX46lOcSGR7NlK5G_iSBEec3T0snn470qG-_FolWhFgEJnGv8TgmO3BN7AHIzOFmpnahpKDR0ANwrGDZOPxLWjfIi3YEOkMocO9rpJoyFEdFeSdbolo3ngkpzil7qp4lSfQG9B_PEJDXUPerF4EdqugD01HJgI6NzaVCsxojqWhrdGSJfz8TfbEWoYP3bIAgzgTwBpTNc_KmSqg%3D)

It was there that I wrestled and played football and was nominated to the U.S. Military Academy at West Point.

clean_body: Please read this full message Peter , At West Point, we had a code: cadets don't lie, cheat, steal, or tolerate those who do. In just a few short weeks, the new administration and Congressional majorities have exposed an egregious amount of WASTE, FRAUD, and ABUSE of taxpayer dollars that has gone UNCHECKEDuntil now. I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election. I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I'm working to do that every single day. But the entrenched political class is terrified that we are uncovering their decades-long grift of lies and stealing from taxpayers. This is a long message and I hope you will read all the way to the end. I grew up in Bloomsburg, Pennsylvania. We lived on campus at Bloomsburg State College and my parents owned a farm ten minutes down the road. I had summer jobs baling hay and trimming Christmas trees at nearby farms. My dad started his career teaching history, economics, & democracy at Punxsutawney High. My mom began teaching fourth through sixth graders at a public school near Pittsburgh. I'm incredibly proud that my dad was chosen to be president of Bloomsburg State College (now Bloomsburg University) at only 34 years old. I'm so proud of my parents' teaching careers and to have been raised in Bloomsburg. It was there that I wrestled and played football and was nominated to the U.S. Military Academy at West Point. And it was there that I came home to a parade after serving in combat during the Gulf War. After the Army, I earned a Ph.D. in international relations before moving to Pittsburgh to start a career in business. I worked my way up to become the CEO of FreeMarkets, a successful tech startup that employed hundreds in Western Pennsylvania. I was then called to service again, this time in the highest levels of government as Under Secretary of Treasury and as Deputy National Security Advisor. Following this, I joined Bridgewater Associates, one of the largest, most successful investment firms in the world, which manages the pension plans of groups including teachers, firefighters and law enforcement. I have lived the American Dream. When I ran for the U.S. Senate to bring my decades of experience and love for our country to fix our broken economy that is a direct result of policies supported by the far left, I became a national target for outright LIES from mainstream media outlets like The New York Times and CNN. I have been asked why I ran for political office. I opened myself and my family up to attacks from the left, and every day felt like a battle. But I believe in America 's strength and resilience. And I believe our nation needs leaders who place service to others above all else. Thanks to the support of TENS OF THOUSANDS of grassroots patriots, I was able to fight back against the lies with the TRUTH about my life and business record. I'm no stranger to fighting for what is right and if we don 't continue pushing every single day to clean up the mess the career politicians made, we will lose America as we know it! Here's where I need your help, Peter . We need to combat the Democrats ' lies and attacks with the TRUTH about how American tax dollars are being spent. I hate asking for money -- I'm not a career politician, and it's not in my nature -- but I have no choice but to ask if we're going to hit our fundraising goal this month. The Democrats know if they lose ground to the outsiders working to bring CHANGE, it will be IMPOSSIBLE for Democrats to take back their majority in the next election. That's why I'm hoping you can spare Your donation will take us one step closer to bringing the CHANGE Americans voted for in November, and I am so grateful for your support. Thank you, Dave McCormick P.S. Democrats from all over the country are panicking and pulling out all the stops to attack Republicans who are shaking up Washington. # [Why February 19 Is A Notable Day In U.S. History](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=157493874&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NDkzODc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDAwMDI2MTQsImV4cCI6MTc0MjU5NDYxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.FdXPr9-HcSXrs49v-ad5lyEEoav8HSN4heMwo24e7mk)
### Some of America's most dreadful chapters unfolded on this day, and that trend continues in 2025
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Feb 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=157493874&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU3NDkzODc0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MDAwMjYxNCwiZXhwIjoxNzQyNTk0NjE0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.TNbb3eIn4qa6viETfqgUmws4lNMjrNtwXv2H6YrMeGc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

Every time injustice rears its head in this country, a familiar refrain from well-meaning Americans emerges: _"I don't recognize this America."_ It was said when the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_. It was said when an insurrection stormed the Capitol. It was said when children were put in cages at the border. It was said when police murdered George Floyd. It is an oft repeated phrase whenever America shows itself for what it has always been: a nation built on laws that have long prioritized whiteness at the expense of justice. A nation built on stolen land by people stolen from their land.
February 19 is a day that should remind us of this hard truth. Three moments in history expose the systemic racism embedded in America's legal system--and give us a glimpse into how to overcome such injustices. **Let 's Address This.**
**Take a moment to join 117,000+ like-minded activists and subscribe below to Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-2f4prVU5jkyyc3F5kEnFL0U3RRuBOrHEhs2WgX9txY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=157493874)
## Significance of February 19 in American History
**February 19, 1923** : On this date 102 years ago, the U.S. Supreme Court ruled that Indian immigrants were ineligible for U.S. citizenship because they were brown, not white. Despite meeting every other requirement, their skin color made them unworthy in the eyes of the law. At the center of the case of Bhagat Singh Thind, an Indian Sikh man born in Punjab, who migrated to the U.S. in 1913, and enlisted in the U.S. Army. Despite his documented immigration, his service in the U.S. Army to defend this country, and his law abiding status--the white supremacist Supreme Court refused to allow him to seek citizenship because he was not white.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5c5bc685-543f-4b4a-9a98-a768e2214b30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
How much has changed more than 100 years later when literally the exact same thing is still happening? Meet Marlon Parris, a Black immigrant from Trinidad who arrived in the United States and enlisted in the U.S. military. Thought he is veteran who served two tours in Iraq, ICE agents illegally detained him on January 22--despite Parris previously receiving a federal letter stating he would not be deported. Parris now faces the threat of deportation despite his service to the country.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/741b15aa-7326-403f-8f4b-87e6dbd91308?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I sit on the Executive Board of Common Defense, a Veterans organization working to end neverending wars and ensure the US military and government abide by its Constitutional obligations. I invite you to join our effort to [free Marlon Parris](https://substack.com/redirect/58459148-57a9-4fab-ab25-ea401d1911e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**February 19, 1942** : On this date, President Franklin D. Roosevelt signed _Executive Order 9066_ , forcing 120,000 Japanese Americans--many of them U.S. citizens--into concentration camps simply because of their heritage. The Supreme Court upheld this atrocity in _Korematsu v. United States_ , reinforcing that national security was an acceptable excuse for racial discrimination.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5360a70d-a656-4850-9bcd-8b70fd65cec5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Once again, America was at war with Japan, Germany, and Italy. If the stated goal of EO 9066 an the Korematsu ruling really was about national security, then why were German and Italian Americans not also "rounded up" the same way as were Japanese Americans? The answer is simple--these orders and rulings were never about national security, they were always about upholding white supremacy. It is no wonder that post World War 2, thousands of Nazis were rewarded with safety and refuge in the United States1--while the United States simultaneously blocked all Black and brown immigration, and even while concentration camps holding Japanese Americans remained in tact.
**February 19, 2025** : On this date, today, the current regime continues enforcing cruel and weaponized policy to deny asylum to brown Latino immigrants, even though asylum is a constitutionally protected human right. ICE continues to target Latino immigrants by raiding sensitive locations like schools, hospitals, and shelters--while ignoring that there are some 500,000 mostly white Canadian and European undocumented immigrants in the United States today.
And I am constantly inundated with statements that "This is not the America I remember."
Friends--remember it or not, this is what America has always been. These are not anomalies. This is not a departure from the America that has existed for centuries--this _is_ America. A nation where laws have consistently been designed to oppress, exclude, and disenfranchise those who are not white, not wealthy, and not male. But here's the important part--it does not have to remain this way.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-2f4prVU5jkyyc3F5kEnFL0U3RRuBOrHEhs2WgX9txY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=157493874)
## We Are Not Hopeless
Here's the truth: We have conquered injustices before, and we can do so again. _Plessy v. Ferguson_ upheld segregation for 58 years before it was overturned by _Brown v. Board of Education_. The Chinese Exclusion Act lasted for more than 60 years before it was repealed. Japanese Americans won reparations for their forced imprisonment. The Civil Rights Movement dismantled Jim Crow. These victories did not come because America "corrected itself"--they came because people refused to accept injustice as normal.
Today, as white supremacists try to repeal the progress made, we must dig in to protect that progress and advance universal human rights into the next generation.
This is why staying active in local, state, and federal politics is not optional. It is a responsibility. When we ignore voter suppression laws, they spread. When we fail to hold leaders accountable, they abuse their power. When we let injustices persist unchallenged, we allow history to repeat itself.
The fight for justice is not about nostalgia for a so-called "better" America--it is about forging a new America that has never truly existed, one that upholds equality, dignity, and human rights for all people. We cannot afford to look away. If you are looking for actions to take--[I have written in detail seven actions that we can all take](https://substack.com/redirect/35c83f4d-f525-456d-ae47-9ab9f5d2ad3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), even starting today, to move the call for justice forward.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..-2f4prVU5jkyyc3F5kEnFL0U3RRuBOrHEhs2WgX9txY?&gift=true)
## Conclusion
The injustices we see this February 19, 2025, are a reminder of the injustices experienced in 1942 and 1923. Understanding this history is critical. If we can recognize the patterns of oppression in our past, we can break the cycle in our present, and ensure a more just future. But only if we act. Only if we refuse to be complacent. Only if we stand united in the fight for justice.
The choice is ours. Let's continue to work for that more perfect Union in our future.
**Thank you for your trust and support. I am doing everything in my power to counter injustice. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement.**

He tried to freeze _all_ federal grant funding and rip billions of dollars away from communities across the country. He appointed unqualified nominees to serve in his cabinet who will do nothing more than pave the way for him to carry out his far-right agenda. And he’s letting billionaire Elon Musk ransack the federal agencies that many New Mexicans rely on, and that hold sensitive data like Social Security and bank account numbers. **This is not what we voted for.** We didn’t vote to let Elon dismantle and undermine federal agencies like the Department of Education, and no one voted to put Elon in charge of our personal data. Millions of Americans _did_ vote for lower medical bills and cheaper eggs, but Trump hasn’t taken one meaningful step to lower costs for working families. In fact, he’s making those costs go up! clean_body: Team, In just under a month in office, Donald Trump’s actions have already wreaked havoc on New Mexicans and thrown our government into chaos. He tried to freeze all federal grant funding and rip billions of dollars away from communities across the country. He appointed unqualified nominees to serve in his cabinet who will do nothing more than pave the way for him to carry out his far-right agenda. And he’s letting billionaire Elon Musk ransack the federal agencies that many New Mexicans rely on, and that hold sensitive data like Social Security and bank account numbers. This is not what we voted for. We didn’t vote to let Elon dismantle and undermine federal agencies like the Department of Education, and no one voted to put Elon in charge of our personal data. Millions of Americans did vote for lower medical bills and cheaper eggs, but Trump hasn’t taken one meaningful step to lower costs for working families. In fact, he’s making those costs go up! Martin and his Senate Democratic colleagues are fighting hard to hold the Trump administration accountable and push back against Elon and Trump’s assault on our government. Scott Walter is the president of Capital Research Center. He served in
the George W. Bush Administration as Special Assistant to the
President for Domestic Policy and was vice president at the
Philanthropy Roundtable, editing Philanthropy magazine and producing
donor guidebooks on assistance to the poor, school reform, public
policy research, and other topics. Walter has written for and been
quoted in such outlets as the New York Times, Washington Post, Wall
Street Journal, and Chronicle of Philanthropy. A Georgetown graduate,
he served as a senior fellow at the Becket Fund for Religious Liberty
and as senior editor of AEI’s flagship publication.

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: What drives me on:
body:
Friend, this work isn't easy. But it is worth doing.

| |
---
Friend, I know it's easy to feel like we're fighting an uphill battle. The amount of time, hard work, and relationship-building it took for us to push through major pieces of legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act to lower costs for working families was no small feat. President Trump and Elon Musk represent a real risk to our hard-earned victories, but we won't give up. Many people in Washington are more interested in scoring political points than actually getting things done for working people. And wealthy special interest groups are ready to drop millions of dollars in attack ads against anyone who dares to stand up to them — like they did against us last election. **[Can you help us get an early start on our re-election fundraising efforts? We have to start organizing early to protect this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102417473/529111334/1039792322?amp;refcode=250219_mk_drive_l1&ms=250219_mk_drive&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RiNTU5My0wZmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-lQlJK8pkoEKfHAM3SHhAB_Vw89lg2voFYk4jxjUdfk=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102417480/529111341/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250219_mk_drive&ms=250219_mk_drive&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RiNTU5My0wZmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-lQlJK8pkoEKfHAM3SHhAB_Vw89lg2voFYk4jxjUdfk=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102417481/529111342/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250219_mk_drive&ms=250219_mk_drive&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RiNTU5My0wZmVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-lQlJK8pkoEKfHAM3SHhAB_Vw89lg2voFYk4jxjUdfk=)

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately.
**Even with all of these challenges, I wouldn't trade my job for any other in the world — because I'm fighting for my home too, friend.**
I grew up right here in Toledo, in the same house I still live in today. I go to work every day for my own community, for my friends and my family and my neighbors. I try to solve the problems that affect us all, from Great Lakes pollution to rising healthcare and housing costs.
When you're fighting for your home, no task is too great, friend. That's why I'll never stop fighting for Northwest Ohio.
I'm proud and grateful to have you with me.
— Marcy
| | |
---|---|---

### About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. clean_body: Friend, this work isn't easy. But it is worth doing. | | Friend, I know it's easy to feel like we're fighting an uphill battle. The amount of time, hard work, and relationship-building it took for us to push through major pieces of legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act to lower costs for working families was no small feat. President Trump and Elon Musk represent a real risk to our hard-earned victories, but we won't give up. Many people in Washington are more interested in scoring political points than actually getting things done for working people. And wealthy special interest groups are ready to drop millions of dollars in attack ads against anyone who dares to stand up to them — like they did against us last election. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Even with all of these challenges, I wouldn't trade my job for any other in the world — because I'm fighting for my home too, friend. I grew up right here in Toledo, in the same house I still live in today. I go to work every day for my own community, for my friends and my family and my neighbors. I try to solve the problems that affect us all, from Great Lakes pollution to rising healthcare and housing costs. When you're fighting for your home, no task is too great, friend. That's why I'll never stop fighting for Northwest Ohio. I'm proud and grateful to have you with me. — Marcy | | | ---|---|--- About Marcy Kaptur Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House. | = | = ---|--- Follow Marcy | | ---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Kaptur for Congress PO Box 899 Toledo, OH 43697 United States

name: Ro Khanna
subject: URGENT: Republicans are ready to gut Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Last night, President Trump told [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/02/19/upshot/trump-medicaid-tax-cuts.html] Fox News he wouldn’t cut Medicaid. Less than 12 hours later, he endorsed Speaker Johnson’s proposal to cut Medicaid by $1 trillion.

In solidarity,

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My proudest accomplishments
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8316%2E5257348%2Ef3zrxR ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — Some of
my proudest accomplishments in my career in public service have been those
which served to make schools better, safer, and more affordable for
everyone.

Growing up, I had some incredible teachers who motivated me to read and
learn more about the world. From my speech teacher, who showed me the
power of the spoken word, to my English teacher, who introduced me to the
works of Shakespeare and inspired a lifelong passion for reading. I
wouldn’t be who I am today without these incredible teachers.

And I believe every Californian deserves access to high-quality education
that sets them up for a bright future. I’ve made improving schools a major
part of my life’s work — and I want to tell you a bit more about what I’ve
done for schools, and what I want to do to improve schools from the U.S.
Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q12025_abs_em.OeZ3Kx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8316%2E5257348%2Ef3zrxR ]DONATE

While I was running for California State Senate and knocking on doors in
my neighborhood, I met a mother with five children. She told me that the
textbooks her children had in school were out-of-date — in fact, her
youngest child was using the same textbook her eldest child had used ten
years earlier. A textbook so old I was told it talked optimistically about
the day we might land on the moon — and it was being used in the ‘90s.

So I got to work as a bright-eyed new legislator. I introduced a bill to
guarantee funding for up-to-date textbooks for all K-12 schools in
California.

The LA Times wrote that my bill didn’t have “a snowball’s chance in hell”
of passing — but it did, and we secured $1 billion for new textbooks.

I also played a key role in passing legislation that reduced class sizes
and helped secure critical cost-of-living increases for teacher pensions.

Every kid deserves the opportunity to go to school and learn in a safe,
welcoming environment. And their teachers deserve fair wages and benefits
for the vital work they do to help our kids succeed.

So as Trump threatens to eliminate the Department of Education and
nominates a Secretary of Education who is quite possibly *more*
unqualified than Betsy DeVos (remember her?), I’m fighting for our kids in
the U.S. Senate.

I believe that we need to significantly increase funding for Head Start
programs. This will help thousands of kids from low-income households get
access to high-quality education.

I believe we should give teachers refundable tax credits to boost teacher
compensation and address the wage gap between teachers and other
professions.

I believe that we must expand meal programs for kids. Every student should
be able to start their day with a nutritious, free breakfast and refuel
with a healthy lunch — no matter their zip code.

I believe that we should expand the Pell Grant. These grants help put
college in reach for millions of students — by passing the College for All
Act, we can make that a reality.

I believe that we must invest in teachers and schools. To allow future
generations of students to learn in safe, welcoming environments, we need
to make sure their teachers and school staff receive fair wages and the
respect they deserve.

I believe that childcare and pre-k should be universal, to ensure that all
children have access to early learning opportunities. And childcare
copayments for families should be capped at no more than 5-10% of their
income, or be waived for families at or below 150% of the federal poverty
level.

Derek, every
child deserves the opportunity to learn and thrive, just like I did as a
student growing up.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=8316%2E5257348%2Ef3zrxR ]Adam Schiff as a young boy

Thank you for reading more about my work to improve our schools — as well
as my plans to keep building on that progress for all students.

— Adam

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Adam is fighting to expand Head Start, support teachers, and invest in |
| public schools. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q12025_abs_em.OeZ3Kx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8316%2E5257348%2Ef3zrxR ]Chip in to stand with him for quality education for |
| all. |
| |

subject: re: Attorney General Eric Holder’s note

body:
Rush a donation to fight back against MAGA Republicans’ extremism and preserve our democracy.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102417706/529112291/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjMWVhY2IzLTEwZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3DjyNeGb4_IjIphZ6hF0492RxhL-qRyL8g-UJZBGvps=&emci=49e8c790-f8ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0c1eacb3-10ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=8431045)

Peter, we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss Attorney General Eric Holder’s note — the work ahead of us is daunting, but it needs all of us. That’s how we beat back Trump and Republicans’ attempts to undermine the census last time around. It’s how we have effectively fought partisan gerrymanders to create the fairest electoral maps in decades. And it’s how we’ll challenge every attempt to weaken the right to vote in America. [**Please take a moment to read A.G. Holder’s advice, and then rush a donation to fight back to protect our democracy from MAGA extremism.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102417707/529112319/-1665762292?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MidMonth2_email_20250219-NDRC-Tier1-MidMonth2_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250219-NDRC-Tier1-MidMonth2_&utm_campaign=MidMonth2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjMWVhY2IzLTEwZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3DjyNeGb4_IjIphZ6hF0492RxhL-qRyL8g-UJZBGvps=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

* * *
Peter,
This isn’t like last time around.
For much of the first term, the Trump Administration’s incompetence tended to mitigate some of their malevolence. Even then, they still managed to do serious damage to our democracy and enact parts of an extreme agenda when the checks in our Constitutional system didn’t work as they should have.
**But now, with a Republican-led Congress seemingly unwilling or incapable of standing up to this administration — or worse, eager to assist its most extreme power grabs — it’s clear that the best check left on Trump’s power is _us_.** _It’s the power of the people — a power that — history proves — is too often underestimated._
When they try to contort electoral maps to sculpt an electorate that’s friendlier to their partisan pursuit of power, it’s on us to push back in the name of fairness. When they try to undermine the census and even change the constitutional definition of citizenship, it’s on us to fight back with everything we’ve got. And when the voters head back to the polls, it’s on us to champion Democracy Defenders who will help right the ship and minimize the damage.
[**I can promise you that the NDRC will not back down from these fights — so today, I am personally asking you to make a donation to help fund the hard work of protecting our democracy from those who want to break it.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102417714/529112326/-1665762292?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MidMonth2_email_20250219-NDRC-Tier1-MidMonth2_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250219-NDRC-Tier1-MidMonth2_&utm_campaign=MidMonth2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjMWVhY2IzLTEwZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3DjyNeGb4_IjIphZ6hF0492RxhL-qRyL8g-UJZBGvps=)

But now, with a Republican-led Congress seemingly unwilling or incapable of standing up to this administration — or worse, eager to assist its most extreme power grabs — it’s clear that the best check left on Trump’s power is us. It’s the power of the people — a power that — history proves — is too often underestimated. name: Gay Valimont
subject: Florida's New Immigration Laws?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Dear Friends, this is Gay Valimont, FL-6 candidate.
Florida has recently enacted some of the most stringent immigration laws in the nation, accelerating efforts to remove undocumented individuals from our state. These laws introduce severe penalties, including the death penalty for certain offenses, and deny in-state tuition to undocumented students. Additionally, a new Florida State Immigration Enforcement Council has been established to oversee these measures, and it is affecting my district.
I need your urgent attention before special elections come into play, to help those who need it most right now.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/68626E6467324C344A556F4D346969657450454E492F32686D767A56704C7257766F315354526332387A65744E7A66774B587A374D66745A7143343079487358/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-02-19%20at%204.01.19%E2%80%AFPM.png]
As a mother, educator, and advocate, I am deeply concerned about the human impact of these policies. Our state is home to diverse communities that contribute significantly to our economy and culture. Policies that instill fear and uncertainty among immigrant families are not only unjust but also undermine the very fabric of our society. I have been working tirelessly to reconnect with my district, and this is a clear violation of our values.
In Congress, I will work tirelessly to promote compassionate immigration reform that respects human dignity and recognizes the invaluable contributions of all residents.
We must strive for policies that balance security with empathy, ensuring that Florida remains a welcoming place for everyone. Rushing $8 not only shows your support, but allows us to combat unethical targeting within our communities. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you for your unwavering support.
Gay Valimont
