clean_body: [] Dear Friends, this is Gay Valimont, FL-6 candidate. Florida has recently enacted some of the most stringent immigration laws in the nation, accelerating efforts to remove undocumented individuals from our state. These laws introduce severe penalties, including the death penalty for certain offenses, and deny in-state tuition to undocumented students. Additionally, a new Florida State Immigration Enforcement Council has been established to oversee these measures, and it is affecting my district. I need your urgent attention before special elections come into play, to help those who need it most right now. [] As a mother, educator, and advocate, I am deeply concerned about the human impact of these policies. Our state is home to diverse communities that contribute significantly to our economy and culture. Policies that instill fear and uncertainty among immigrant families are not only unjust but also undermine the very fabric of our society. I have been working tirelessly to reconnect with my district, and this is a clear violation of our values. In Congress, I will work tirelessly to promote compassionate immigration reform that respects human dignity and recognizes the invaluable contributions of all residents. We must strive for policies that balance security with empathy, ensuring that Florida remains a welcoming place for everyone. Rushing $8 not only shows your support, but allows us to combat unethical targeting within our communities. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Express Donate: $5 [] Express Donate: $10 [] Express Donate: $25 [] Express Donate: $100 [] Or, donate another amount [] [] Thank you for your unwavering support. name: AOC
subject: I've got your back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
What the MAGA movement wants is for all of us to give up and say, “America has gone to hell in a handbasket, and we’re done.”
**No.**
If you are a hard-working, innocent person: **I have got your back**.
If you are just trying to make it in this world: **I’ve got your back**.
If you’re not trying to hurt anybody: **I got your back**.
It’s so important that we affirmatively assert that because, now more than ever, there are a lot of people who don’t know who they are safe with.
But when we speak up, we signal to others that there are people in this world who have not given up.
There are times when we are _not_ in positions of greater power, and sometimes what we are able to do is very limited. But even in times when our hands are tied, **one of the most enormously powerful things we can do is keep the light on**.
Don’t let these people’s bullsh*t get you down. What is so important for us to understand is that as long as we don’t give up, **it’s not over**.
We’re going to keep standing with trans people.
We’re going to keep standing with the LGBT community.
We’re going to keep standing for the working class.
We’re going to keep fighting for a better minimum wage.
We’re going to keep fighting to guarantee healthcare.
They’re relying on us giving up. **Hell no**.
We will not be afraid – because that’s what they want.
We do not have to comply with illegal activity — **even if that illegal activity is coming from the President of the United States.**
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250219.aLIXV6&refcode=em20250219-8178-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8178%2E2526796%2EixHswx)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250219.aLIXV6&refcode=em20250219-8178-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8178%2E2526796%2EixHswx)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250219?refcode=em20250219-8178-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=8178_2526796_ixHswx&akid=8178%2E2526796%2EixHswx)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250219-8178-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&akid=8178%2E2526796%2EixHswx)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8178%2E2526796%2EixHswx) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8178%2E2526796%2EixHswx) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8178%2E2526796%2EixHswx)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=8178%2E2526796%2EixHswx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=8178%2E2526796%2EixHswx)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: A sad excuse of a Democrat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

New York City Mayor Eric Adams is the perfect example of a corrupt
Democrat in Name Only (DINO).

After defeating multiple progressive candidates in the 2022 mayoral
election, Adams reinstated illegal stop-and-frisk policies and prioritized
the already massive police budget over affordable housing, libraries,
public transit, and other city services that would actually help New
Yorkers.

To make matters worse, he abused his position of power and was indicted on
federal corruption charges for bribery, campaign finance, and conspiracy
offenses.

Now, Adams tried throwing immigrants and his constituents under the bus to
save himself from criminal charges by cutting a deal with Donald Trump.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20250219-hochul-remove-adams/?source=em20250219-36445&akid=36445%2E1203867%2EVqfBiK ]Rolling Stone: Eric Adams' Lawyers Offered Trump DOJ an 'Ever-Present
Partner'. The NYC mayor and his reps kissed up to Trump, promising full
cooperation as he removes 'undocumented immigrants.' The whole thing
backfired

The Mayor went to Mar-a-Lago and Trump’s inauguration, told his staff not
to criticize Trump in public, offered to be an “ever-present partner” with
the Trump admin, and said he would cooperate with DHS and ICE to deport
undocumented immigrants despite New York’s status as a sanctuary city —
all in exchange for Trump’s Department of Justice (DOJ) to dismiss federal
charges against him.

A NY judge just ordered Adams and Trump DOJ officials to court, but we
can’t allow this sad excuse of a Democrat to remain in power. New Yorkers
deserve a progressive, working-class mayor who will fight for them, not
their own interests, and resist Trump instead of cozying up to him.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20250219-hochul-remove-adams/?source=em20250219-36445&akid=36445%2E1203867%2EVqfBiK ]Add your name to our petition calling on New York Governor Kathy Hochul
to remove Adams from office ASAP!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20250219-hochul-remove-adams/?source=em20250219-36445&akid=36445%2E1203867%2EVqfBiK ]Add Your Name

Democratic voters deserve better than this. Let’s do everything we can to
push Adams out while we continue to recruit working-class progressive
leaders to run for Congress.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250219-36445-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36445_1203867_VqfBiK&akid=36445%2E1203867%2EVqfBiK

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36445%2E1203867%2EVqfBiK

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
This is a special way to power the climate fight (and get perks!)

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102418862/529115842/1328794144?refcode=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNjVkZjYzLTE0ZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bD6ZSj_M-e0IsWI1aj08zxGz4RA8iaOFm2r8UZJf65U=&emci=0f65df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)

Hey there — it’s Jane. I sent you an email a few weeks ago announcing something really exciting — **Jane’s Grassroots Cabinet** _(which you can read more about below!)_. It’s a brand-new way for people like you to have a direct impact in the fight against Big Oil and help elect real climate leaders across the country. I don’t want you to miss out. This year, there are over 100,000 open seats for election across all levels of government — _that’s more open seats than last year!_ And with Trump and the fossil fuel lobby working overtime to undo every ounce of climate progress, we need to be ready. That’s why I’m personally inviting you to join my exclusive program as a monthly supporter. **Your $10 monthly investment is all it takes to make a difference and fuel this fight.** Oh, and did I mention? **Joining my Grassroots Cabinet team comes with some VIP perks — inside scoops, special invites, and so much more.** **[What do you say? Can I count on you? Read more below and chip in today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102418863/529115843/1824087006?recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNjVkZjYzLTE0ZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bD6ZSj_M-e0IsWI1aj08zxGz4RA8iaOFm2r8UZJf65U=)** | [**Join Jane’s Grassroots Cabinet →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102418864/529115844/1824087006?recurring=true&refcode=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNjVkZjYzLTE0ZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bD6ZSj_M-e0IsWI1aj08zxGz4RA8iaOFm2r8UZJf65U=)

xx Jane

**From:** Jane Fonda
**Date:** Jan 29, 2025
**Subject:** We’re launching something new!
> When I think about why I started JanePAC, it always comes back to people like you.
> It’s not the flashy headlines or the politicians in Washington that give me hope for the future. It’s the conversations I’ve had with grassroots activists in communities across this country — **ordinary people doing extraordinary things to fight for climate progress.**
> That’s why we built this PAC. To give supporters like you a real seat at the table in the fight against Big Oil and the politicians they bankroll. And together, we’re accomplishing incredible things.
> In 2024 alone, we elected nearly 100 climate champions to critical down-ballot races around the country — leaders who are fighting to protect their communities from Trump and Big Oil’s destructive federal agenda.
> This month, we scored two major special election victories for 2025. **In Virginia** , we helped keep the state Senate out of Republican hands. And last night **in Minnesota** , we broke a 33-33 tie, flipping the Senate back to Democratic control and blocking Trump’s allies from steamrolling their anti-climate agenda.
> And we’re just getting started. **This year, there are over 100,000 open seats on the ballot.** That’s more seats than in 2024, and every single one of them is an opportunity to fight for bold climate solutions — if we have the resources to meet the moment.
> That’s why sustained monthly support is so important. Grassroots donors like you allow us to plan ahead, respond quickly to attacks from Big Oil, and invest in the leaders who will drive bold climate solutions.
> **I’m inviting you to join Jane’s Grassroots Cabinet, a new program that brings together the passionate supporters who power this movement. [By chipping in just $10 a month through this link, you’ll not only help elect the next wave of climate leaders but also gain exclusive access to the work I’m so deeply committed to.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102418865/529115845/1824087006?recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNjVkZjYzLTE0ZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bD6ZSj_M-e0IsWI1aj08zxGz4RA8iaOFm2r8UZJf65U=)**
> [**Join Jane’s Grassroots Cabinet Today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102418866/529115846/1824087006?recurring=true&refcode=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNjVkZjYzLTE0ZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bD6ZSj_M-e0IsWI1aj08zxGz4RA8iaOFm2r8UZJf65U=)
> ---
> As a member, you’ll receive:
> ✅ Exclusive updates directly from me about the progress your investment is making possible
> ✅ Early and discounted access to JanePAC events and merchandise
> ✅ Invitations to special events with me throughout the year
> And because I truly value your support, **I personally call a few of our recurring donors each month to say thank you. You just might be one of the lucky ones to get a ring from me.**
> This work has never been more urgent. Trump’s return to the White House and his alliance with the fossil fuel giants threaten to undo all of the progress we’ve made. We can’t afford to lose ground now — not when we’ve already proven that grassroots power can win, over and over again.
> If you’ve ever wondered how you can have a direct impact on the climate movement, this is your chance. **Your $10 monthly commitment will fuel the fight for climate progress and connect you to the movement that’s reshaping what’s possible.**
> **[Can I count on your commitment before the end of the month to power this movement forward?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102418867/529115847/1824087006?recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNjVkZjYzLTE0ZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bD6ZSj_M-e0IsWI1aj08zxGz4RA8iaOFm2r8UZJf65U=)**
> [**Start Your $10 Monthly Donation**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102418868/529115848/1824087006?recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.1065df63-14ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNjVkZjYzLTE0ZWYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bD6ZSj_M-e0IsWI1aj08zxGz4RA8iaOFm2r8UZJf65U=)
> ---
> Let’s do this,
> xx Jane
> P.S. We know not everyone is in a position to commit to a monthly donation. Whether you can contribute or not, we’re beyond grateful to have you on our team. We will have more info soon on how you can join my Grassroots Cabinet by volunteering for our 2025 campaigns!

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I refuse to be a pawn.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
They want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it won’t be on the issues I laid out in my speech.
Hi Derek, it's Congresswoman Sarah McBride — John said I could reach out to you about something important.
You may have heard that I recently gave my first speech as Delaware’s Congresswoman on the floor of the House of Representatives. And you may have also heard that the Republican who recognized me when I came to the podium used the moment to refer to me as the “Gentleman” from Delaware, “Mr. McBride.” A thoroughly unoriginal schoolyard taunt against trans people.
In truth, they want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it _won’t_ be on the issues I laid out in my speech: the MAGA effort to gut our government at the expense of working people and my focus on bringing down costs and building a government that respects everyone.
Really, their attacks are about more than just me. The truth is they are using trans people as a pawn in their scheme to gut the federal government and line the pockets of Donald Trump’s best friends.
**But I refuse to be a pawn. I refuse to give them that power. And I refuse to let them get away with it.**
That’s why I’m going to spend every day fighting _against_ their attempts to dismantle the federal government, and fighting _for_ the things Delawareans elected me for — regardless of what kind of personal insults Republicans want to throw my way.
Republicans know what they’re doing right now is unpopular, and that’s why they’re desperate to change the conversation. It’s up to us to make sure they don’t get away with it.
[**Derek, if you’re with me, John and I could really use your support at this moment. Will you split a donation between our campaigns today and help us keep up the fight, no matter what gets thrown our way?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250219?refcode=em20250219-9920&refcode2=9920_434096_5Uo3eg&akid=9920%2E434096%2E5Uo3eg)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250219?amount=5&refcode=em20250219-9920&refcode2=9920_434096_5Uo3eg&akid=9920%2E434096%2E5Uo3eg)**
Thank you again to John for letting me reach out. And thank _you_ for all of the support,
Sarah McBride

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250219-9920-footer&t=1&refcode2=9920_434096_5Uo3eg&akid=9920%2E434096%2E5Uo3eg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9920%2E434096%2E5Uo3eg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9920%2E434096%2E5Uo3eg)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d197b6feb02b4c48bf9dddd99b11915d&_e=Xiv9mOhkSnPs02rVKu3rpyGL69Ziv7GouOCFH2L-K6ehjrpem02TOgn3PoFXVu11N62oEWmQ494Phj9nfqxyICvZVgu-oP2qG1yqaXAd1yzw7H1LEimYXGl4Cj4Ln-IbZu_APy5htvL0WlYS3koKksOI530Yv7VBs6O1gZxJw8-JvWjlMANWgSeU39PEApoLKFLaSk2ODE2yAm5VUJ600KYseqqDsrGudHgoQTZIgqo37V4JWuOMA2R8hTVHhUzFbL_Xmmrs2FpVZ82P1Z4T9PXTW2-rjmOnvoWnOSUEUGK3848FG3XepWRWgPe0H1hSF_ilblcP-sox7lxf0uuR8Mmu6sKFTeI2FmrrACAPQzLxi3RrbcerTVvZn-d5il0fBQT8OvUakNxWy7xLMntj3FAesW7VFfRKqduXbNX--3EJARv0hQHdXASNZ-OASvEn)

| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d197b6feb02b4c48bf9dddd99b11915d&_e=Xiv9mOhkSnPs02rVKu3rpyGL69Ziv7GouOCFH2L-K6ehjrpem02TOgn3PoFXVu11N62oEWmQ494Phj9nfqxyICvZVgu-oP2qG1yqaXAd1yzw7H1LEimYXGl4Cj4Ln-IbZu_APy5htvL0WlYS3koKksOI530Yv7VBs6O1gZxJw8-JvWjlMANWgSeU39PEApoLKFLaSk2ODE2yAm5VUJ600KYseqqDsrGudHgoQTZIgqo37V4JWuOMA2R8hTVHhUzFbL_Xmmrs2FpVZ82P1Z4T9PXTW2-rjmOnvoWnOSUEUGL-2MrL94NJATNQmWrzt09QyzNZIl2tEzJDTPiJXeNWyeo7JITsbUqYcx7vFt5q6U0dHKWSnD0HOo3AhpdEDBPAPe4wKXQor2DS12_xAP_Kwpm_1j44eDmC8qo2Pkf1X8LreK3aciTvSWfSvxWt5AEi)" which you can now own on DVD.

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d197b6feb02b4c48bf9dddd99b11915d&_e=Xiv9mOhkSnPs02rVKu3rpyGL69Ziv7GouOCFH2L-K6ehjrpem02TOgn3PoFXVu11N62oEWmQ494Phj9nfqxyICvZVgu-oP2qG1yqaXAd1yzw7H1LEimYXGl4Cj4Ln-IbZu_APy5htvL0WlYS3koKksOI530Yv7VBs6O1gZxJw8-JvWjlMANWgSeU39PEApoLKFLaSk2ODE2yAm5VUJ600KYseqqDsrGudHgoQTZIgqo37V4JWuOMA2R8hTVHhUzFbL_Xmmrs2FpVZ82P1Z4T9PXTW2-rjmOnvoWnOSUEUGKuJJPXPFFvYktSWawFHGKFgOKTZ2NqjlxnACjSkMlH8CRUYaDhdwDzV5eq7ga9WhOIthRAL427US1-nvSwZo8lRrkuw10NaTiyDg9yyLXoaAq5hCTJguM6odEEFhshOu5FWJC04rwCvuiuuAmer6QM).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Team DASS
subject: re: the SAVE Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102419156/529116997/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU4YzE0ZC0xNWVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Li6OmX1MQjagJOee7LB90nkMyFnq1Gh1GTuNMLygSqw=)
Center for American Progress: _The SAVE Act Would Disenfranchise Millions of Citizens_
**MAGA Republicans are pushing for a federal takeover of our elections through the so-called SAVE Act – legislation that would make it harder for MILLIONS of Americans to vote. ****[**Sign on to STOP the SAVE Act >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102419159/529117000/1857494260?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU4YzE0ZC0xNWVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Li6OmX1MQjagJOee7LB90nkMyFnq1Gh1GTuNMLygSqw=&emci=df8c38ff-10ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9e58c14d-15ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26828920)**
| | **[STOP THE SAVE ACT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102419161/529117002/1857494260?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU4YzE0ZC0xNWVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Li6OmX1MQjagJOee7LB90nkMyFnq1Gh1GTuNMLygSqw=&emci=df8c38ff-10ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9e58c14d-15ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26828920)**
---
Picture this, folks:
You go in to vote, and you're turned away at the polls – despite having voted at the same location for years.
_Why?_ You don’t have a passport, and you’re missing your birth certificate.
**The GOP’s SAVE Act is proposing this exact scenario,** and it will slam the door on millions -- soldiers serving abroad, rural Americans, tribal members, disaster survivors, working families, and women who took their spouse's name.
150 million citizens --_half the country_ \-- lack passports. And at **$130** each, that's no small barrier. Millions more don’t have their birth certificates on file either.
Make no mistake, folks: this is another step in the GOP’s calculated ploy to keep the American people from the ballot box.
[**We've seen this playbook before, but the good news is we can fight back. That’s why we’re hoping you’ll sign the petition to STOP the SAVE Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102419164/529117005/1857494260?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU4YzE0ZC0xNWVmLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Li6OmX1MQjagJOee7LB90nkMyFnq1Gh1GTuNMLygSqw=&emci=df8c38ff-10ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9e58c14d-15ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26828920)

clean_body: | = Center for American Progress: The SAVE Act Would Disenfranchise Millions of Citizens MAGA Republicans are pushing for a federal takeover of our elections through the so-called SAVE Act – legislation that would make it harder for MILLIONS of Americans to vote. | | Picture this, folks: You go in to vote, and you're turned away at the polls – despite having voted at the same location for years. Why? You don’t have a passport, and you’re missing your birth certificate. The GOP’s SAVE Act is proposing this exact scenario, and it will slam the door on millions -- soldiers serving abroad, rural Americans, tribal members, disaster survivors, working families, and women who took their spouse's name. 150 million citizens --half the country \-- lack passports. And at $130 each, that's no small barrier. Millions more don’t have their birth certificates on file either. Make no mistake, folks: this is another step in the GOP’s calculated ploy to keep the American people from the ballot box. | We’re hoping for at least two 43614 signatures by midnight tonight. Thank you in advance for your commitment to defending the sacred right to vote. -Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team —

The American people did not elect Elon Musk as president. The Senate did not confirm him to a Cabinet position.

So why does he think he can have access to millions of Americans’ confidential information — including Social Security numbers, tax refunds, and bank information?

Jason and our team have heard from hundreds of Coloradans who are rightfully upset about Musk’s attempts to access private data — and Jason is taking action in Congress to put it to an end.

He introduced the Taxpayer Data Protection Act, alongside his Democratic colleagues, to limit what information can be shared with unelected officials.

Jason is fighting for Coloradans — against the Trump administration’s unlawful activities, their senseless cuts to investments Coloradans rely on, and power grabs.

Chip in to help Jason hold Elon Musk accountable. Coloradans deserve leadership that will fight for them and their rights: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-feb25]

Trump's nominee for Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer **[SHUT DOWN Bernie Sanders](https://substack.com/redirect/b38400f1-f980-413b-956b-eed25794421d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over and over again when he repeatedly tried to catch her in traps during her confirmation hearing earlier today.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b38400f1-f980-413b-956b-eed25794421d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b38400f1-f980-413b-956b-eed25794421d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"If you were sitting where I am sitting, would you vote to raise the minimum wage to a living wage?" Sanders stated.

A sharp Chavez-DeRemer fired back, "Well I'm not sitting where you are sitting. I used to but not any longer. I do recognize that the minimum wage hasn't been raised since 2009, and the cost of living has gone up. But again, I cannot sit here and determine what that wage will be because that is not in the purview of the Secretary of Labor."

Sanders again tried to set up Chavez-DeRemer with a question aiming to undermine President Trump's lawful executive powers. "Do you think President Trump's firing of Ms. Wilcox was illegal? Because I do!"

On-her-toes, Chavez-Deremer answered back, "President Trump has a right to exercise his executive power how he sees in consultation with his team!"

**Watch Chavez-DeRemer put Bernie Sanders in his place:**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b38400f1-f980-413b-956b-eed25794421d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In her opening statement, Chavez-DeRemer thanked Trump for creating "the single greatest political achievement of our time" \- a new coalition of working-class Americans.
"President Trump has united a new coalition of working-class Americans like never before. With 59.6% of Teamsters backing him, historic support from African American and Latino voters, and record-breaking turnout in once-solid blue cities and states--Americans are speaking loud and clear. They are calling for action, progress, and leadership that puts the American worker first," she stated.

# _**Resurfaced:**_**JD Vance makes woke FAA nominee PANIC, exposes dangerous DEI policies for all to see**
Watch then-Senator JD Vance **[confront Biden FAA nominee Phillip Washington](https://substack.com/redirect/14cfd618-e6a6-4b99-bd20-294e5e340345?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about the dangerous woke ideas embraced by so many working for the FAA and other areas of the U.S. government.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2853d515-754b-4fdf-92cd-093fe6996c04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2853d515-754b-4fdf-92cd-093fe6996c04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"The aviation industry is the single industry where aptitude and safety matter more than anything else," Vance told Washington, before asking him a series of blunt and direct questions to vet his commitment to safety above DEI ideals.
"Should white, black and latino pilots have to log 1,500 hours of total flight time in order to receive an airline transport license?" Vance asked along with a series of other questions about basic flight standards across all racial groups.
Washington admitted that everyone, regardless of race, should have to pass these basic standards.
"I don't really care what pilot I have, what their gender is, what their skin color is, I just care about whether they can do the job!" Vance explained firmly.
**[Watch the tense questioning here:](https://substack.com/redirect/2853d515-754b-4fdf-92cd-093fe6996c04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: Jonathan Nez
subject: Deb Haaland can be the first-ever Native American governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress
body:
| Peter, Watching my good friend, former Secretary Deb Haaland, launch her historic campaign to become our nation's first governor to identify as a Native American woman was a deeply moving experience. With the Trump administration attacking First People, words cannot express how overjoyed and proud we are to see one of our own launching such a great campaign. Deb will fight for all people, and I'm committed to doing everything I possibly can to help her win and make history. [**Can I count on you to pitch in a split donation between Deb's historic campaign for governor and me? As we all know, Deb will be attacked for trying to make history, and we must have her back.**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/xF8wuNFLsWdbLPGxhbA3yQ~~/AAPPABA~/_eZ_w4uAiC6OAFKP1VHFh4sxcOwz8SzHnlZMg7GBqE3OROFUr1e2PSlvNddTkBg4gINPBKV1B5Bt7rV7eKqbU8ed89QmWWO7rCpQmrClyGDuSgLt_H1PKPjkiiQp3eEpx1bDotMAtWphfP9wGNGup_hgpFmNlCXL47Y7CtZ8OlFjfpgeRrITXEDSu4ZS1lOy5uDCnef9UbcmEkRzbCNCb_W2MrohysC872UaBiZa_I3uwdEiBhicSzfQmFBAkAm1Rpn5LxRWZ6O_jHQyQ5UpfQNBCl1LELGoMr1IdEuLxu7b9BFD6JAkXfE-kU6nzAyYVNtwNQ5aUzLISSfqx9L0UxPnqZAgARuZKlxB_S0Ko8kOace9odlQMHEKJqJtNS40VINTCD8joUnnuvUeLletlBmjJgaNJ6gV-C4IBrwCo-jH8WMvvqBsO8CDsAhYjEjgQnu7KNRO5dtXOsgjXOvO87qe5mcxVpZpEMckHUZqm_Q~)

As a member of Congress and former Secretary of the Interior Haaland has never shied away from being a strong voice for all tribal nations and the people of New Mexico on a wide variety of issues, including job creation, public safety, land management, clean energy, economic development, and social justice. When I needed her support as President of the Navajo Nation, Deb never hesitated to do what had to be done. Her ability to weigh the issues from economic, social, and political standpoints is unique, and we rarely get a chance to support such a great leader. [**That's why I'm asking: can I count on you to join me in supporting Deb's campaign?**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/xF8wuNFLsWdbLPGxhbA3yQ~~/AAPPABA~/_eZ_w4uAiC6OAFKP1VHFh4sxcOwz8SzHnlZMg7GBqE3OROFUr1e2PSlvNddTkBg4gINPBKV1B5Bt7rV7eKqbU8ed89QmWWO7rCpQmrClyGDuSgLt_H1PKPjkiiQp3eEpx1bDotMAtWphfP9wGNGup_hgpFmNlCXL47Y7CtZ8OlFjfpgeRrITXEDSu4ZS1lOy5uDCnef9UbcmEkRzbCNCb_W2MrohysC872UaBiZa_I3uwdEiBhicSzfQmFBAkAm1Rpn5LxRWZ6O_jHQyQ5UpfQNBCl1LELGoMr1IdEuLxu7b9BFD6JAkXfE-kU6nzAyYVNtwNQ5aUzLISSfqx9L0UxPnqZAgARuZKlxB_S0Ko8kOace9odlQMHEKJqJtNS40VINTCD8joUnnuvUeLletlBmjJgaNJ6gV-C4IBrwCo-jH8WMvvqBsO8CDsAhYjEjgQnu7KNRO5dtXOsgjXOvO87qe5mcxVpZpEMckHUZqm_Q~) Onward, Jonathan Nez Former President of Navajo Nation

subject: The “crown jewel” of the radical left
body:
| | | ...the deep-state
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Today, I’m asking you to complete this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=750248d6f4144e5fad5b1aeced643e3d&_e=LrhfEdDx2FeaOjd7I-ScBVftvazuxcBJPy-iaidRseEr3a8yOUXKAKwsDQwM-_Y5L5pumFeX1zI2URcEr4RF2CrCi1p5texYe0ss_8zPGRJc8Dwi4tJphJOuGjvuIEqtTUtvog3xLcWWgkvzt7tPDlsZ4AFKlMg5ZjoxWzsmbvEn5G_IMG3iCcaNcIStLSc4911LeHNqaRhUol_sLFjg9go_dgfMQ4dSU0qyoH0uNP2y6XZEc53KkUYrlDgzntP2wAF4L1ynQlgmhe2ZB9zw9u3XQqUkd7iGeoAhnJuQ1u-O_nRKPAcaOY_ejqg8xspaCAdkQ1xRrTitN-SJRwq4tvFIFKo3qX44KjzHv4YvQI6pklq-IKbkmhi6MGPSIPbEcljGTLtgsYG15wRTvHc87hmQg0JxFBJ143shxPOolZM%3D)**
---
| | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem.
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=750248d6f4144e5fad5b1aeced643e3d&_e=LrhfEdDx2FeaOjd7I-ScBVftvazuxcBJPy-iaidRseEr3a8yOUXKAKwsDQwM-_Y5L5pumFeX1zI2URcEr4RF2CrCi1p5texYe0ss_8zPGRJc8Dwi4tJphJOuGjvuIEqtTUtvog3xLcWWgkvzt7tPDlsZ4AFKlMg5ZjoxWzsmbvEn5G_IMG3iCcaNcIStLSc4911LeHNqaRhUol_sLFjg9go_dgfMQ4dSU0qyoH0uNP2y6XZEc53KkUYrlDgzntP2wAF4L1ynQlgmhe2ZB9zw9gOj707S1BgCGikqJTi6agaFWXdUMx22D8Lsyk86KnFwDyLkoFhL16M2mDK3JafuOeC_r9b3dHLV7EsZxrK0VUGgKkAu12c_rRx3C2aqd1hIMMkcmUiFCPucIVzb6QJ0g5W30lOGafMzJU4HV0fj_14%3D)
---
| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=750248d6f4144e5fad5b1aeced643e3d&_e=LrhfEdDx2FeaOjd7I-ScBVftvazuxcBJPy-iaidRseEr3a8yOUXKAKwsDQwM-_Y5L5pumFeX1zI2URcEr4RF2CrCi1p5texYe0ss_8zPGRJc8Dwi4tJphJOuGjvuIEqtTUtvog3xLcWWgkvzt7tPDlsZ4AFKlMg5ZjoxWzsmbvEn5G_IMG3iCcaNcIStLSc4911LeHNqaRhUol_sLFjg9go_dgfMQ4dSU0qyoH0uNP2y6XZEc53KkUYrlDgzntP2wAF4L1ynQlgmhe2ZB9zw9r-tb7PPTHjFzWfUpzZaGxrjRMZKk6bK2urcHf4SUOM69oZYuM3s8J_U6518sTdyZatHuslKYha9zM7rcXHEAfPYAkcuC_BH5dt95Vl3HK3F6DNLcihXrVmlSDz2ujsjkTdkhg14zXZ6PJ6_V7isWEc%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=750248d6f4144e5fad5b1aeced643e3d&_e=LrhfEdDx2FeaOjd7I-ScBVftvazuxcBJPy-iaidRseEr3a8yOUXKAKwsDQwM-_Y5L5pumFeX1zI2URcEr4RF2CrCi1p5texYe0ss_8zPGRJc8Dwi4tJphJOuGjvuIEqtTUtvog3xLcWWgkvzt7tPDlsZ4AFKlMg5ZjoxWzsmbvEn5G_IMG3iCcaNcIStLSc4911LeHNqaRhUol_sLFjg9go_dgfMQ4dSU0qyoH0uNP2y6XZEc53KkUYrlDgzntP2wAF4L1ynQlgmhe2ZB9zw9hKi6Pe_tTpQEYmDKjtD9Km8Taq51NJZwIdChubyZYw_vpl-AQbmXWRhjvjzuw1GQJxHV5wzdfx8rcWCX5rVOUTzMuuNk0hkQtBA309XuopJyi7HZmyjXY9MvOzW_pLOJ1yp_Vy273OX7PEQuhonslA%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. **[**Your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS is the key to reaffirming this mandate by demonstrating the consensus that exists to remove the obstructionist deep-state.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=750248d6f4144e5fad5b1aeced643e3d&_e=LrhfEdDx2FeaOjd7I-ScBVftvazuxcBJPy-iaidRseEr3a8yOUXKAKwsDQwM-_Y5L5pumFeX1zI2URcEr4RF2CrCi1p5texYe0ss_8zPGRJc8Dwi4tJphJOuGjvuIEqtTUtvog3xLcWWgkvzt7tPDlsZ4AFKlMg5ZjoxWzsmbvEn5G_IMG3iCcaNcIStLSc4911LeHNqaRhUol_sLFjg9go_dgfMQ4dSU0qyoH0uNP2y6XZEc53KkUYrlDgzntP2wAF4L1ynQlgmhe2ZB9zw9lnc8SIoAkRyrxwalB2UdhBcCC_9qIN_tBeOgHGrFtGWcBdxZS7dMc99igJqZtHsWLvVfP3X_rxOB0r1TXsRWTQjDjy5zyrtx7Y2C6iXl-8PRuQwkNcX3oGHgCsReYeUMQabL2XpndjiUcoF-IAz3_s%3D)** Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it _never_ will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. **[That’s why I’m asking you to complete your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS without delay.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=750248d6f4144e5fad5b1aeced643e3d&_e=LrhfEdDx2FeaOjd7I-ScBVftvazuxcBJPy-iaidRseEr3a8yOUXKAKwsDQwM-_Y5L5pumFeX1zI2URcEr4RF2CrCi1p5texYe0ss_8zPGRJc8Dwi4tJphJOuGjvuIEqtTUtvog3xLcWWgkvzt7tPDlsZ4AFKlMg5ZjoxWzsmbvEn5G_IMG3iCcaNcIStLSc4911LeHNqaRhUol_sLFjg9go_dgfMQ4dSU0qyoH0uNP2y6XZEc53KkUYrlDgzntP2wAF4L1ynQlgmhe2ZB9zw9nH8GQiKXEWYVqPbSOdC35l90Q3FQ0pZYWLtj4lGSJSKKa5NsSW4ik2DXE3HbceBT_Qcaq8N7GK64XKtcyb7xrln0JtwTG6NdW06RD8cPOQrb6uhcnTf6x1a83jOoYAeem1wgyLTitoRi62ql3QctTw%3D)** And that’s why **I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35** when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.**That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign.** I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before:
---
* They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on).
* We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts.
* The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract.

---
You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight.
---
Sincerely,

clean_body: | | | ...the deep-state | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem. | | | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). Your participation is of the utmost importance. Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%. Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies? Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year? Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average? What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee? These are the questions on part one of the And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration. Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government? Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch? Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service? Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats? You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it never will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. And that’s why I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign. I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before: They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on). We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts. The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract. You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight. Sincerely, | | David Horowitz P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “ On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues.” | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | | ---|---

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: 150,000 people in CA-12 could lose Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Hey Friend,
Right now, Republicans are gearing up to slash Medicaid and CHIP — all to hand billionaires another round of tax breaks. Their plan? Gut the very programs that keep millions of families afloat.
If they’re successful, nearly 150,000 people in CA-12 could lose their healthcare. That includes over 40,000 children and nearly 20,000 seniors. These aren’t just numbers — they’re our neighbors, our loved ones, our community.
I’ve experienced the crushing weight of medical debt firsthand. When I lost my husband in 2014, the financial, emotional, and physical toll was overwhelming. Like countless families navigating a broken healthcare system, we lost everything. We were forced into bankruptcy, struggling just to survive. I understand deeply how crucial this fight is. I know just how much this fight matters.
I won’t stand by while Republicans play politics with people’s lives. I’m fighting back. But I need you with me.
Can you chip in before our end-of-month deadline to help us fight these cruel cuts? Every dollar fuels our movement to protect healthcare and stop the GOP’s attack on working families. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_021925_medicaid]

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Democrats Will Fight Against Trump’s War on Working People
body:
---
Derek, As one of our top supporters, we wanted to make sure you saw DNC Chair Ken Martin detailing Trump’s attack on labor. Here’s the bottom line: Trump and his billionaire backers are hellbent on attacking working families and dismantling the unions that protect workers in order to enrich themselves. **As Democrats, it is our responsibility to stand up for working people and unite behind the kitchen table issues that connect us all.** [**You can chip in here to help:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250219_2816_fr&refcode2=2816_22930333_XdjT_q&akid=2816%2E22930333%2EXdjT_q) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250219_2816_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2816_22930333_XdjT_q&akid=2816%2E22930333%2EXdjT_q)** We hope you’ll take a few minutes to read what Ken has to say below. Thank you for being part of this team. The Democrats **MEMORANDUM** TO: Interested Parties FROM: Ken Martin, DNC Chair DATE: February 18, 2025 RE: Democrats Will Fight Against Trump’s War on Working People
* * *
When I talk about the state of the Democratic Party, I often speak about the impact of perceptions – what voters see, feel, and sense. I believe the canary in the coal mine for what happened on November 5 was the recent showing that, for the first time in modern history, Americans now see the Republicans as the party of the working class and Democrats as the party of the elites. I grew up in a working-class family, as the first son of a teen mom who had four kids by age 20, and I wouldn’t be where I am today without Democrats who fought for policies to help families like mine not just get by, but get ahead. So, as the Trump agenda fails our nation’s working communities, we have to take seriously the job of repairing and restoring the perceptions of our party and our brand. It’s time to remind working Americans – and also show them every day – that the Democratic Party always has been and always will be the party of the worker. My roots are in labor. I was the Chair of the Minnesota Democratic-Farmer-Labor Party for fourteen years – the only party of its kind in the country that unites working people by name – where we went 25-0 in statewide races, secured two trifectas, and passed one of the most pro-family and pro-worker agendas in the nation. But before any of that, I proudly carried a union card and organized for the labor movement. I fundamentally believe that our party is grounded in the values, principles, and aspirations of the working class. As Chair of the DNC, that belief will guide my decisions and approach in the years ahead. In contrast, in only his first month in office, it’s become abundantly clear Donald Trump doesn’t give a damn about the kitchen-table issues that matter to most Americans. Trump and the billionaire advisors he has surrounded himself with don’t give a damn about what it takes for a working family to put food on the table and keep a roof above their heads – let alone make a better life for themselves and their loved ones. When it comes to making real progress for working families, our greatest successes come when we unite together on the issue that connects us: economic opportunity. That’s what union power is all about. It’s about building a multi-generational, multi-racial coalition of every worker. As an organizer, I know, alone, no one person can take on the ultra-wealthy and the powerful. But by joining together in a union, working people have secured better wages, workplace protections, health care, and the weekend. Because here’s the thing: Unions expand opportunities for all workers – not just those who are members. At a time when Donald Trump and his billionaire backers are carving up the federal government to sell for parts and plotting to offset tax breaks for their fat cat friends by taking money out of Americans’ pockets, we need union power more than ever. Trump knows it too. That’s why he’s wasted no time dismantling workers’ collective bargaining protections; elevating billionaires with records of offshoring, union busting, and workers’ rights violations; and bringing his dangerous and unpopular Project 2025 agenda to life. In response, as the true party of labor and working people, Democrats will stand with unions and up for all working people – in the halls of Congress, in state houses, on the picket lines, and in the streets. With Donald Trump and his Corrupt Billionaire Cabinet in office, the stakes have never been higher for working people – just take a look: **_Attacking Labor From Day One_** Americans sent Donald Trump to the White House to make life better for working families. Instead, beginning on day one, Trump moved with dizzying speed to dismantle the policies, protections, and institutions keeping workers safe, strong, and united. In an unprecedented and illegal move, Trump fired appointees on two independent agencies — axing a National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) member as well as two Democratic Equal Employment Opportunity Commission members, despite having appointed one of them during his first term. These members brought strong records of standing up to giant corporations on behalf of working people and Trump knew he needed them out of the way to freely implement his anti-worker Project 2025 agenda. Following Trump’s firing spree, the New York Times reported that Trump’s removal of a member of the NLRB effectively “stops it from protecting workers’ rights,” making it far easier for corporate CEOs like Amazon’s Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk – who got front row seats at Trump’s inauguration – to trample over workers’ protections as their companies face unionization efforts. In fact, both Amazon and Musk’s SpaceX are currently suing the NLRB in an attempt to dismantle the board tasked with protecting workers from corporate exploitation. Instead of pushing for progress on workers’ rights, Donald Trump has rolled back the clock by some sixty years: rescinding an executive order signed by President Lyndon Johnson to prohibit government contractors from discriminating in their hiring, firing, promotion, and pay practices. Union member or not, Trump and his allies’ anti-worker, anti-union attacks within the public and private sector alike make workers less safe. Elon Musk, the richest man in the world and Trump’s unpopular, unelected co-president, has shown the frightening realities of Donald Trump’s anti-worker assaults. With Trump’s blessing, Musk – who got zero votes in the 2024 election – has upended the federal government’s merit-based career civil service and threatened retribution against government employees refusing to hand over U.S. taxpayers’ personal information – from home addresses, to Medicare records, and Social Security numbers. Americans are disturbed by Elon Musk’s influence over the federal government. We should all be asking: What does Musk want with our private data, will he sell it to the highest bidder, and how much money does he personally stand to make from the American taxpayer? Since Elon Musk became the true face of the Trump administration, his public approval rating has plummeted. After infiltrating the Treasury Department, gutting USAID, and attempting to eliminate the Department of Education, Elon Musk is also setting his sights on the Department of Labor, placing the integrity of data like the unemployment rate and inflation rate at risk. The accuracy of these metrics is critically important to the stability of the U.S. economy and, by extension, working people. In response, some of the nation's largest labor groups are standing up to Musk and Trump’s highway robbery of the federal government, suing Musk’s so-called Department of Government Efficiency. In his second term, Donald Trump and his allies are more emboldened than ever to execute the far-right Project 2025 agenda, and Trump’s attacks on workers fit within a long, troubling history. In his first term, Trump created new incentives for companies to ship American jobs overseas and stacked federal courts with appointees who attacked collective bargaining protections. He openly disparaged union workers as “dues-sucking people,” said striking workers should be fired, and balked at using union labor on his own real estate projects. Despite his insistence on the campaign trail, Trump has never stood with working people. His disastrous first month in office proves that, while billionaires will be well taken care of, working people face great danger under this Trump administration. **_Trump’s Offshoring, Union Busting Advisors_** To implement his dark Project 2025 vision and deliver handouts for the ultra-wealthy, Donald Trump is assembling the wealthiest U.S. Cabinet in American history, stacked with out-of-touch, special interest billionaires who are looking out for themselves and their balance sheets over working families. Trump’s administration includes more billionaires than any other in American history, with a combined net worth that exceeds the GDP of 172 different countries. These appointees bring damning anti-union, anti-worker records that mirror Trump’s own. Doug Burgum, now Trump’s Interior Secretary, opposed historic federal investments secured in the Inflation Reduction Act and CHIPS and Science Act because of the bills’ labor protections. Trump’s billionaire pick for Commerce Secretary, Howard Lutnick, screwed over American workers by helping companies ship manufacturing jobs to Mexico. Stephen Miran, Trump’s pick to lead the Council of Economic Advisors, criticized worker strikes and unions’ ability to negotiate better wages for their members – a proven pathway to the middle class. Meanwhile, Trump and his billionaire Department of Education Secretary pick Linda McMahon have long supported pulling tax dollars away from public schools, where 70% of teachers are unionized. Such cuts to public school funding would harm both teachers and children. And of course, Elon Musk, who stole Trump’s spotlight to become the new face of the administration, boasts a damning record of union busting and other workers’ rights violations. At Tesla, Elon Musk fired workers attempting to unionize and tried to hide hundreds of workplace injuries from public reports. He faces a lawsuit for threatening and intimidating his employees. Musk, who is now radically upending federal government operations, even forced his employees at X (formerly Twitter) to bring their own toilet paper to work. Despite the money saved on janitorial staff, Musk has still never managed to make X profitable. The app remains in “dire state,” with “no clear pathway to profitability in sight.” **_Project 2025 v. Working Families_** After spending his campaign denying his connection to Project 2025 while promising to bring down prices on Day One, Donald Trump dropped the charade and immediately set out to make his “severely unpopular” Project 2025 agenda a reality as president. Trump elevated architects of Project 2025 to lead his administration and enacted Project 2025 policies in an avalanche of executive orders – attacking essential programs and rescinding Biden-era cost-saving measures – all while laying the groundwork for another tax handout to billionaires. In the short time Trump has been in office, Project 2025 is already causing chaos and pain for working Americans. Last month’s disastrous federal aid freeze order was the “brainchild” of Trump’s OMB director Russell Vought – Project 2025’s chief architect. This freeze – and freezes of government funds since – have had disastrous impacts on Americans’ daily lives. For example, Trump’s freeze of President Biden’s Inflation Reduction Act programs is “creat[ing] chaos” and causing significant “financial distress” to farmers and some Head Start programs across the country are still having trouble accessing federal funds thanks to Trump’s freezes. Project 2025 is designed to enrich the ultra-wealthy while dismantling the institutions that keep workers safe and allow them to earn their fair share. Project 2025 would make unionization incredibly burdensome and precarious for workers, further dilute the power of the NLRB, and roll back bedrock worker protections in place for nearly a century. If Trump continues to implement his Project 2025 agenda, workers who receive overtime would see their paychecks slashed; the Occupational Safety and Health Administration, responsible for investigating workplace injuries and fatalities, would be rendered toothless; construction workers would eat a decline in take home pay due to attacks on prevailing wage requirements; and companies could more easily intentionally misclassify workers as contractors to avoid providing them with benefits like health care and sick leave – and even exploit child labor without consequence. Project 2025 also sets out to ban public-sector unions, a historically-monumental driver of economic mobility, especially for marginalized workers. Today, thanks to strong collective bargaining agreements within the public sector, as well as early adoption of anti-discrimination provisions, the pay gap between Black workers and white workers is smaller in the public sector than in the private sector. Unions protect workers regardless of identity, offer a pathway to the middle class, and raise standards for union and nonunion members alike. Trump’s continued Project 2025 threats to unions are a direct attack on the wellbeing of working families everywhere. **_Bottom Line_** In his first term, Donald Trump relentlessly pursued policies that harmed working families, but his first month back in office proves he was just getting started. Trump and his billionaire backers are hellbent on attacking working families and dismantling the unions that protect workers in order to enrich themselves. As Democrats, it is our responsibility to stand up for working people and unite behind the kitchen table issues that connect us all. As I take over as Chair of the DNC, union workers and labor leaders will be core to my decision-making. As Trump wages his war on working families, Democrats will fiercely answer the call to my favorite old union song, “Which Side Are You On?” I’ll tell you what: Democrats are on the side of the worker. We will show Americans every day that workers in fact do have more power than any billionaire.

Here’s the bottom line: Trump and his billionaire backers are hellbent on attacking working families and dismantling the unions that protect workers in order to enrich themselves. As Democrats, it is our responsibility to stand up for working people and unite behind the kitchen table issues that connect us all. We hope you’ll take a few minutes to read what Ken has to say below. Thank you for being part of this team. The Democrats MEMORANDUM TO: Interested Parties FROM: Ken Martin, DNC Chair DATE: February 18, 2025 RE: Democrats Will Fight Against Trump’s War on Working People When I talk about the state of the Democratic Party, I often speak about the impact of perceptions – what voters see, feel, and sense. I believe the canary in the coal mine for what happened on November 5 was the recent showing that, for the first time in modern history, Americans now see the Republicans as the party of the working class and Democrats as the party of the elites. I grew up in a working-class family, as the first son of a teen mom who had four kids by age 20, and I wouldn’t be where I am today without Democrats who fought for policies to help families like mine not just get by, but get ahead. So, as the Trump agenda fails our nation’s working communities, we have to take seriously the job of repairing and restoring the perceptions of our party and our brand. It’s time to remind working Americans – and also show them every day – that the Democratic Party always has been and always will be the party of the worker. My roots are in labor. I was the Chair of the Minnesota Democratic-Farmer-Labor Party for fourteen years – the only party of its kind in the country that unites working people by name – where we went 25-0 in statewide races, secured two trifectas, and passed one of the most pro-family and pro-worker agendas in the nation. But before any of that, I proudly carried a union card and organized for the labor movement. I fundamentally believe that our party is grounded in the values, principles, and aspirations of the working class. As Chair of the DNC, that belief will guide my decisions and approach in the years ahead. In contrast, in only his first month in office, it’s become abundantly clear Donald Trump doesn’t give a damn about the kitchen-table issues that matter to most Americans. Trump and the billionaire advisors he has surrounded himself with don’t give a damn about what it takes for a working family to put food on the table and keep a roof above their heads – let alone make a better life for themselves and their loved ones. When it comes to making real progress for working families, our greatest successes come when we unite together on the issue that connects us: economic opportunity. That’s what union power is all about. It’s about building a multi-generational, multi-racial coalition of every worker. As an organizer, I know, alone, no one person can take on the ultra-wealthy and the powerful. But by joining together in a union, working people have secured better wages, workplace protections, health care, and the weekend. Because here’s the thing: Unions expand opportunities for all workers – not just those who are members. At a time when Donald Trump and his billionaire backers are carving up the federal government to sell for parts and plotting to offset tax breaks for their fat cat friends by taking money out of Americans’ pockets, we need union power more than ever. Trump knows it too. That’s why he’s wasted no time dismantling workers’ collective bargaining protections; elevating billionaires with records of offshoring, union busting, and workers’ rights violations; and bringing his dangerous and unpopular Project 2025 agenda to life. In response, as the true party of labor and working people, Democrats will stand with unions and up for all working people – in the halls of Congress, in state houses, on the picket lines, and in the streets. With Donald Trump and his Corrupt Billionaire Cabinet in office, the stakes have never been higher for working people – just take a look: Attacking Labor From Day One Americans sent Donald Trump to the White House to make life better for working families. Instead, beginning on day one, Trump moved with dizzying speed to dismantle the policies, protections, and institutions keeping workers safe, strong, and united. In an unprecedented and illegal move, Trump fired appointees on two independent agencies — axing a National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) member as well as two Democratic Equal Employment Opportunity Commission members, despite having appointed one of them during his first term. These members brought strong records of standing up to giant corporations on behalf of working people and Trump knew he needed them out of the way to freely implement his anti-worker Project 2025 agenda. Following Trump’s firing spree, the New York Times reported that Trump’s removal of a member of the NLRB effectively “stops it from protecting workers’ rights,” making it far easier for corporate CEOs like Amazon’s Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk – who got front row seats at Trump’s inauguration – to trample over workers’ protections as their companies face unionization efforts. In fact, both Amazon and Musk’s SpaceX are currently suing the NLRB in an attempt to dismantle the board tasked with protecting workers from corporate exploitation. Instead of pushing for progress on workers’ rights, Donald Trump has rolled back the clock by some sixty years: rescinding an executive order signed by President Lyndon Johnson to prohibit government contractors from discriminating in their hiring, firing, promotion, and pay practices. body:
This race is going to be close, and our rights and freedoms depend on it. | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=22868%2E4449941%2EnM1Ttp) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=22868%2E4449941%2EnM1Ttp) I’m no stranger to how close statewide races in Wisconsin can be. Last fall, my race was the most expensive Senate race our state has ever seen — and it all came down to just a few votes. This year, the stakes are just as high.

Right now, right-wing special interests are pouring millions into Wisconsin to try to buy a seat on our Supreme Court. And now, Elon Musk has weighed in—making it clear that the far right is all-in on flipping control of the court.

We can't let them win. We have a chance to elect Judge Susan Crawford, a dedicated public servant who will protect our rights and uphold the law. But with the GOP’s megadonors opening their checkbooks, we have to fight back with everything we’ve got.

[**_Can you split a donation between Susan Crawford’s campaign and Fight for Reform? Your support is critical if we want Susan to win this race. _**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59689?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=3&akid=22868%2E4449941%2EnM1Ttp) | | [DONATE $5 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59689?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=4&akid=22868%2E4449941%2EnM1Ttp)

Reproductive rights, funding for public education, voting rights, and so much more is on the line in this race. It’s already clear that this will not only be one of the closest races in the country, but it will also be the biggest race of 2025—and we know that every dollar makes a difference.

If we all step up now, we can counter right-wing spending and keep Wisconsin’s Supreme Court fair and independent.

[**_I hope you’ll join me in supporting Susan Crawford for Wisconsin Supreme Court by splitting a donation with Fight for Reform to help them elect pro-Democracy state and local Democrats. name: Gary Miller for House of Delegates
subject: Danny Marshall is Retiring – This Seat is Ours to Win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE121 Bell Ct
body:
This is the best chance that we have had to flip this seat in over a decade.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0a3f2cdd57c7/danny-marshall-is-retiring-this-seat-is-ours-to-win?e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | | | |
---
[](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=442be74e73&e=606d7e9aa2)
|

**Friend,**
We just got breaking news—**longtime incumbent Danny Marshall is retiring.** That means this is now an **open seat** in the Virginia House of Delegates, and we have a **real chance to flip it blue.**
At a time when **anti-science extremists** like RFK Jr. are being **elevated to national platforms** , and **Trump’s allies are dismantling public health institutions** , **we cannot afford to sit this one out.** With the far right pushing **state-by-state rollbacks on vaccines, reproductive rights, and healthcare access** , **our state legislators are now our last line of defense.**
That’s why I’m running. As a **doctor, small business owner, and City Council member** , I’ve spent my career **fighting for people** —first in the emergency room, then in the halls of local government. Now, I’m ready to take that fight to Richmond.
But let me be clear: **We can’t win this without you.** This race is now one of the most **competitive and flippable seats in Virginia** , and we need all hands on deck.

### [**We Need a Doctor in the House of Delegates**](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=e6c58312fc&e=606d7e9aa2)
###
For over **36 years** , I’ve seen firsthand what happens when **people can’t afford healthcare** or when **politicians put ideology over science**. I’ve fought to **expand access to care, protect Medicaid, and ensure our first responders have what they need**. Now, I’m ready to fight for:
✅ **Expanding healthcare access and protecting public health from right-wing attacks**
✅ **Defending reproductive freedom and stopping GOP abortion bans**
✅ **Protecting voting rights and democracy against Trump’s extremist allies**
✅ **Investing in public schools and raising teacher pay**
✅ **Bringing good-paying jobs and economic growth to Southside Virginia**
This isn’t just about one district—**the balance of power in the House of Delegates will determine whether Virginia stands up to Trump’s authoritarian agenda or falls in line.**

### **Now is the Moment – We Need You in This Fight**
###
With Danny Marshall stepping down, **the GOP is scrambling** —and we have **a real shot to flip this seat blue**. But we can’t do it without grassroots support.Every dollar you give will help us **build our campaign, reach voters, and WIN in November**.
[**Will you rush a donation today to help elect a doctor to the House of Delegates and stop Trump’s allies from taking over Virginia?**](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=b224fffa68&e=606d7e9aa2)
This race is winnable. This moment is urgent. **Let’s fight for Virginia together.**
Thank you,
**Gary Miller**
Candidate for Virginia’s 49th House of Delegates Districthttps://www.drmillerforyou.com/

---

---
