name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: The threats against me and Elon are getting worse by the day
body:
This is why I have to hire private security
| | [View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kM1u4jAUhZ_mekdkXzuJs_BiMigaDapERWHBzn9pLJwQ5Y_m7SsoZXv03Xs-Hd32MdSrgrwExCa4ERCB_wHEeeInfTy-DetmP1zi5sbR33PAv090wRfcWb3blXNszx_lKOJXc_ZRLuyFT2vvX_CzNPGtDvGe5lvilEDNaku8YrmglBZpIUmjODWSOWq91MI5y4WVtUypN5n2UqIhQSHFlCIrkKeSsyTnptCmxqxgFlnGQNBHUVIP3k9N6C5-cDrENbHXlkTVTFM_PsQqwOrqTNLNNvp5_Lmy1xaweioDVgtgtS9Ph1n-22VH4NVjNL416__3QzfcNBmU628hxjBmOQj6-fuGLAq_AwAA___c6G9v)
| | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU2PmzwUhX-N2YHwNeFjwWIyKIt39Eqt2qnU2SCDr8GNbaJrk5R_X4GibM99pOccXelu1uitZdWZAcxGBQbAxBsDWKP4JT8__6ct_UZXmz4E4J4zeH-id3jBfpQfH-fVuq-f51DYv_MX2vrOX3jcbviCn9IMnTR2T6suUW0BkusxwZZXRZ7nzampk7nVIOpGVxzrYRgE6qoc1ClH5DkUQgxFYlrI4ZQDb0CcasGzSgyNHDSUDR-Bl5wV-SHKNCHG2fgrkpLGbtm4uMS2c4y3cBS7MLgEHFfC7GE8odoJBhcn6c9CBtOJED2meqF0XPxEGMJ-jlOvFt8vrkfq3ZSqCXsK_bNXwcRlja6PSI6JTkfFGZS0e8j4iYku0ooMyt5bo5jofl9X_z6E9U0e4fEU0Q3bf99_eHrIhFp1exhrTSgrVuTTMW7fcm_hXwAAAP__nD-RiA)
---
Friend,
I’m going to get straight to the point.
**Democrat Representative Robert Garcia went on CNN and issued a chilling call to violence against me and Elon Musk, calling for “ACTUAL WEAPONS” to be used against us.**
This is not new for me. Extremist Democrats have sent me countless death threats and I’ve been “swatted” too many times to count, but there is one big difference.
**_This is the first time a sitting member of Congress has gone on national television to issue a violent threat against me._**
I didn’t know much about Rep. Garcia before he went on national television to incite people to kill me and Elon Musk, but I did some digging and found out quite a bit.
Garcia, who proudly boasts about being the first gay former illegal immigrant elected to Congress, has been obsessed with me for quite some time.
**In just over two years in office,****_Garcia has sent over 60 emails to his supporters attacking me as a threat to democracy, a right wing extremist, and as a voice of hatred, lies, and conspiracies._**
But now his threats are being aired to every liberal zealot watching CNN, with absolutely no pushback from anchor Brianna Keller.
**This is exactly how President Trump’s would-be assassin Ryan Routh was radicalized, and with the rhetoric coming from the Democrats, I’m afraid it’s going to happen again.**
As a rank and file member of Congress, I don’t get a government security detail, I have to pay for that out of my campaign funds or my own personal.
**_[I’m asking for your help in the form of a donation to my campaign so that I can increase my security and keep myself, my staff, and my family safe](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kc2OnDAQhJ_G3EB2m98DhyVoDllF2ijZHPaCDG7AWduMGjMT8vQr0Giu1Z_0VamVu1oz7jUrGgYwG70yACZfGMAW5B_1_v6D9viNPm18l4BHzuDbA73BE_aDen1tNus-fjdrav_NH2jLm3jiYb_iE35IE3TK2CMt2kjXKSgxDhHWokg551VWldFc50qVUioNWZ-DEEqWpeSiwB5kyYdSRaYGDhkHUYHMSimSQvaV6kfIKzGAyAVL-SlKRkIMs_GfSFoZuyfD4iJbzyFc17PYhcFlxWEjTO7GE-qDYHBxiv4uZDCeCNFjPC4UD4ufCNf1OIep04vvFtchdW6K9YQdrd2jV8rkZQuuC0iOyXYMWjDI6fCQ8ROTbaANGeSdt0Yz2fbw9r9pXkadneH5FNn2-_efvzzdVUS1vt6NtWbNC5by6Rx3bLnV8BUAAP__u2OQMQ)_.**
I hate to ask, but I truly need the help right now.
[DONATE](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT-NuYHwGEw4cGiKcuiq0vbP9rAXZPAA7tomGpuk9NOvQFGub37S7z2Ncldrxq1h1ZkBzEYHBsDEFwawRvFHvb19py19pQ-b3gXgnjP4-kBv8IT9oF5ezqt177_PobD_5ne0pxt_4nG74hN-SDN0ytg9rdpENwUoPg4JNrwq8jyvy_qUzI3sawESS64x50MhR0Dg1djrUiqBwBPTQA5lDrwGUZ4EzyrR16ofQdZ8AC45K_JDlI2EGGfjP5C0MnbLhsUltpljvIaj2IXBJeCwEmZ34wn1TjC4OEV_FzKYToToMR0XSofFT4Qh7Oc4dXrx3eI6pM5NqZ6wo9A9ehVMXNbouojkmGjHqDkDSbuHjJ-YaCOtyEB23hrNRPva__8Jzm91e4THU0Tbb99-_PJ0Vwk1-no31pogK1bk0zFu33Jr4DMAAP__RX6Q-w)

clean_body: This is why I have to hire private security | | | | Friend, I’m going to get straight to the point. Democrat Representative Robert Garcia went on CNN and issued a chilling call to violence against me and Elon Musk, calling for “ACTUAL WEAPONS” to be used against us. This is not new for me. Extremist Democrats have sent me countless death threats and I’ve been “swatted” too many times to count, but there is one big difference. This is the first time a sitting member of Congress has gone on national television to issue a violent threat against me. I didn’t know much about Rep. Garcia before he went on national television to incite people to kill me and Elon Musk, but I did some digging and found out quite a bit. Garcia, who proudly boasts about being the first gay former illegal immigrant elected to Congress, has been obsessed with me for quite some time. In just over two years in office,Garcia has sent over 60 emails to his supporters attacking me as a threat to democracy, a right wing extremist, and as a voice of hatred, lies, and conspiracies. But now his threats are being aired to every liberal zealot watching CNN, with absolutely no pushback from anchor Brianna Keller. This is exactly how President Trump’s would-be assassin Ryan Routh was radicalized, and with the rhetoric coming from the Democrats, I’m afraid it’s going to happen again. As a rank and file member of Congress, I don’t get a government security detail, I have to pay for that out of my campaign funds or my own personal. . I hate to ask, but I truly need the help right now. Your support truly means so much to me, and I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart. In Liberty, Marjorie Taylor Greene . | |
